Stagehand is an open-source, AI-powered browser automation library. Stagehand lets you combine code with natural-language instructions powered by AI, eliminating the need to dictate exact 步骤s or specify selectors. With Stagehand, your agents are more resilient to website changes and easier to maintain, helping you 构建 more reliably and flexibly.

/byoip/service-bindings/.title: IP address service 绑定
/byoip/service-bindings/.description: In IP address management, service 绑定 refers to the association of IPs to specific Cloudflare services. Review the available options and the API 端点 to 设置 service 绑定.
paragraphs: In IP address management, service 绑定 map the traffic destined for a given IP address to the Cloudflare service that it should be 路由d through.
Service 绑定 operations are currently only available via API. You can find all 端点 and their specifications in the Cloudflare API 文档. For detailed guidance, refer to the sections and 教程 linked below.
:::注意
Service 绑定 take four to six hours to propagate across Cloudflare's 全球网络 after being 创建d or 删除d. Services for the IP addresses in scope are likely disrupted during this window.

Customers using BYOIP with Magic Transit, CDN services, or Spectrum can leverage the service 绑定 API 端点 to selectively 路由 traffic through the CDN [^1] or Spectrum [^2] 管道s on a per-IP address basis. This means:
You can upgrade individual IPs within a Magic Transit prefix to either a CDN IP or a Spectrum IP. For 示例, if you have a Magic Transit prefix , you can upgrade  to CDN and  to Spectrum.
You can upgrade individual IPs within a CDN prefix to a Spectrum IP. For 示例, if you have a CDN prefix , you can upgrade  to Spectrum.
You can upgrade individual IPs within a Spectrum prefix to a CDN IP. For 示例, if you have a Spectrum prefix , you can upgrade  to CDN.
Refer to Magic Transit with CDN or CDN and Spectrum for detailed guidance.
:::注意
Magic Transit customers must ensure that their contract includes CDN and/or Spectrum according to their needs.
When a service 绑定 of 类型  is applied, once the change has propagated across Cloudflare's 全球网络 (four to six hours), any HTTP 请求s are directed into the CDN 管道 for Layer 7 processing.
When a service 绑定 of 类型  is applied, once the change has propagated across Cloudflare's 全球网络 (four to six hours), any TCP/HTTP 请求s are directed into the Spectrum 管道 for Layer 4 or Layer 7 processing.
Magic Transit can only be used as 默认 绑定, spanning across your entire prefix. You can then add CDN or Spectrum for smaller subnets but not the other way around.
The entire BYOIP prefix is primarily announced for Magic Transit, providing layer 3 DDoS protection and acceleration. Traffic not explicitly bound to CDN will flow through Magic Transit.

Also, traffic egressing to an IP in the prefix will always go to Magic Transit, even if there is an overlapping 绑定 for CDN or Spectrum. This allows customers who want to use the same IP as ingress IP and as 源 IP to do so.
When adding a service 绑定 for a given IP address, it must be either a CDN service 绑定 or a Spectrum service 绑定. It is not possible (or necessary) to bind both services.

/byoip/address-maps/.title: About address maps
paragraphs: If you do not have BYOIP or static IPs and you want to use Address Maps, contact your 账户 manager. You can customize the IPs Cloudflare uses by bringing your own IP addresses to Cloudflare (BYOIP) or by leasing static Cloudflare IPs.
:::注意
Both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses are 支持的.

For 区域s using Cloudflare's authoritative DNS, Cloudflare typically responds to DNS queries for proxied 主机名s with anycast IPs. However, if you customize the IPs Cloudflare uses and use Address Maps, Cloudflare will respond with the IP address(es) on the address map.
Address maps do not change how Cloudflare reaches the configured 源. The IP addresses defined on your 区域's DNS 记录s continue to instruct Cloudflare how to reach the 源.
:::注意
De待处理 on whether you use static IPs or BYOIP, the process to 创建 an address map is different.

Leased static IPs allow you to use a set of specifically assigned Cloudflare IPs to ensure they do not change. Cloudflare 创建s an address map with your static IPs that you may edit. You cannot 创建 another map using your static IPs.
With BYOIP, you use your IPs by bringing an address space that you lease or own and creating an address map.

Some customers may only 代理 区域s through BYOIP addresses, and are prohibited from using Cloudflare IP addresses for proxied DNS names. In this case, Cloudflare will 创建 an immu表, 账户-wide address map to ensure all 区域s in your 账户 receive BYOIP addresses as a 回退. These address maps cannot be 删除d.
It is still possible to 创建 more specific 区域-level address maps with specific BYOIPs, but DNS will fall back to the 账户-wide address map without one.
To specify different addresses for certain 区域s, 创建 a 新功能 address map.
You can use address maps to 设置 non-SNI 支持 for Spectrum HTTPS applications.

However, to control what IP address Cloudflare will use when responding to 请求s for your Spectrum applications, you should first refer to their respective 配置 and set the  字段 as . For details, refer to the Spectrum API.

获取 Cloudflare's 安全 and 性能 while using your own IPs.

Considering how Cloudflare works as a 反向代理, for some customers it may be 重要 to maintain this 函数ality while also keeping their website or application associated with their own public IP space (instead of Cloudflare's[^1]).
With Bring Your Own IP (BYOIP), Cloudflare announces your IPs in all our locations. Use your IPs with Magic Transit, Spectrum, CDN services, or Gateway DNS locations and dedicated egress IPs.
Learn how to 快速开始.

on your business needs.
[^1]: Without BYOIP, when your 域名's 记录s are , Cloudflare responds with a Cloudflare-owned anycast IP address.

/cache/advanced-configuration/cache-rese.title: Cache Reserve
headings: 提示s and 最佳实践
paragraphs: How long content in Cache Reserve will be considered “fresh” is determined by Edge Cache TTL setting or Cache-Control 头部 at your 源, if Edge Cache TTL is not set. After freshness expires, Cloudflare will attempt to revalidate the asset when a subsequent 请求 arrives in Cache Reserve for the asset. This is the same behavior as in Cloudflare's regular CDN.

The retention period of an asset is how long we will keep the asset in Cache Reserve before marking it for eviction. Cache Reserve starts with a retention period of 30 days. If an asset is not 请求ed within the retention period, it will be evicted from Cache Reserve. Accessing the asset will refresh the retention period.
Assets must meet certain criteria to use Cache Reserve.
Cache Reserve is a usage-based product and 定价 is detailed below. While Cache Reserve does require a paid plan, users can continue to use Cloudflare’s CDN (without Cache Reserve) for free.
A paid Cache Reserve Plan is 必需 for the enablement.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Cache Reserve** page.
Select **Enable storage sync**.
Refer to the Change Cache Reserve setting API for more 信息rmation.
:::注意[注意]

You can pause Cache Reserve at any time. Pausing Cache Reserve means that Cloudflare’s network will no longer use Cache Reserve to serve data, but 资源 will remain in storage until they are purged or expired.
If you are an Enterprise customer and are interested in Cache Reserve, contact your 账户 team to 获取 help with your 配置.
Like the standard CDN, Cache Reserve also uses the  头部 to indicate cache 响应 statuses like , , and . Cache Reserve cache misses and hits are factored into the 控制面板's cache hit ratio.
Individual sampled 请求s that filled or were served by Cache Reserve are viewable via the CacheReserveUsed Logpush 字段.
Cache Reserve monthly operations and storage usage are viewable in the 控制面板.
Cache Reserve charges based on the total volume of data stored, along with two classes of operations on that data:
Class A operations which are more expensive and tend to mutate state.
Class B operations which tend to 读取 existing state.

In most cases, a Cache Reserve miss will result in both one class A and one class B operation, and a Cache Reserve hit will result in one class B operation. Assets larger than 1 GB will incur more operations proportional to their size.
Rates
Storage
$0.015 / GB-month
Class A Operations (writes)
$4.50 / million 请求s
Class B Operations (读取s)
$0.36 / million 请求s
Storage is billed using gigabyte-month (GB-month) as the billing metric. A GB-month is calculated by 记录ing total bytes stored for the duration of the month.
For 示例:

paragraphs: Cloudflare makes customer websites faster by storing a copy of the website's content on the servers of our globally distributed 数据中心. Content can be either static or dynamic: static content is “cacheable” or eligible for 缓存, and dynamic content is “uncacheable” or ineligible for 缓存. The cached copies of content are stored physically closer to users, optimized to be fast, and do not require recomputing.

/cache/how-to/tiered-cache/.title: Tiered Cache
headings: Enable Tiered Cache in the 控制面板
paragraphs: Tiered Cache uses the size of Cloudflare’s network to reduce 请求s to customer 源s by dramatically increasing cache hit ratios. With 数据中心 around the world, Cloudflare caches content very close to end users. However, if a piece of content is not in cache, the Cloudflare edge 数据中心 must contact the 源服务器 to receive the cacheable content.

Tiered Cache works by dividing Cloudflare’s 数据中心 into a hierarchy of lower-tiers and upper-tiers. If content is not cached in lower-tier 数据中心 (generally the ones closest to a visitor), the lower-tier must ask an upper-tier to see if it has the content. If the upper-tier does not have the content, only the upper-tier can ask the 源 for content. This practice improves 带宽 efficiency by limiting the 数字 of 数据中心 that can ask the 源 for content, which reduces 源 load and makes websites more cost-effective to operate.

Additionally, Tiered Cache concentrates connections to 源服务器s so they come from a small 数字 of 数据中心 rather than the full set of network locations. This results in fewer open connections using server 资源.
To enable Tiered Cache, refer to Enable Tiered Cache.

Cloudflare allows you to select your cache topology so that you have control over how your 源 connects to Cloudflare’s 数据中心. This will help ensure higher cache hit ratios, fewer 源 connections, and a reduction of Internet 延迟. Below you can find details about the options we have available.
Generic Global topology allows for all of Cloudflare’s global 数据中心 to serve as a network of upper-tiers. This topology may help reduce the long tail latencies for far-away visitors.

This can help improve 性能 for Smart and Custom Tiered Cache topologies with upper-tiers in one or two regions. Regional Tiered Cache is not beneficial for customers with many upper tiers in many regions like Generic Global Tiered Cache.

Custom Tiered cache allows Enterprise customers to work with their 账户 team to set a custom topology that fits your specific needs, for instance you have close upper tiers or you have an unique traffic pattern. If you want a custom topology, please engage your 账户 team.

Enterprise customers can override 带宽 Alliance 配置 with Tiered Cache. For all other users, the 带宽 Alliance takes precedence. Tiered Cache is still a valuable option to enable because the 带宽 Alliance may not always be an available option, and in those instances, the Tiered Cache 配置 will be used.
You can enable Tiered Cache in the 控制面板 or via API.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Tiered Cache** page.
From **Tiered Cache**, toggle the button to **已启用**.
In **Tiered Cache Topology**, you can control how your 源 connects to Cloudflare’s 数据中心. You can select:
**Upper Tier Cache** - You have the option to choose between Smart or Generic Global Tiered Cache Topology.
**Middle Tier Cache** -  If you have selected Smart or Custom Tiered Cache Topology, you can now enable Regional Tiered Cache.
**Custom Tiered Cache** - Allows you to work with Cloudflare’s 支持 team to set a custom topology that fits your specific needs.
**Disable Tiered Cache**.
To enable Tiered Cache via API use the following cURL 示例:
You can also configure Tiered Cache Topology via API, for instance:
For more API 示例 and 配置 options for Tiered Cache, refer to the API 文档.
:::注意
To confirm that Tiered Cache is working, make sure you have the 值 of  in your http\_请求s 日志, this will indicate if Tiered Cache was used to serve the 请求.

/cache/.title: Cloudflare Cache
paragraphs: Cache content across Cloudflare's global server network.

Cache stores copies of frequently accessed content (such as images, videos, or webpages) in geographically distributed 数据中心 that are located closer to end users than 源服务器s, reducing server load and improving website 性能.

Cloudflare Load Balancing distributes traffic across your  端点 , reducing 端点 strain and 延迟 and improving the end users experience.
A suite of products tailored to your image-processing needs.

Cloudflare Network Interconnect (CNI) allows you to connect your network infrastructure directly with Cloudflare – rather than using the public Internet – for a more reliable and secure experience.
Cloudflare R2 Storage allows developers to store large amounts of unstructured data without the costly egress 带宽 fees associated with typical cloud storage services.

Cloudflare's Instant Purge ensures that 更新s to your content are reflected immediately. Mul提示le options are available for purging content, with single-file cache purging (purge by URL) being the recommended method. However, the following additional options are also available:

If versioning is 活跃 on your 区域 and mul提示le environments are configured, you can select the specific environment you want to purge. For more details, refer to the Version Management 文档.
The current purge 限制 are applied per 账户:
{限制Details}
注意 that the thresholds for URLs are calculated using a moving average.
Cloudflare uses 令牌 存储桶 速率限制 to limit the 数字 of purge 请求s flowing through the system at any given time, ensuring a steady and manageable flow.

Each 账户 tier has a defined 请求 rate (for 示例, Free: 5 请求s per minute, Business: 10 请求s per second), and 请求s are only allowed if there are available 令牌s in the 存储桶. 令牌s refill at a consistent rate, but each 存储桶 has a maximum capacity (for 示例, Free: 25 令牌s, Enterprise: 500 令牌s), allowing short bursts of 请求s if 令牌s have accumulated.
If the 存储桶 is empty, further 请求s must wait until 新功能 令牌s are added. This system maintains fair usage while allowing occasional bursts within the 存储桶's capacity.
If you are an Enterprise customer and you need more operations, reach out to your 账户 team for 支持.

/cache/concepts/default-cache-behavior/.title: 默认 cache behavior
headings: 默认 cached file 扩展
When does Cloudflare cache 成功fully?
paragraphs: Cloudflare respects the 源 web server’s cache 头部 in the following order unless an Edge Cache TTL cache 规则 overrides the 头部. Refer to the Edge TTL section for details on 默认 TTL behavior.
Cloudflare **does not** cache the resource when:
The  头部 is set to , , , or .
The Set-Cookie 头部 exists.
The HTTP 请求 method is anything other than a .
Cloudflare **does** cache the resource when:
The  头部 is set to  and  is greater than 0.
The  头部 is set to a future date.
:::注意
Cloudflare does cache the resource even if there is no  头部 based on 状态码.
If both  and an  头部 are set,  will be used by Cloudflare.

When 源 Cache Control is 已启用 on an Enterprise customer’s website, it indicates that Cloudflare should strictly respect  directives received from the 源服务器. Free, Pro and Business customers have this 特性 已启用 by 默认. For a 列表 of directives and behaviors when 源 Cache-Control is 已启用 or 已禁用, refer to Cache-Control directives.
Clients can send range 请求s to be served from the cache using the  头部. 注意 that:
If the 源 响应 includes a  头部, then the specified byte range will be returned with an HTTP 206 响应.
If the 源 响应 does not include the  头部, the cache will return the full content with an HTTP 200 响应.

When mul提示le 请求s arrive simultaneously at a single Cloudflare 数据中心 for the same asset that is not in cache (a cache miss), Cloudflare uses a  cache lock  to avoid sending duplicate 请求s to your 源. Only the first 请求 is forwarded to the 源 to fetch the asset. The remaining 请求s wait for the first 请求 to complete, after which the 响应 is 流ed to all waiting 请求s.
The cache lock ensures that Cloudflare only sends one 请求 at a time to the 源 for a given asset from a single location in Cloudflare's network, pr事件ing the 源 from receiving excessive traffic.
Cloudflare only caches based on file extension and not by MIME 类型. The Cloudflare CDN does not cache HTML or JSON by 默认. Additionally, by 默认 Cloudflare caches a website's robots.txt.
To cache additional content, refer to Cache 规则 to 创建 a 规则 to cache everything.
Cloudflare’s CDN provides several cache customization options:
缓存 behavior for individual URLs via Cache 规则
Customize 缓存 with Cloudflare Workers
Adjust 缓存 level, cache TTL, and more in the 缓存 page in the Cloudflare 控制面板:
Customers can reduce the Maximum Upload Size from the 区域's Network page.
If you require a larger upload, you can group 请求s into smaller chunks, upload the full resource through an unproxied (grey-clouded) DNS 记录 or upgrade your plan.
Cloudflare cacheable file 限制:
Free, Pro and Business customers have a limit of 512 MB.
For Enterprise customers the 默认 maximum cacheable file size is 5 GB. Contact your 账户 team to 请求 a limit increase.

The connection status between visitors and Cloudflare can vary, affecting whether Cloudflare caches the content or not. If Cloudflare has al读取y established a connection to the 源 and started fetching the content, it will continue to retrieve and cache the entire content, even if the visitor disconnects midway. However, if a visitor disconnects before the 源 responds to Cloudflare's 请求, no content will have been fetched yet, so Cloudflare will not start 缓存 the content.

/china-network/.title: Cloudflare China Network
paragraphs: The Cloudflare China Network is a package of selected Cloudflare's 性能 and 安全 products 运行中 on 数据中心 located in Mainland China and operated by Cloudflare's partner JD Cloud.

The 数据中心 cover most populated regions in China. Combining Cloudflare's technological leadership and JD Cloud's local operations expertise, the Cloudflare China Network is designed to meet the needs for secure, reliable, and fast-performing content delivery in China. You can use the same 配置s that you use with Cloudflare everywhere else in the world and with the same 控制面板 experience.
The Cloudflare China Network provides:
A single solution for both 性能 improvement and 安全 services such as WAF, DDoS, and bot management.
An unified experience for managing network traffic and 安全 posture. You can manage all 配置s on the same 控制面板.
The same customer 支持 capabilities as Cloudflare's 全球网络. You may also have access to premium service and local language 支持.
In-China Authoritative DNS and in-China 名称服务器s to improve the Time to First Byte (TTFB) 性能.
Global Acceleration is a suite of connectivity and 性能 offerings designed to simplify your global assets' 部署 in China.
The Cloudflare China Network is available as a separate subscription for customers on an 企业计划.
Not all Cloudflare products are available in the Cloudflare China Network. Refer to Available products and 特性 for details.
IPv6 支持 is mandatory for all Internet entities operating in Mainland China. The Cloudflare China Network 特性 automatically enables IPv6 for 域名s to fulfill this requirement.
All the content inside of Mainland China is 监控ed by local authorities and must comply with local regulations.
You must have a valid ICP (Internet Content Provider) filing or license for each apex 域名 you wish to onboard to Cloudflare.

/china-network/concepts/icp/.title: Internet Content Provider (ICP)
paragraphs: Internet Content Provider (ICP) is a licensing regime instated by the Telecommunications Regulations of the People's Republic of China (中华人民共和国电信条例), promulgated in September 2000.

Under the ICP, all websites with their own 域名 name that operate inside China must obtain a license, whether hosted on a server in Mainland China or provided to visitors from China via a CDN. Licenses are issued at the provincial level. You can use the Ministry of Industry and 信息rmation Technology (MIIT) website to check if a 域名 al读取y has an ICP 数字 (only available in Chinese).

All public websites in Mainland China must have an ICP 数字 displayed on the website's home page. Websites with the same apex 域名 can share the same ICP 数字. China-based hosting providers are instructed to shut down any website (often without notice) without an ICP 数字.
To host web services in Mainland China, you are legally 必需 to acquire an ICP filing or an ICP license in China.
The 类型 of ICP you must obtain depends on the 类型 of website you are providing to customers in China:
If you wish to host a marketing-相关 website, you only need an ICP filing.

Cloudflare recommends that you apply for an ICP license through your hosting or Cloud Services Provider. You will need to provide the necessary documents to your provider to register the ICP 数字 on your behalf:

After all 必需 documents are submitted, it can take four to eight weeks to obtain an ICP de待处理 on the 类型 of website and the province where the company is registered. Although there is no cost to register with the MIIT, your provider may charge you a fee.
After receiving the ICP 数字 and the 证书, add it to your website's home page.
After you obtain an ICP 数字, you must display it in the footer of your website, like in the following 示例:

/china-network/concepts/china-dns/.title: China Authoritative DNS
paragraphs: Cloudflare China Network provides a nearest-to-client nameservice by 默认. The DNS 请求 is resolved on the 数据中心 nearest to the client out of China, and the HTTP 请求 is served on the 数据中心 nearest to the client. The closest Cloudflare 数据中心 outside of China is adopted for clients outside of China, and the JD Cloud 数据中心 in China is adopted for clients in China.
Cloudflare is able to 部署 DNS service in Mainland China to improve the Time to First Byte (TTFB) 性能. With this 部署, the DNS 查询 will be resolved in Mainland China instead of the global DNS servers.

Before you enable China Authoritative DNS, you should confirm that majority (over 90%) of your traffic is coming from Mainland China. After you enable China Authoritative DNS, all the global DNS 请求s will be 路由d to JD Cloud 数据中心 in Mainland China instead of the nearest 数据中心.
The following 表 compares the 默认 DNS offering with the In-China 名称服务器 option.
After you enable the Cloudflare China Network service, do the following:
Contact your Cloudflare sales team to enable the 特性. Currently you cannot enable it in the Cloudflare 控制面板.
The current China Network 支持s both a full 设置 and a partial 设置.
更新 your 域名 registrar with the assigned in-China 名称服务器s.
For a full 设置: These 名称服务器s are displayed in the Cloudflare 控制面板.
For a partial 设置: 创建 a  记录 pointing to  for global 默认 DNS setting and  for In-China DNS.
If you have two DNS 记录s,  and , pointing to two different 源服务器s. Your Authoritative DNS server will have the following DNS 记录s:
CNAME  to
测试 your 配置 by checking if the 域名 resolves correctly.
For further assistance, contact your 账户 team.

/china-network/concepts/global-accelerat.title: Global Acceleration
paragraphs: :::注意
Global Acceleration is a service offering that can be an add-on to China Network and also extends Zero Trust services into China.
Global Acceleration is a suite of connectivity offerings designed to simplify your global assets' 部署 in China. Global Acceleration is provided by our partners including CMI, CBC Tech, and JD Cloud.
Global Acceleration can 支持 the following scenarios:
CDN Global Acceleration provides s表 and reliable connections for dynamic content entering and exiting China, specifically beneficial for users' experience within the country.

Cloudflare One Client Global Acceleration (formerly WARP Global Acceleration) enables Cloudflare One Client access within China, allowing remote employees to maintain secure and consistent connections.
Cloudflare WAN Global Acceleration (formerly Magic WAN Global Acceleration) enables Cloudflare WAN access within China, allowing in-office employees to maintain secure and reliable connectivity.
Internet Content Provider (ICP) service simplifies the complexities of acquiring an ICP for 域名s to operate compliantly within China.
The Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS) service add-on 流lines the certification process to secure the MLPS L3 certification for your applications.
Travel SIM offers temporary, seamless Cloudflare One Client access for individual employees traveling to China, ensuring uninterrupted connectivity during their visit.

Ensure that you have a Cloudflare 企业计划 and China Network, if you want CDN Global Acceleration. Cloudflare One Client and Cloudflare WAN entitlements are 必需 for Cloudflare One Client Connection or Cloudflare WAN Global Acceleration.
Contact your Cloudflare 账户 team. They will assist you with contracting with us, or our local China partners, de待处理 on the service.
Our local China partners will assist you to 部署 Global Acceleration.

/client-ip-geolocation/about/.title: About
paragraphs: :::注意
Client IP Geolocation is currently in closed 测试版 测试.

Cloudflare Client IP Geolocation helps you understand where in the world a given client is located, even if their true client IP address is obscured by Cloudflare's 代理 systems. We offer this service to ensure customers have high-quality experiences interacting with 源s that rely on geolocation — such as mapping providers — and 源 operators can deliver the right content to the right users. Ensuring 源s know where clients are located avoids problems associated with traditional VPNs that obscure a 消费者’s geolocation and allow circumvention of geographic restrictions on content.
Users cannot opt out of this geolocation 支持 and Cloudflare will always make a best effort to convey geolocation.

When Cloudflare connects to your 源 over IPv4, we geolocate our VPN users to 1 of 1,000 egress locations (a ). The 列表 of cells is a super set of all the countries in the world and all US Designated Market Areas and includes mul提示le cells for large metropolitan areas. For all 支持的 cell locations, download our 列表.
When Cloudflare connects to your 源 over IPv6, we geolocate our VPN users to one of thousands of locations distributed across the globe.
If a VPN user tries to use an interposed VPN or 代理 system that attempts to hide their location, we share that 信息rmation with 下游 entities.

We map our egress IP addresses for our forward-代理 offerings to specific geolocations and continuously share this 信息rmation with major geolocation 数据库 providers like MaxMind, IP 2 Location, and Neustar.

When Cloudflare receives an inbound 请求 from a WARP or 1.1.1.1 user, we first geolocate the IP address that made the connection to Cloudflare. Then, we select an egress IP that maps to the client geolocation. We then discard Client IP 信息rmation to preserve user privacy but return their true geographic location.
If the Client IP is a known 代理 or VPN service without strong commitments to preserving client location, we return an unmapped/unknown location.

Because our cell 列表 includes Designated Market Areas in the United States, you can use the returned geolocation 信息rmation — or lack of it — to enforce content restrictions when delivering linear or on-demand video content subject to common licensing 要求.

Jane is a Cloudflare WARP user in Glendive, Montana, USA. She is interested in the privacy 优势 of using a VPN. Her client IP address is , which is owned by Mid-Rivers Telephone Cooperative and geolocates to 47.0984,-104.7275, approximately.

Jane connects to Cloudflare’s edge using a secure tunnel. Cloudflare operates an anycast network and dictates VPN ingress by anycast. Jane’s VPN traffic lands in the Cloudflare Minneapolis 数据中心, 930km from Glendive.

A naive geolocation implementation would provide unacceptably inaccurate 信息rmation. It would have Jane geolocated to Minneapolis, which is in a totally different state — Minnesota instead of Montana — and Designated Marketing Area — Glendive, MT, the country’s smallest DMA, instead of Minneapolis, MN — from her true location. From a content distribution perspective, this level of geolocation is not accep表.

Instead, Cloudflare uses its own geolocation mapping to provide much more accurate 信息rmation. Cloudflare’s edge would geolocate Jane’s client IP () to Glendive and select an egress IP address of  from its 列表 of available egress IP addresses based on this geolocation result.

Jane attempts to watch live television via an over-the-top (OTT) video provider. The video provider’s 源 sees a connection from . A geolocation lookup on  returns Glendale, MT, and Jane is able to access the linear video content because the OTT provider is able to geolocate the VPN traffic to the true client location.

/client-ip-geolocation/.title: 概述
paragraphs: :::注意
Client IP Geolocation is currently in closed 测试版 测试.

Cloudflare designed Cloudflare WARP and 1.1.1.1 to make Internet browsing more private and secure. These applications encrypt last-mile connections and make it more difficult for others to use client IP addresses in user fingerprinting.

However, unlike legacy VPN applications, we never designed WARP or 1.1.1.1 to hide user locations or allow users to misrepresent their true geographic location. As a web property operator, you can use Client IP Geolocation to map Cloudflare egress IP addresses to specific geolocations.
快速开始   了解更多
Client IP Geolocation is different from the Cloudflare IP Geolocation setting, which helps you capture country codes for visitors.

/client-ip-geolocation/get-started/.title: 快速开始
paragraphs: :::注意
Client IP Geolocation is currently in closed 测试版 测试.
There are several things you can do to best handle traffic from Cloudflare VPN and forward-代理 users:
**源 operators**:
Do not block IP addresses associated with our VPN and 代理 products (see the About section for more details)
To 获取 even more accurate geolocation data, ensure your 源 is reachable via IPv6
**Geolocation data providers**:
Regularly pull 已更新 geolocation data from the Cloudflare API
**Users of WARP and 1.1.1.1**:
Review the 常见问题s and About section to learn exactly how, how much, and why we share geolocation data

/client-side-security/detection/review-c.title: Review changed scripts
/client-side-security/detection/review-c.description: Learn how to review scripts on your 域名 after receiving a code change alert.
paragraphs: :::注意
Only available to customers with Client-Side 安全 Advanced.
Cloudflare analyzes the JavaScript 依赖 in the pages of your 域名 over time.
You can configure a notification for code change 告警 to receive a daily notification about changed scripts in your 域名.
When you receive such a notification:
{/ prettier-ignore-start /}
Go to the client-side 资源 page:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Web assets** page.
Select the **Client-side 资源** tab.
登录 to the Cloudflare 控制面板, and select your 账户 and 域名.
Go to **安全** > **Client-side 安全**.
Check the details of each changed script and validate if it is an expected change.
{/ prettier-ignore-end /}

/client-side-security/alerts/.title: 告警
/client-side-security/alerts/.description: Cloudflare client-side resource 告警 notify you when 新功能 scripts
paragraphs: :::注意
新功能 resource 告警 require a 商业计划 or higher. Code change and malicious resource 告警 require Client-Side 安全 Advanced. For details, refer to Alert 类型s.
You can configure unscoped or scoped 告警:
**Unscoped alert**: Covers all 区域s in your Cloudflare 账户. Unscoped 告警 are 触发器ed either daily, hourly, or immediately, de待处理 on the alert 类型.

**Scoped alert**: Covers one or more specific 区域s. Requires content 安全 规则 configured in those 区域s. Scoped 告警 are 触发器ed immediately and only notify you about 资源 that are covered by your 规则. 规则 violations do not 触发器 these 告警. For more 信息rmation, refer to Scoped 告警.
For 告警 sent at regular intervals, you might experience a delay between adding a 新功能 script and receiving an alert.
For instructions on configuring 告警, refer to Configure an alert.
Only available to customers with Client-Side 安全 Advanced.
If you have configured content 安全 规则 in a 区域, you can 过滤器 alert 通知 according to those 规则. These 告警 are called scoped 告警.
When you 创建 a scoped alert using the Policies of these 区域s alert 过滤器, you will only receive the most relevant 通知 based on the 规则 you configured.
For each scoped alert, Cloudflare does the following:
Check which content 安全 规则 are 已启用 in a 区域, either in allow or in log mode.
For every 已启用 规则, compare the URL of the 新功能 or changed resource against the allowed sources in the 规则.
If the resource is allowed by the 规则, check if the 新功能 or modified resource should 触发器 the current alert.
If the alert should 触发器, send an alert notification to the configured destinations.

When you 创建 a scoped alert you will not receive 通知 for 资源 that are not allowed by a content 安全 规则 (either in allow or in log mode). These are 规则 violations that you can review in the 控制面板, through GraphQL, or via Logpush.
Scoped 告警 only fire if the 区域 has at least one 已启用 content 安全 规则.
For unscoped 告警, you will receive 告警 for 资源 detected in all your 区域s, and you may receive 告警 about 资源 that violate your configured content 安全 规则.

/client-side-security/detection/monitor-.title: 监控 资源 and Cookies
headings: Use the client-side 资源 控制面板s
View all reported scripts or connections
paragraphs: Render,
Markdown,
步骤s,
Details,
Tabs,
TabItem,
DashButton,
} from "~/components";
Once you activate client-side 安全's resource 监控, the main client-side 资源 控制面板 will show which 资源 (scripts and connections) are 运行中 on your 域名, as well as the Cookies recently detected in HTTP traffic.

If you notice unexpected scripts or connections on the 控制面板, check them for signs of malicious activity. Customers with Client-Side 安全 Advanced will have their connections and scripts classified as potentially malicious based on threat feeds. You should also check for any 新功能 or unexpected Cookies.
:::注意[注意s]
Users in Free and 专业计划s only have access to script 监控.
If you recently activated client-side resource 监控, you may see a delay in reporting.
To review the 资源 detected by Cloudflare:
{/ prettier-ignore-start /}
Go to the client-side 资源 page:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Web assets** page.
Select the **Client-side 资源** tab.
登录 to the Cloudflare 控制面板, and select your 账户 and 域名.
Go to **安全** > **Client-side 安全**.
Review the 列表 of scripts, connections, and Cookies for your 域名, de待处理 on your Cloudflare plan. To apply a 过滤器, select **Add 过滤器** and use one or more of the available options.
Available 过滤器s
**Status**: 过滤器 scripts or connections by status.
**Script URL**: 过滤器 scripts by their URL.
**Connection URL**: 过滤器 connections by their tar获取 URL. De待处理 on your 配置, it may 搜索 only by tar获取 主机名.
**Seen on host**: Look for scripts appearing on specific 主机名s, or connections made in a specific 主机名.

**Seen on page** (requires a Business or 企业计划): Look for scripts appearing in a specific page, or for connections made in a specific page. 搜索es the first page where the script was loaded (or where the connection was made) and the la测试 occurrences 列表.
**类型**: 过滤器 Cookies according to their 类型: first-party Cookies or unknown.
Cookie property: 过滤器 by a Cookie property such as **Name**, **域名**, **Path**, **Same site**, **HTTP only**, and **Secure**.
De待处理 on your plan, you may be able to view the details of each item.
{/ prettier-ignore-end /}

The All Reported Connections and All Reported Scripts 控制面板s show all the detected 资源 including infrequent or 不活跃 ones, reported in the last 30 days. After 30 days without any report, Cloudflare will 删除 信息rmation about a previously reported resource, and it will no longer appear in any of the 控制面板s.
Select **Scripts** or **Connections**.
Select **View all scripts** or **View all connections**.
Review the 信息rmation displayed in the 控制面板.
You can 过滤器 the data in these 控制面板s using different criteria, and print a report with the displayed 记录s.
:::注意
Only available to customers on Business and 企业计划s.
Select **Scripts**, **Connections**, or **Cookies** (the available options depend on your plan).
Next to a script, connection, or Cookie in the 列表, select **Details**.
**Last seen**: How long ago the resource was last detected (in the last 30 days).
**First seen at**: The date and time when the resource was first detected.
**Seen on host**: The host where the script is being loaded or the connection is being made.
**Seen on pages**: The most recent pages where the resource was detected (up to 10 pages).
**First seen on**: The page where the resource was first detected.
The script details also include the last 10 script versions detected by client-side 安全.
**类型**: A Cookie can have the following 类型s:
**First-party**: Cookies set by the 源服务器 through a  HTTP 响应 头部.
**Unknown**: All other detected Cookies.
**域名**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute. When not set or unknown, this 值 is derived from the host.
**Path**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute. When not set or unknown, this 值 is derived from the most recent page where the Cookie was detected.
**First seen at**: The date and time when the Cookie was first detected.
**Seen on host**: The host where the Cookie was first detected.
**Seen on pages**: The most recent pages where the Cookie was detected (up to 10 pages).
Additional Cookie attributes (only available with Client-Side 安全 Advanced):
**Max age**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute.
**Expires**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute.
**Lifetime**: The approximate Cookie lifetime, based on the  and  Cookie attributes.
**HTTP only**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute.
**Secure**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute.
**Same site**: The 值 of the  Cookie attribute.
Except for 域名 and Path, standard Cookie attributes are only available for first-party Cookies, where Cloudflare detected the  HTTP 响应 头部 in HTTP traffic.
Only available to customers with Client-Side 安全 Advanced.
Use this 特性 to extract data for review and annotation. The data in the exported file will honor any 过滤器s you configure in the 控制面板.
To export script, connection, or Cookie 信息rmation in CSV format:
Select **Scripts**, **Connections**, or **Cookies**.
(可选) Apply any 过滤器s to the displayed data.
Select **Download CSV**.

/client-side-security/.title: Client-side 安全
/client-side-security/.description: Cloudflare's client-side 安全 is a comprehensive client-side
paragraphs: Ensures the safety and privacy of your website visitors' browsing environment.

Websites load third-party scripts for 分析, ads, chat wid获取s, and payment forms. If an attacker compromises one of these scripts, they can steal visitor data directly from the browser, an attack known as a client-side supply chain attack. Client-side 安全 (formerly Page Shield) gives you visibility into these 资源 and 告警 you when something changes or looks malicious.
Client-side 安全 监控s scripts, connections, and Cookies loaded by your website visitors. You can 设置 alert 通知 and 创建 content 安全 规则 to control which 资源 are allowed on your pages.
Learn how to 快速开始.
Displays 信息rmation about client-side 资源 loaded in your 域名's
pages.
Find in which page a resource first appeared, and view a 列表 of the la测试
occurrences of the resource in your pages.
Detects malicious scripts in your pages using threat intelligence and machine
learning.
Detects any changes in the scripts loaded in your pages.
Receive 通知 about 新功能ly detected scripts, scripts loaded from
unknown 域名s, 新功能 scripts considered malicious, or code changes in your
existing scripts.
Content 安全 规则 define allowed 资源 on your websites. Use content
安全 规则 to enforce an allow列表 of 资源, effectively blocking
资源 not included in your 规则.

/client-side-security/get-started/.title: 快速开始 with client-side 安全
/client-side-security/get-started/.description: Learn how to 快速开始 with Cloudflare's client-side 安全.
headings: 4. (可选) Define content 安全 规则
4.1. 创建 a content 安全 规则 with the Log 操作
4.3. Change 规则 操作 to Allow
paragraphs: To enable client-side resource 监控:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the 安全 **设置** page.
(可选) 过滤器 by **Client-side abuse**.
Turn on **Continuous script 监控**.
登录 to the Cloudflare 控制面板, and select your 账户 and 域名.
Go to **安全** > **Client-side 安全**.
Go to the **设置** tab.
Next to **Continuous 监控 and alerting**, select **Enable**.
If you do not have access to client-side 安全 设置 in the Cloudflare 控制面板, check if your user has one of the necessary 角色.
When you enable client-side resource 监控, it may take a while to 获取 the 列表 of detected scripts in your 域名.
To review the scripts detected by Cloudflare:
{/ prettier-ignore-start /}
Go to the client-side 资源 page:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Web assets** page.
Select the **Client-side 资源** tab.
Review the 列表 of detected scripts, checking for any unknown or unexpected scripts.
De待处理 on your plan and subscriptions, Cloudflare will also:
信息rm you if a script is considered malicious.
Show the details about each detected script.
{/ prettier-ignore-end /}
De待处理 on your Cloudflare plan, you may be able to also review the connections made by scripts in your 域名's pages and check them for malicious activity.
To learn how you can handle an alert, refer to Handle a client-side resource alert.
:::注意
Only available to customers with Client-Side 安全 Advanced.
Content 安全 规则 (previously called policies) define allowed 资源 on your websites. 创建 content 安全 规则 to implement a positive 安全 model[^1].
[^1]: A positive 安全 model is one that defines what is allowed and rejects everything else. In contrast, a negative 安全 model defines what will be rejected and accepts the rest.
When you 创建 a content 安全 规则 with the _Log_ 操作, Cloudflare 日志 any 资源 not covered by the 规则, without blocking any 资源. Use this 操作 to validate a 新功能 规则 before 部署ing it.
资源 not covered by the content 安全 规则 you 创建d will be reported as 规则 violations. After some time, review the 列表 of 规则 violations to make sure the 规则 is correct.
更新 the 规则 if needed.
Once you have verified that your content 安全 规则 is correct, change the 规则 操作 from _Log_ to _Allow_.
When you use the _Allow_ 操作, Cloudflare starts blocking any 资源 not explicitly allowed by the 规则.

/client-side-security/rules/.title: Content 安全 规则
/client-side-security/rules/.description: Use content 安全 规则 to define the 资源 (scripts) allowed
paragraphs: :::注意
Only available to customers with Client-Side 安全 Advanced.

Content 安全 规则 (previously known as policies) define which 资源 your application is allowed to load. They work through  Content 安全 Policy (CSP)  directives that Cloudflare adds to your HTTP 响应s. There are two 类型s of content 安全 规则:
**Log 规则** report 资源 that fall outside your allow列表 without blocking them.
**Allow 规则** block any resource not explicitly 列表ed.

创建 allow 规则 to define an allow列表-based 安全 model. You specify exactly which 资源 are permitted and everything else is rejected. This approach reduces the attack surface for unwanted third-party scripts in your application.
A content 安全 规则 can control both client-side 资源 监控ed by Cloudflare, such as scripts and their connections, and other 类型s of 资源. Refer to 支持的 CSP directives for details.
Third-party service providers may require specific CSP directives. Refer to your provider's 文档 for more 信息rmation on the CSP directives you need to include in your 规则.
A content 安全 规则 can perform one of the following 操作s:
**Log**: Cloudflare 报告 any 资源 not covered by the 规则 as 规则 violations without blocking them. Use this 操作 to validate a 新功能 content 安全 规则 before 部署ing it.

**Allow**: Cloudflare blocks any 资源 not explicitly allowed by the 规则 and 日志 them as 规则 violations. Switch to this 操作 after validating a 规则 with the _Log_ 操作 to avoid blocking essential application 资源.
For details on the CSP directives Cloudflare 创建s for each 类型 of 规则 操作, refer to How client-side 安全 works. For more 信息rmation on the CSP directives 支持的 by content 安全 规则, refer to 支持的 CSP directives.
Refer to the following pages for instructions on creating a content 安全 规则:
创建 a content 安全 规则 in the 控制面板
Client-side 安全 API: 创建 a content 安全 规则
Shortly after you configure content 安全 规则, the Cloudflare 控制面板 will start displaying any violations of those 规则.
You can 过滤器 client-side 安全 alert 通知 according to the content 安全 规则 you configured in a 区域. These 告警 are called scoped 告警.

/client-side-security/detection/review-m.title: Review 资源 considered malicious
/client-side-security/detection/review-m.description: Learn how to review scripts and connections that Cloudflare's client-side 安全
paragraphs: :::注意
域名-based threat intelligence is available to all customers. Malicious code analysis and URL-based threat intelligence require Client-Side 安全 Advanced.
Cloudflare displays scripts and connections considered malicious at the top of the 控制面板 列表s, so that you can quickly identify those 资源, review them, and take 操作.
To review the scripts considered malicious:
{/ prettier-ignore-start /}
Go to the client-side 资源 page:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Web assets** page.
Select the **Client-side 资源** tab.
登录 to the Cloudflare 控制面板, and select your 账户 and 域名.
Go to **安全** > **Client-side 安全**.
Select the **Scripts** tab.
Select **Details** for each script considered malicious. The script details will contain:
**Malicious code analysis**: Scores between 1-99 classifying how malicious the current script version is, where 1 means definitely malicious and 99 means definitely not malicious.

**Threat intelligence**: Whether the script URL and/or 域名 is known to be malicious according to threat intelligence feeds. If the script is considered malicious according to the feeds, the 控制面板 will show a 列表 of associated threat categories. If threat intelligence feeds do not have any 信息rmation about the script URL or 域名, the 控制面板 will show **Not present**.
The script details also include the last 10 script versions detected by Cloudflare.
For more 信息rmation, refer to Malicious script and connection detection.
Based on the displayed 信息rmation, and with the help of the last seen/first seen 字段s in the script details, review and 更新 the pages where the malicious script was detected.
{/ prettier-ignore-end /}
You can configure 告警 for detected malicious scripts. Refer to 告警 for more 信息rmation.
To review the connections considered malicious:
Select **Connections**.
Select **Details** for each connection considered malicious. The connection details will contain:

**URL match**: Whether the connection's tar获取 URL is known to be malicious according to threat intelligence feeds. This 字段 requires that you configure client-side 安全 to analyze the full URI of outgoing connections.
**域名 match**: Whether the connection's tar获取 域名 is known to be malicious according to threat intelligence feeds.
**Category**: The categorization of the connection considered malicious according to threat intelligence feeds.
Based on the displayed 信息rmation, and with the help of the last seen/first seen 字段s in the connection details, review and 更新 the pages where the malicious connection was detected.

/client-side-security/reference/.title: 参考
paragraphs: The following pages include additional 信息rmation about client-side 安全:

/cloudflare-agent/.title: Cloudflare Agent
paragraphs: An AI-powered assistant that helps you navigate, configure, and take 操作s on Cloudflare services directly from the 控制面板.
:::注意[测试版]
Cloudflare Agent is currently in 测试版 and only available to 账户s on a 免费计划. 特性 and behaviors may change.
With Cloudflare Agent, you can:
获取 answers to questions about Cloudflare products and your 账户 配置s
Execute Cloudflare API operations with approval flows for write 操作s
Run network diagnostics like DNS lookups, 证书 checks, and connectivity 测试s
搜索 Cloudflare 文档 for relevant 信息rmation
Cloudflare Agent is built with the Agents SDK, the same framework you can use to 构建 your own AI agents on Cloudflare.
搜索 Cloudflare 文档 to find answers about products, 特性, and 最佳实践.
Execute operations against the Cloudflare API using natural language. You can ask the agent to perform 任务s like creating DNS 记录s, managing 防火墙 规则, or checking your 账户 设置.
Write operations require your approval before 执行.
Run network diagnostic commands to troubleshoot connectivity and 配置 issues:
**DNS lookups** - 查询 DNS 记录s for any 域名
**HTTP 请求s** - 测试 端点 and inspect 响应s
**域名 信息rmation** - Look up WHOIS and RDAP registration data
**证书 checks** - Inspect TLS/SSL 证书s
**Connectivity 测试s** - Verify network reachability
During the 测试版 period:
特性 and behaviors may change without notice
Write operations will always require explicit approval before 执行

/cloudflare-challenges/.title: Challenges
paragraphs: Challenges are 安全 mechanisms used by Cloudflare to verify whether a visitor to your site is a real human and not a bot or automated script.

When a Challenge is issued, Cloudflare asks the browser to perform a series of checks that help confirm the visitor's legitimacy. This process involves evaluating client-side signals (data gathered from the visitor's browser environment) or asking a visitor to take minimal 操作 such as checking a box or selecting a button.
Challenges are designed to protect your application without introducing unnecessary friction. Most visitors will pass Challenges automatically without inter操作.
Cloudflare does not use CAPTCHA puzzles or visual 测试s like selecting 对象s or typing distorted characters. All challenge 类型s are lightweight, privacy-preserving, and optimized for real-world traffic.
Use Cloudflare's smart CAPTCHA alternative to run less intrusive Challenges.
Cloudflare bot solutions identify and mitigate automated traffic to protect
your 域名 from bad bots.
获取 automatic protection from vulnerabilities and the flexibility to 创建
custom 规则.
Detect and mitigate 分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) attacks using
Cloudflare's Autonomous Edge.

/cloudflare-challenges/reference/.title: 参考
paragraphs: Refer to the following pages for more 信息rmation about Cloudflare Challenges:

/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-pl.title: 绑定
headings: Adding a KV 命名空间 to a User Worker
1. 创建 a KV 命名空间
2. Attach the KV 命名空间 to the User Worker
paragraphs: When you 部署 User Workers through Workers for 平台s, you can attach 绑定 to give them access to 资源 like KV 命名空间s, D1 数据库s, R2 存储桶s, and more. This enables your end customers to 构建 more powerful applications without you having to 构建 the infrastructure components yourself.
With 绑定, each of your users can have their own:
KV 命名空间 that they can use to store and retrieve data
R2 存储桶 that they can use to store files and assets
分析 Engine dataset that they can use to collect 可观测性 data
Durable Objects class that they can use for stateful coordination
Each User Worker can only access the 绑定 that are explicitly attached to it. For complete isolation, you can 创建 and attach a unique resource (like a D1 数据库 or KV 命名空间) to every User Worker.
This 示例 walks through how to 创建 a KV 命名空间 and attach it to a User Worker. The same process can be used to attach to other 绑定.
创建 a KV 命名空间 using the Cloudflare API.
Use the Upload User Worker API to attach the KV 命名空间 绑定 to the Worker. You can do this when you're first uploading the Worker script or when updating an existing Worker.
:::注意

When using the API to upload scripts, 绑定 must be specified in the  对象 of your mul提示art upload 请求. You cannot upload the Wrangler 配置 file as a module to configure the 绑定. For more details about mul提示art uploads, see Mul提示art upload metadata.
Now, the User Worker has can access the  绑定 through the  argument using , , and other KV 方法.
注意: If you plan to add 新功能 绑定 to the Worker, use the  parameter to ensure existing 绑定 are preserved while adding 新功能 ones.

/cloudflare-for-platforms/.title: Cloudflare for 平台s
headings: 部署 your own 平台
paragraphs: 构建 a 平台 where your customers can 部署 code, each with their own 子域名 or 自定义域名.
Cloudflare for 平台s is used by leading 平台s big and small to:
构建 application development 平台s tailored to specific 域名s, like ecommerce storefronts or mobile apps
Power AI coding 平台s that let anyone 构建 and 部署 software
Customize product behavior by allowing any user to write a short code snippet
Offer every customer their own isolated 数据库
Provide each customer with their own 子域名
获取 a working 平台 运行中 in minutes. Choose a template based on what you are 构建ing:

/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-pl.title: How Workers for 平台s works
headings: Workers for 平台s versus Service 绑定
paragraphs: If you are familiar with Workers, Workers for 平台s introduces four 键 components: dispatch 命名空间s, dynamic dispatch Workers, user Workers, and 可选ly outbound Workers.

A dispatch 命名空间 is a container that holds all of your customers' Workers. Your 平台 takes the code your customers write, and then makes an API 请求 to 部署 that code as a user Worker to a 命名空间 — for 示例  or . Compared to Workers, this provides:
**Unlimited 数字 of Workers** - No per-账户 script 限制 apply to Workers in a 命名空间
**Isolation by 默认** - Each user Worker in a 命名空间 runs in untrusted mode — user Workers never share a cache even when 运行中 on the same Cloudflare 区域, and cannot access the  对象
**Dynamic 调用** - Your dynamic dispatch Worker can call any Worker in the 命名空间 using
:::注意[Best practice]
All your customers' Workers should live in a single 命名空间 (for 示例, ). Do not 创建 a 命名空间 per customer.
If you need to 测试 changes safely, 创建 a separate  命名空间.
A dynamic dispatch Worker is the entry point for all 请求s to your 平台. Your dynamic dispatch Worker:
**路由 请求s** - Determines which customer Worker should handle each 请求 based on 主机名, path, 头部, or any other criteria
**Runs 平台 logic** - Executes 身份验证, 速率限制, or 请求 validation before customer code runs
**Sets per-customer 限制** - Enforces custom 限制 on CPU time and sub请求s based on plan 类型
**Sanitizes 响应s** - Modifies or 过滤器s 响应s from customer Workers
The dynamic dispatch Worker uses a dispatch 命名空间 绑定 to invoke user Workers:

User Workers contain code written by your customers. Your customer sends their code to your 平台, and then you make an API 请求 to 部署 a user Worker on their behalf. User Workers are 部署ed to a dispatch 命名空间 and invoked by your dynamic dispatch Worker. You can provide user Workers with 绑定 to access KV, D1, R2, and other Cloudflare 资源.
An outbound Worker intercepts [](/workers/运行时-apis/fetch/) 请求s made by user Workers. Use it to:
**Control egress** - Block or allow external API calls from customer code
**Log 请求s** - Track what external services customers are calling
**Modify 请求s** - Add 身份验证 头部 or 转换 请求s before they leave your 平台
A 请求 arrives at your dynamic dispatch Worker (for 示例, )
Your dynamic dispatch Worker determines which user Worker should handle the 请求
The dynamic dispatch Worker calls  to 获取 the user Worker
The user Worker executes. If it makes external  calls and an outbound Worker is configured, those 请求s pass through the outbound Worker first.
The user Worker returns a 响应
Your dynamic dispatch Worker can 可选ly modify the 响应 before returning it

Both Workers for 平台s and Service 绑定 enable Worker-to-Worker communication. Use Service 绑定 when you know exactly which Workers need to communicate. Use Workers for 平台s when user Workers are uploaded dynamically by your customers.
You can use both simultaneously - your dynamic dispatch Worker can use Service 绑定 to call internal services while also dispatching to user Workers in a 命名空间.

/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-pl.title: Dynamic dispatch Worker
headings: Why use a dynamic dispatch Worker?
Configure the dispatch 命名空间 绑定
paragraphs: A dynamic dispatch Worker is a specialized 路由 Worker that directs incoming 请求s to the appropriate user Workers in your dispatch 命名空间. Instead of using Workers 路由, dispatch Workers let you programmatically control 请求 路由 through code.
:::注意
You can also 创建 a dispatch Worker from the Cloudflare 控制面板. Go to Workers for 平台s, select your 命名空间, and click 创建 > Dispatch Worker. The 控制面板 provides templates for path-based and 子域名-based 路由.
**Scale**: 路由 请求s to millions of 主机名s to different Workers, without defining Workers 路由 配置 for each one
**Custom 路由 logic**: Write code to determine exactly how 请求s should be 路由d. For 示例:
Store 主机名-to-Worker mappings in Workers KV and look them up dynamically
路由 请求s based on 子域名, path, 头部, or other 请求 properties
Use custom metadata attached to custom 主机名s for 路由 decisions
**Add 平台 函数ality**: 构建 additional 特性 at the 路由 layer:
Run 身份验证 checks before 请求s reach user Workers
Remove or add 头部 or metadata from incoming 请求s
Attach useful context like user IDs or 账户 信息rmation
转换 请求s or 响应s as needed

To allow your dynamic dispatch Worker to dynamically 路由 请求s to Workers in a 命名空间, you need to configure a dispatch 命名空间 绑定. This 绑定 enables your dynamic dispatch Worker to call any user Worker within that 命名空间 using .
Once the 绑定 is configured, your dynamic dispatch Worker can 路由 请求s to any Worker in the 命名空间. Below are common 路由 patterns you can implement in your dispatcher.
Store the 路由 mappings in Workers KV. This allows you to modify your 路由 logic without requiring you to change or re部署 the dynamic dispatch Worker.
路由 子域名s to the corresponding Worker. For 示例,  will 路由 to the Worker named  in the dispatch 命名空间.
路由 URL paths to the corresponding Worker. For 示例,  will 路由 to the Worker named  in the dispatch 命名空间.
Use custom 限制 to control how much CPU time a given user Worker can use, or how many sub请求s it can make. You can set different 限制 based on customer plan 类型 or other criteria.
For more details on available 限制, refer to Custom 限制.
To track limit violations and other 指标 across user Workers, use Workers 分析 Engine. For detailed logging and 调试, configure a Tail Worker to capture 事件 from your dispatch Worker.

/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-pl.title: Outbound Workers
paragraphs: Outbound Workers sit between your customer's Workers and the public Internet. They give you visibility into all outgoing  请求s from user Workers.
Outbound Workers can be used to:
Log all sub请求s to identify malicious 域名s or usage patterns.
创建, allow, or block 列表s for 主机名s 请求ed by user Workers.
Configure 身份验证 to your APIs behind the scenes (without end developers needing to set credentials).
:::注意
When an Outbound Worker is 已启用, your customer's Worker will no longer be able to use the [](/workers/运行时-apis/tcp-sockets/#connect)
to 创建 outbound TCP Sockets. This is to ensure all outbound communication goes through the Outbound Worker's  method.
To use Outbound Workers:
创建 a Worker intended to serve as your Outbound Worker.

Outbound Worker can be specified as an 可选 parameter in the dispatch 命名空间s 绑定 in a project's Wrangler 配置 file. 可选ly, to pass data from your dynamic dispatch Worker to the Outbound Worker, the 变量 names can be specified under **参数**.
Make sure that you have  or later 安装ed.
Edit your dynamic dispatch Worker to call the Outbound Worker and declare 变量s to pass on .

The Outbound Worker will now be invoked on any  请求s from a user Worker. The user Worker will 触发器 a Fetch事件 on the Outbound Worker. The 变量s declared in the 绑定 can be accessed in the Outbound Worker through .
The following is an 示例 of an Outbound Worker that 日志 the fetch 请求 from user Worker and 创建s a JWT if the fetch 请求 matches .
Outbound Workers do not intercept fetch 请求s made from Durable Objects or mTLS 证书 绑定.

/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-pl.title: Custom 限制
paragraphs: Custom 限制 allow you to programmatically enforce 限制 on your customers' Workers' resource usage. You can set 限制 for the maximum CPU time and 数字 of sub请求s per 调用. If a user Worker hits either of these 限制, the user Worker will immediately throw an exception.
Custom 限制 can be set in the dynamic dispatch Worker:

/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-pl.title: Worker Isolation
headings: Maintaining cache isolation in trusted mode
paragraphs: By 默认, Workers inside of a dispatch 命名空间 are considered "untrusted." This provides the strongest isolation between Workers and is best in cases where your customers have control over the code that's being 部署ed.
In untrusted mode:
The [](/workers/运行时-apis/请求/#incoming请求cfproperties) 对象 is not available in Workers (see 限制 for more 信息rmation)
Each Worker has an isolated cache, when using the Cache API or when making sub请求s using , which egress via Cloudflare's cache
[](/workers/参考/how-the-cache-works/#cache-api) is 已禁用 for all Workers in the 命名空间
This mode ensures complete isolation between customer Workers, pr事件ing any potential cross-tenant data access.
If you control the Worker code and want to disable isolation mode, you can configure the 命名空间 as "trusted". This is useful when 构建ing internal 平台s where your company controls all Worker code.
In trusted mode:
The [](/workers/运行时-apis/请求/#incoming请求cfproperties) 对象 becomes available, providing access to 请求 metadata
All Workers in the 命名空间 share the same cache space when using the Cache API
:::注意
In trusted mode, Workers can potentially access cached 响应s from other Workers in the 命名空间. Only enable this if you control all Worker code or have appropriate cache 键 isolation strategies.
To convert a 命名空间 from untrusted to trusted:

If you enable trusted mode for a 命名空间 that al读取y has 部署ed Workers, you'll need to re部署 those Workers for the  对象 to become available. Any 新功能 Workers you 部署 after enabling trusted mode will automatically have access to it.
If you need access to  but want to maintain cache isolation between customers, use customer-specific cache 键s or the Cache API with isolated 键s.

/cloudflare-one/access-controls/policies.title: Policies
headings: Require 规则 with OR operators
paragraphs: Cloudflare Access determines who can reach your application by applying the Access policies you configure.
Every Access policy has four 构建ing blocks:
**操作s**: What happens when a user matches the policy (Allow, Block, Bypass, or Service Auth)
**规则 类型s**: How criteria are combined (Include, Require, or Exclude)
**Selectors**: The attributes being checked (for 示例, email 域名, country, or device posture)
**值s**: The specific 值s to match against (for 示例, )
操作s let you grant or deny permission to a certain user or user group. You can set only one 操作 per policy.
The Allow 操作 allows users that meet certain criteria to reach an application behind Access.
The following 示例 lets any user with an  email address, as validated against an IdP, reach the application:
You can add a Require 规则 in the same policy 操作 to enforce additional checks. Finally, if the policy contains an Exclude 规则, users meeting that definition are pr事件ed from reaching the application.
For 示例, this second 配置 lets any user from Portugal with a  email address, as validated against an IdP, reach the application, except for  and :
The Block 操作 pr事件 users who meet certain critera from reaching an application behind Access. For 示例, the following policy blocks 请求s from Russian source IPs that are not on your 列表 of approved IPs.

Block policies are best used in conjunction with Allow policies as a way to carve out exceptions in those Allow policies. Since Access is deny by 默认, users who do not match a Block policy will still be denied access unless they explicitly match an Allow policy.
:::注意[警告]

Bypass does not enforce any Access 安全 controls and 请求s are not logged. Bypass policies should be 测试ed before 部署ing to production. Consider using Service Auth if you would like to enforce policies and maintain logging without requiring user 身份验证.

As Bypass does not enforce Access 安全 controls, Bypass policies do not 支持 identity-based 规则 类型s. When making Bypass policies, you will not be able to apply certain identity-based selectors (such as email).
The Bypass 操作 disables any Access enforcement for traffic that meets the defined 规则 criteria. Bypass is typically used to enable applications that require specific 端点 to be public.
For 示例, some applications have an 端点 under the  路由 that must be publicly rou表. In this situation, you could 创建 an Access application for the 域名  and add the following Bypass policy:

As part of implementing a Zero Trust 安全 model, Cloudflare does not recommend using Bypass to grant direct permanent access to your internal applications. To enable seamless and secure access for on-network employees, use Cloudflare Tunnel to connect your private network and have users connect through the Cloudflare One Client.
:::注意

When applying a Bypass 操作, 安全 设置 revert to the 默认s configured for the 区域 and any configured Page 规则. If Always use HTTPS is 已启用 for the site, then traffic to the bypassed destination continues in HTTPS. If Always use HTTPS is 已禁用, traffic is HTTP.

Bypass policies which contain device posture check 规则 will not 函数 when Zaraz is 已启用 for the 区域 protected by Access, or if a Worker intercepts the 请求. To work around this limitation and bypass Access, change the policy 操作 to Service Auth.
Service Auth 规则 enforce 身份验证 flows that do not require an identity provider IdP login, such as service 令牌s and mutual TLS.

规则 类型s determine how your criteria are combined to evaluate a user. All Access policies must contain at least one Include 规则. This Include 规则 defines the initial pool of eligible users who can access an application. You can then add Exclude and Require 规则 to narrow the scope.
By 默认, mul提示le 值s in a Require 规则 are joined with AND logic. This can produce unexpected results.
示例 problem: You want to allow employees and contractors in Portugal or the United States. If you configure:
This policy requires the user to be in the United States AND Portugal simultaneously, and have an email ending in both  AND . No user can satisfy all 条件s, so no正文 获取s access.
Solution: Use a 规则 group to convert AND logic to OR logic within a Require 规则.
创建 a 规则 group called  that includes users in Portugal OR the United States:
创建 a policy that requires the 规则 group and includes users with either email 域名:

When you add a 规则 to your policy, you will be asked to specify the criteria/attributes you want users to meet. These attributes are available for all Access application 类型s, including SaaS, self-hosted, and non-HTTP applications.

Non-identity attributes are polled continuously, meaning they are evaluated with each 新功能 HTTP 请求 for changes during the user 会话. If you have configured SCIM provisioning, you can force a user to re-at测试 all attributes with Access whenever you revoke the user in the IdP or 更新 their IdP group membership.
1  For SaaS applications, Access can only enforce policies at the time
of initial sign on and when reissuing the SaaS 会话. Once the user has
authenticated to the SaaS app, 会话 management falls solely within the
purview of the SaaS app.

Connection context 设置 allow you to control how users interact with an application after they have been granted access. While selectors determine who can access an application, connection context 设置 determine what 操作s users can take during their 会话.

Connection context is configured per policy, allowing you to grant different 权限 to different groups of users. For 示例, you could allow full-time employees to copy data from a remote RDP 会话 while restricting contractors to 读取-only access.
The available connection context 设置 depend on the application 类型:
Policies are not evaluated strictly in the order they appear in the UI. Instead, Access groups policies by 操作 类型 and evaluates them in two phases:
**Phase 1** — All **Bypass** and **Service Auth** policies are evaluated first, from top to bottom.

**Phase 2** — All **Allow** and **Block** policies are evaluated in order, from top to bottom. Once a user matches an Allow or Block policy, evaluation stops and no subsequent policies can override the decision.
For 示例, if you have policies arranged as follows:
Allow A
Block B
Service Auth C
Bypass D
Allow E
The actual evaluation order is: Service Auth C > Bypass D > Allow A > Block B > Allow E.
If you add any of the following 规则 to an Allow policy, anyone will be able to access your application.
API and Terraform provide programmatic ways to manage your Access policies and 配置s.

/cloudflare-one/data-loss-prevention/.title: Data loss pr事件ion
paragraphs: :::注意[可用性]
Available as an add-on to Zero Trust 企业计划s.
Users on Zero Trust Free and Pay-as-you-go plans can use the Financial 信息rmation and Social 安全, Insurance, Tax, and Identifier 数字s predefined profiles, payload logging, and false positive reporting.
DLP scans HTTP traffic, SaaS application files, and AI prompts for sensitive data such as credit card 数字s, credentials, and personally identifiable 信息rmation.

Cloudflare does not write scanned content to disk. DLP encrypts and temporarily stores content in memory only. To retain matched content for review, configure payload logging for encrypted payload copies or a Logpush destination to export full matching HTTP 请求s.

Data Loss Pr事件ion complements Secure Web Gateway to detect sensitive data transferred in HTTP 请求s. DLP scans the HTTP 正文 (excluding 头部), which may include uploaded or downloaded files, chat 消息s, forms, and other web content. You can also use DLP with Email 安全 to scan outbound emails.

DLP requires Gateway HTTP 过滤 with TLS 解密 to 读取 the contents of HTTPS traffic in transit. The depth of visibility varies for each site or application. DLP does not scan any traffic that bypasses Cloudflare Gateway (such as traffic that matches a Do Not Inspect policy).
To 快速开始, refer to Scan HTTP traffic with DLP.

Data Loss Pr事件ion complements Cloudflare CASB (Cloud Access 安全 Broker) to detect sensitive data stored in your SaaS applications. CASB connects directly to SaaS application APIs to retrieve and scan files, rather than 读取ing files as they pass through Cloudflare Gateway. Because of this, Gateway and Cloudflare One Client 设置 (such as Do Not Inspect policies and Split Tunnel 配置s) do not affect data at rest scans.
To 快速开始, refer to Scan SaaS applications with DLP.

Data Loss Pr事件ion integrates with Cloudflare AI Gateway to scan AI prompts and 响应s for sensitive data. When DLP is 已启用 on an AI Gateway, it inspects the text content of 请求s sent to AI providers and 响应s returned from AI models, without requiring Gateway HTTP 过滤 or TLS 解密.
To 快速开始, refer to 设置 DLP for AI Gateway.
For help resolving common issues with DLP, refer to Troubleshoot DLP.
DLP 支持s reporting and scanning the following file 类型s:
Text and CSV
Microsoft Office 2007 and later (,  ), including Microsoft 365
PDF
ZIP files containing the above
DLP will scan the text contained in text, Microsoft Office, and PDF files.

DLP can scan files less than or equal to 100 MB in size. ZIP files can be recursively compressed a maximum of 10 times, and each content file within the ZIP file must be less than or equal to 200 MB in uncompressed size.

/cloudflare-one/.description: Learn how to secure self-hosted and SaaS applications with Cloudflare One. Configure a unified 控制面板 for seamless access and 安全.

Secure your organization with Cloudflare One — a cloud 安全 平台 that replaces legacy perimeters with Cloudflare's 全球网络.
Cloudflare One is Cloudflare's Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) 平台. SASE is an architectural model that unifies enterprise networking services with Zero Trust 安全.

Zero Trust is a 安全 model designed around the principle of least privilege. In the past, once you logged into a corporate network, you were "trusted" to move around freely. Zero Trust changes that. It assumes that threats can exist both outside and inside the network. Therefore, every 请求 is authenticated and authorized based on identity and context before granting access.

The Cloudflare One 平台 allows organizations to move away from a patchwork of hardware appliances and point solutions. Instead, it consolidates 安全 and networking through a unified control plane that includes products like Cloudflare Access, Secure Web Gateway (SWG), Cloudflare Tunnel, Data Loss Pr事件ion (DLP), Remote Browser Isolation (RBI), Cloud Access 安全 Broker (CASB), and Email 安全.
Refer to our SASE 参考 architecture to learn how to plan, 部署, and manage SASE architecture with Cloudflare.
快速开始
Cloudflare One 控制面板
Implementation 指南
Authenticate users accessing your applications, seamlessly onboard third-party users, and log every 事件 and 请求.

Securely connect your 资源 to Cloudflare without exposing a public IP by using Cloudflare Tunnel, which establishes outbound-only connections from your infrastructure to Cloudflare's 全球网络 via the lightweight  daemon.

Inspect and 过滤器 DNS, network, HTTP, and egress traffic to enforce your company's Accep表 Use Policy (UAP), block risky sites with custom block列表s and threat intelligence, and enhance visibility and protection across SaaS applications.
Protect corporate devices by privately sending traffic from those devices to Cloudflare's 全球网络, 构建 device posture 规则, and enforce 安全 policies anywhere.
Mitigate the impact of attacks by executing all browser code in the cloud and securely browse high-risk or sensitive websites in a remote browser.

Protect users and sensitive data at rest in SaaS applications and cloud environments, scan for mis配置s, and detect insider threats as well as unsanctioned application usage to pr事件 data leaks and compliance violations.
Scan your web traffic and SaaS applications for the presence of sensitive data such as social 安全 数字s, financial 信息rmation, 密钥 键s, and source code.
Configure policies to manage your inbox, automatically move emails based on disposition, and use screen criteria to investigate 消息s.
监控 device, network, and application 性能 across your Zero Trust organization.

series.

/cloudflare-one/email-security/.title: Email 安全

Refer to Area 1 if you are looking for the Area 1 文档.

Protect your email inbox with Email 安全.

Cloudflare Email 安全 uses AI, threat intelligence, and 安全 规则 to analyze every incoming email, protecting your organization from phishing, malware, Business Email Compromise (where attackers impersonate executives or authority figures to commit fraud), vendor email fraud, and spam.
It integrates with your existing email provider (such as Outlook or Gmail) and can be 部署ed via API, BCC/Journaling, or MX/Inline.
When you complete the 设置 process, the Cloudflare 控制面板 will display the Email 安全 概述 page.

/cloudflare-one/networks/connectors/clou.title: Cloudflare Tunnel
paragraphs: :::注意[Looking to expose public applications?]

This 文档 covers Cloudflare Tunnel 使用场景 for private networking and Zero Trust, like VPN replacement and private network access. For publishing public web applications, APIs, and services to the Internet through Cloudflare refer to the Cloudflare Tunnel 文档.

Cloudflare Tunnel provides you with a secure way to connect your 资源 to Cloudflare without a publicly rou表 IP address. With Tunnel, you do not send traffic to an external IP — instead, a lightweight daemon in your infrastructure () 创建s outbound-only connections to Cloudflare's 全球网络. Cloudflare Tunnel can connect HTTP web servers, SSH servers, remote desktops, and other 协议s safely to Cloudflare. This way, your 源s can serve traffic through Cloudflare without being vulnerable to attacks that bypass Cloudflare.
Refer to our 参考 architecture for details on how to implement Cloudflare Tunnel into your existing infrastructure.

establishes outbound connections (隧道s) between your 资源 and Cloudflare's 全球网络. A tunnel is a persistent 对象 identified by a UUID — it serves as the logical link between your 源 and Cloudflare. Within the same tunnel, you can run as many  processes (连接器s) as needed. Each 连接器 sends traffic to the nearest Cloudflare 数据中心.

Cloudflare Tunnel uses an outbound-only connection model to enable bidirectional communication. When you 安装 and run ,  initiates an outbound connection through your 防火墙 from the 源 to the Cloudflare 全球网络.

Once the connection is established, traffic flows in both directions over the tunnel between your 源 and Cloudflare. Most 防火墙s allow outbound traffic by 默认.  takes advantage of this standard by connecting out to the Cloudflare network from the server you 安装ed  on. You can then configure your 防火墙 to allow only these outbound connections and block all inbound traffic, effectively blocking access to your 源 from anything other than Cloudflare. This 设置 ensures that all traffic to your 源 is securely 路由d through the tunnel.
创建 a tunnel using the Cloudflare 控制面板 or API.
Download , the server-side daemon that connects your infrastructure to Cloudflare.
Review useful Tunnel terms to familiarize yourself with the concepts used in Tunnel 文档.

/cloudflare-one/remote-browser-isolation.title: Remote browser isolation
paragraphs: Cloudflare Browser Isolation complements the Secure Web Gateway and Zero Trust Network Access solutions by executing 活跃 webpage content in a secure isolated browser. Executing 活跃 content remotely from the 端点 protects users from zero-day attacks and malware. In addition to protecting 端点, Browser Isolation also protects users from phishing attacks by pr事件ing user input on risky websites and controlling data transmission to sensitive web applications. You can further 过滤器 isolated traffic with Gateway HTTP and DNS policies.

Remote browsing is invisible to the user who continues to use their browser normally without changing their preferred browser and habits. Every open tab and window is automatically isolated. When the user closes the isolated browser, their 会话 is automatically 删除d.
:::注意
Available as an add-on to Zero Trust Pay-as-you-go and 企业计划s.

Cloudflare Browser Isolation is a 安全 product. In order to serve transparent isolated browsing and block web based threats our network decrypts Internet traffic using the Cloudflare root CA. Traffic 日志 are retained as per the Zero Trust 文档.
For help resolving common issues with Browser Isolation, refer to Troubleshoot Browser Isolation.
