paragraphs: In this 指南, you will 快速开始 with Cloudflare Images and make your first API 请求.
Before you make your first API 请求, ensure that you have a Cloudflare 账户 ID and an API 令牌.
Refer to Find 区域 and 账户 IDs for help locating your 账户 ID and 创建 an API 令牌 to learn how to 创建 an access your API 令牌.
You can dynamically optimize images that are stored outside of Cloudflare Images and deliver them using 转换ation URLs.
Cloudflare will automatically cache every 转换ed image on our 全球网络 so that you store only the 源al image at your 源.
To enable 转换ations on your 区域:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **转换ations** page.
Go to the specific 区域 where you want to enable 转换ations.
Select **Enable for 区域**. This will allow you to optimize and deliver remote images.
:::注意
With Resize images from any 源 unchecked, only the initial URL passed will be checked. Any 重定向 returned will be followed, including if it leaves the 区域, and the resulting image will be 转换ed.

If you are using 转换ations in a Worker, you need to include the appropriate logic in your Worker code to pr事件 resizing images from any 源. Unchecking this option in the dash does not apply to 转换ation 请求s coming from Cloudflare Workers.

/images/.title: Cloudflare Images
/images/.description: 流line your image infrastructure with Cloudflare Images. Store, 转换, and deliver images efficiently using Cloudflare's 全球网络.
paragraphs: Store, 转换, optimize, and deliver images at scale
Cloudflare Images provides an end-to-end solution designed to help you 流line your image infrastructure from a single API and runs on Cloudflare's 全球网络.
There are two different ways to use Images:
**Efficiently store and deliver images.** You can upload images into Cloudflare Images and dynamically deliver mul提示le variants of the same 源al image.
**Optimize images that are stored outside of Images** You can make 转换ation 请求s to optimize any publicly available image on the Internet.
Cloudflare Images is available on both Free and 付费计划. By 默认, all users have access to the Images 免费计划, which includes limited usage of the 转换ations 特性 to optimize images in remote sources.
:::注意[Image Resizing is now available as 转换ations]
All Image Resizing 特性 are available as 转换ations with Images. Each unique 转换ation is billed only once per calendar month.
If you are using a legacy plan with Image Resizing, visit the 控制面板 to switch to an Images plan.
Use Cloudflare’s 边缘网络 to store your images.
Accept uploads directly and securely from your users by generating a one-time 令牌.
Add up to 100 variants to specify how images should be resized for various 使用场景.
Control access to your images by using signed URL 令牌s.
Engage with other users and the Images team on Cloudflare 支持 forum.

/images/pricing/.title: 定价
paragraphs: By 默认, all users are on the Images 免费计划. The 免费计划 includes access to the 转换ations 特性, which lets you optimize images stored outside of Images, like in R2.
The Paid plan allows 转换ations, as well as access to storage in Images.
定价 is dependent on which 特性 you use. The 表 below shows which 指标 are used for each use case.
On the 免费计划, you can 请求 up to 5,000 unique 转换ations each month for free.
Once you exceed 5,000 unique 转换ations:
Existing 转换ations in cache will continue to be served as expected.
新功能 转换ations will return a  错误. If your source image is from the same 域名 where the 转换ation is served, then you can use the  parameter to 重定向 to the 源al image.
You will not be charged for exceeding the 限制 in the 免费计划.
To 请求 more than 5,000 unique 转换ations each month, you can purchase an Images Paid plan.
When you purchase an Images Paid plan, you can choose your own storage or add storage in Images.
If you optimize an image stored outside of Images, then you will be billed only for Images 转换ed.

Alternatively, Images Stored and Images Delivered apply only to images that are stored in your Images 存储桶. When you optimize an image that is stored in Images, then this counts toward Images Delivered — not Images 转换ed.
A unique 转换ation is a 请求 to 转换 an 源al image based on a set of 支持的 参数. This metric is used only when optimizing images that are stored outside of Images.
When using the Images 绑定 in Workers, every call to the 绑定 counts as a 转换ation, regardless of whether the image or 参数 are unique.
For 示例, if you 转换  as 100x100, then this counts as one unique 转换ation. If you 转换 the same  as 200x200, then this counts as a separate unique 转换ation.
You are billed on the 数字 of unique 转换ations that are 请求ed within each calendar month. Repeat 请求s for the same 转换ation within the same month are counted only once for that month.

The  parameter counts as only one billable 转换ation, even if mul提示le copies of an image are served. In other words, if  is served to some users as AVIF and to others as WebP, then this counts as one unique 转换ation instead of two.
If you serve 2,000 remote images in five different sizes each month, then this results in 10,000 unique 转换ations. Your estimated cost for the month would be:
If you use R2 for storage then your estimated monthly costs will be the sum of your monthly Images costs and monthly R2 costs.
For 示例, if you upload 5,000 images to R2 with an average size of 5 MB, and serve 2,000 of those images in five different sizes, then your estimated cost for the month would be:
Storage in Images is available only with an Images Paid plan. You can purchase storage in increments of $5 for every 100,000 images stored per month.
You can 创建 predefined variants to specify how an image should be resized, such as  as 100x100 and  as 1600x500.
Only uploaded images count toward Images Stored; defining variants will not impact your storage limit.
For images that are stored in Images, you will incur $1 for every 100,000 images delivered per month. This metric does not include 转换ed images that are stored in remote sources.
Every image 请求ed by the browser counts as one billable 请求.
A retail website has a product page that uses Images to serve 10 images. If the page was visited 10,000 times this month, then this results in 100,000 images delivered — or $1.00 in billable usage.
[^1]: 5,000 对象s × 5 MB per 对象
[^2]: 5,000 对象s × 1 write per 对象
[^3]: 2,000 对象s × 5 读取s per 对象
[^4]: 2,000 源al images × 5 sizes
[^5]: 2,000 源al images × 5 sizes
[^8]: 0 ×	$4.50 / million 请求s
[^9]: 0 ×	$0.36 / million 请求s

Select **键s**.
Copy your 键 and use it to generate an expiring 令牌ized URL.
:::注意
Private images do not currently 支持 custom paths.

Signed URLs are generated server-side to protect your signing 键. The 示例 below uses a Cloudflare Worker, but the same signing logic can be implemented in any backend environment (Node.js, Python, PHP, Go, etc.).
The Worker accepts a regular Images URL and returns a signed URL that expires after one day. Adjust the  值 to set a different expiry period.
Never hardcode your signing 键 in source code. Store it as a 密钥 using [](/workers/wrangler/commands/general/#密钥) and access it via the  parameter. For more 信息rmation, refer to 密钥.

/images/transform-images/.title: 转换 images
paragraphs: 转换ations let you optimize and manipulate images stored outside of the Cloudflare Images product. 转换ed images are served from one of your 区域s on Cloudflare.
To 转换 an image, you must enable 转换ations for your 区域.
You can 转换 an image by using a specially-formatted URL or through Workers.
Learn about 定价 and 限制 for image 转换ation.
JPEG
PNG
GIF (including animations)
WebP (including animations)
SVG
HEIC
:::注意
Cloudflare can ingest HEIC images for decoding, but they must be served in web-safe formats such as AVIF, WebP, JPG, or PNG.
AVIF
转换ations can:
Resize and generate JPEG and PNG images, and 可选ly AVIF or WebP.
Save animations as GIF or animated WebP.
支持 ICC color profiles in JPEG and PNG images.
Preserve JPEG metadata (metadata of other formats is discarded).
Convert the first frame of GIF/WebP animations to a still image.
Since some image formats require longer computational times than others, Cloudflare has to find a proper balance between the time it takes to generate an image and to transfer it over the Internet.

Resizing 请求s might not be fulfilled with the format the user expects due to these trade-offs Cloudflare has to make. Images differ in size, 转换ations, codecs and all of these different aspects influence what compression codecs are used.
Cloudflare tries to choose the 请求ed codec, but we operate on a best-effort basis and there are 限制 that our system needs to follow to satisfy all customers.
AVIF encoding, in particular, can be an order of magnitude slower than encoding to other formats. Cloudflare will fall back to WebP or JPEG if the image is too large to be encoded quickly.
Hard 限制 refers to the maximum image size to process. Soft 限制 refers to the 限制 existing when the system is overloaded.
1 Hard limit is 1,600 pixels when  is explicitly used
with image 转换ations.
All images have to be less than 70 MB. The maximum image area is limited to 100 megapixels (for 示例, 10,000 x 10,000 pixels large).

GIF/WebP animations are limited to a total of 50 megapixels (the sum of sizes of all frames). Animations that exceed this will be passed through unchanged without applying any 转换ations. 注意 that GIF is an outdated format and has very inefficient compression. High-resolution animations will be slow to process and will have very large file sizes. For video clips, Cloudflare recommends using video formats like MP4 and WebM instead.
:::注意[重要]
SVG files are passed through without resizing. This format is inherently scalable and does not need resizing.
AVIF format is 支持的 on a best-effort basis. Images that cannot be compressed as AVIF will be served as WebP instead.
While you can use the  option to generate images in an interlaced progressive JPEG format, we will 回退 to the baseline JPEG format for small and large images specified when:
The area calculated by width x height is less than 150 x 150.
The area calculated by width x height is greater than 3000 x 3000.
For 示例, a 50 x 50 tiny image is always formatted by  even if you specify progressive jpeg ().

/images/upload-images/.title: Upload images
paragraphs: Cloudflare Images allows developers to upload images using different 方法, for a wide range of 使用场景.
You can upload the following image formats to Cloudflare Images:
PNG
GIF (including animations)
JPEG
WebP (Cloudflare Images also 支持s uploading animated WebP files)
SVG
HEIC
:::注意
Cloudflare can ingest HEIC images for decoding, but they must be served in web-safe formats such as AVIF, WebP, JPG, or PNG.
These are the maximum allowed sizes and dimensions when uploading to Images:
Maximum image dimension is 12,000 pixels.
Maximum image area is limited to 100 megapixels (for 示例, 10,000×10,000 pixels).
Image metadata is limited to 1024 bytes (when uploaded and stored in Cloudflare).
Images have a 10 megabyte (MB) size limit (when uploaded and stored in Cloudflare).
Animated GIFs/WebP, including all frames, are limited to 50 megapixels (MP).

/key-transparency/.title: 键 Transparency Auditor
paragraphs: Secure the distribution of public 键s in your end-to-end encrypted (E2EE) messaging systems

Cloudflare's 键 Transparency Auditor aims to secure the distribution of public 键s for end-to-end encrypted (E2EE) messaging systems like WhatsApp. It achieves this by 构建ing a verifiable append-only data structure called a Log, similar to 证书 Transparency.

Cloudflare acts as an auditor of 键 Transparency 日志 to ensure the transparency of end-to-end encrypted messaging public 键s. Cloudflare provides an API for anyone to 监控 the verification work we perform, and verify the state of its associated 日志 locally.
证书 Transparency (CT) 监控 is an opt-in 特性 in public 测试版 that aims to improve 安全 by allowing you to double-check any SSL/TLS 证书s issued for your 域名.

Privacy Gateway is a managed service 部署ed on Cloudflare's 全球网络 that implements part of the Oblivious HTTP (OHTTP) IETF standard. The goal of Privacy Gateway and Oblivious HTTP is to hide the client's IP address when interacting with an application backend.

If there is no metadata associated with the 请求ed 键-值 对,  will be returned for metadata.
To 获取 the 值s for a given set of 键s along with their metadata, call the  method on any KV 命名空间 you have bound to your Worker code with:
The 类型 of the metadata will just depend on what is stored, which can be either a 字符串 or an 对象.

For simple 值s, use the 默认  类型 which provides you with your 值 as a . For convenience, a  类型 is also specified which will convert a JSON 值 into an 对象 before returning the 对象 to you. For large 值s, use  to 请求 a . For binary 值s, use  to 请求 an .
For large 值s, the choice of  can have a noticeable effect on 延迟 and CPU usage. For 参考, the  can be ordered from fas测试 to slowest as , , , and .
is a parameter that defines the length of time in seconds that a KV result is cached in the 全球网络 location it is accessed from.
Defining the length of time in seconds is useful for reducing cold 读取 延迟 on 键s that are 读取 relatively infrequently.  is useful if your data is write-once or write-rarely.
:::注意[Hot and cold 读取]

A hot 读取 means that the data is cached on Cloudflare's 边缘网络 using the CDN, whether it is in a local cache or a regional cache. A cold 读取 means that the data is not cached, so the data must be fetched from the central stores. Both existing 键-值 对s and non-existent 键-值 对s (also known as negative lookups) are cached at the edge.

is not recommended if your data is 已更新 often and you need to see 更新s shortly after they are written, because writes that happen from other 全球网络 locations will not be visible until the cached 值 expires.
The  parameter must be an integer greater than or equal to .  is the 默认. The maximum 值 for  is [](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/参考/Global_对象s/数字/MAX_SAFE_INTEGER).

Once a 键 has been 读取 with a given  in a region, it will remain cached in that region until the end of the  or eviction. This affects regional and central tiers of KV's built-in 缓存 layers. When writing to Workers KV, the regions in the regional and central 缓存 layers internal to KV will 获取 revalidated with the 新功能ly written result.
Workers are limited to 1,000 operations to external services per 调用. This applies to Workers KV, as documented in Workers KV 限制.
To 阅读更多 than 1,000 键s per operation, you can use the bulk 读取 operations to 读取 mul提示le 键s in a single operation. These count as a single operation against the 1,000 operation limit.

If you have a set of 相关 键-值 对s that have a mixed usage pattern (some hot 键s and some cold 键s), consider coalescing them. By coalescing cold 键s with hot 键s, cold 键s will be cached alongside hot 键s which can provide faster 读取s than if they were uncached as individual 键s.
One coalescing technique is to make all the 键s and 值s part of a super 键-值 对象. An 示例 is shown below.
becomes
By coalescing the 值s, the cold 键s benefit from being kept warm in the cache because of access patterns of the warmer 键s.
This works best if you are not expecting the need to 更新 the 值s independently of each other, which can pose race 条件s.
**Advantage**: Infrequently accessed 键s are kept in the cache.
**Disadvantage**: Size of the resultant 值 can push your Worker out of its memory 限制. Safely updating the 值 requires a locking mechanism of some kind.
You can 读取 键-值 对s from the command line with Wrangler and from the REST API.

headings: When writing via KV's REST API, how are writes charged?
Do queries I issue from the 控制面板 or wrangler (the CLI) count as billable usage?
Does Workers KV charge for data transfer / egress?
paragraphs: Each 键-值 对 in the  请求 is counted as a single write, identical to how each call to  in the Workers API counts as a write. Writing 5,000 键s via the REST API incurs the same write costs as making 5,000  calls in a Worker.
Yes, any operations via the Cloudflare 控制面板 or wrangler, including updating (writing) 键s, deleting 键s, and 列表ing the 键s in a 命名空间 count as billable KV usage.
No.
All operations incur charges, including fetches for non-existent 键s that return a  (Workers API) or  (REST API). These operations still traverse KV's infrastructure.

/load-balancing/additional-options/load-.title: Custom load balancing 规则
paragraphs: As with WAF custom 规则, each load balancing custom 规则 is a combination of two elements: an 表达式 and an 操作. 表达式s define the criteria for an HTTP 请求 to 触发器 an 操作. The 操作 tells Cloudflare how to handle the 请求.
You can 创建 Load Balancing 规则 whenever you 创建 or edit a 负载均衡器 in Load Balancing.
When 构建ing 表达式s for Load Balancing 规则, refer to 支持的 字段s and operators for definitions and usage.
By 默认, non-Enterprise customers have one Load Balancing 规则 per 负载均衡器 主机名. For more 规则, upgrade to Enterprise.
At the moment, you cannot use Load Balancing 规则 with Cloudflare Spectrum.
Custom load balancing 规则 are incompatible with Geo steering. As a result, any custom 规则 applied to Geo-steered 负载均衡器s will not 函数 as expected.

/load-balancing/reference/.title: 参考
paragraphs: See the following pages for more 信息rmation about Cloudflare Load Balancing:

/load-balancing/monitors/.title: 监控s
paragraphs: Health 监控 请求s that result in a status change for an 端点 are 记录ed as 事件 in the Load Balancing 事件 日志.
:::注意
Health 监控s associated with 负载均衡器s are different from standalone 健康检查. For an 概述 of how the Cloudflare Load Balancing solution works, refer to Load Balancing components.
For an up-to-date 列表 of 监控 properties, refer to 监控 properties in our API 文档.
For 步骤-by-步骤 guidance, refer to 创建 监控s.

监控 Groups let you combine mul提示le health 监控s into a single logical group to 创建 more accurate, intelligent 健康检查 for your applications. By aggregating results from several 监控s, you can better reflect real application health and improve traffic steering resilience. For more details, refer to the 监控 Groups 文档 page.
When you attach a 监控 to a pool, you can select mul提示le regions to increase reporting accuracy.
The host 头部 used on health 监控 请求s can be configured either on the 监控 itself or on the 端点 within a pool.
When a host 头部 is specified both on the 监控 and on the 端点, the host 头部 configured on the 端点 takes precedence over the host 头部 configured on the 监控.
When no host 头部 is specified, Cloudflare uses the 端点 Address configured on the 端点 as the host 头部 for the health 监控 请求s.
For more details, refer to Override HTTP Host 头部.
The Cloudflare API 支持s the following commands for 监控s. 示例 are given for user-level 端点 but apply to the 账户-level 端点 as well.
The following 表 summarizes the different 类型s of 监控s available in Cloudflare Load Balancing, their 监控 类型s, and how each 健康检查 process evaluates the 成功 criteria to determine 端点 health:

/load-balancing/understand-basics/traffi.title: Traffic steering
paragraphs: When 请求s come to your 负载均衡器, it distributes them across your pools and 端点 according to three factors:
Pool and 端点 health: Traffic decisions start with which pools and 端点 are available and should receive traffic.
Global traffic steering: Policies set on your 负载均衡器 that 路由 traffic to attached and available pools.
Local traffic steering: These are policies set on each pool that 路由 traffic to available 端点 within the pool.
When a pool or 端点 becomes unhealthy, your 负载均衡器 and pools redistribute traffic according to these same policies.

/load-balancing/.title: Cloudflare Load Balancing
paragraphs: Maximize application 性能 and 可用性
Cloudflare Load Balancing distributes traffic across your  端点 , which reduces 端点 strain and 延迟 and improves the experience for end users.
Distribute traffic evenly across your healthy 端点, automatically failing over when an 端点 is unhealthy or unresponsive.
监控 your 端点 at configurable intervals and across mul提示le 数据中心 to look for specific 状态码, 响应 text, and 超时s.
Choose whether to distribute 请求s based on 端点 延迟, a visitor's geographic region, or even a visitor's GPS coordinates.
Customize the behavior of your 负载均衡器 based on the characteristics of individual 请求s.
Review comprehensive 分析 to evaluate traffic flow, assess 端点 health status, and review changes in pools and pool health over time.
活跃ly 监控 whether your 源服务器 is online by sending specific 请求s at regular intervals.
获取 enterprise-grade authoritative DNS service with the fas测试 响应 time, unparalleled redundancy, and advanced 安全 with built-in DDoS mitigation and DNSSEC.
路由 excess users to a custom-branded waiting room, helping preserve customer experience and protect 源服务器s from being overwhelmed with 请求s.

/load-balancing/load-balancers/.title: 负载均衡器s
headings: Public vs. Private 负载均衡器s
Load balancing and existing DNS 记录s
paragraphs: :::注意
For an 概述 of how the Cloudflare Load Balancing solution works, refer to Load Balancing components. For more background 信息rmation on what 负载均衡器s are, refer to the Cloudflare Learning Center.
For suggestions, refer to Common 负载均衡器 配置s.

Public 负载均衡器s are designed to handle traffic from the public Internet. When 部署ed, they automatically receive a 主机名, making them immediately accessible. These 负载均衡器s can direct traffic to a range of destinations, including public 主机名s, public IP addresses, and private IP addresses.

Private 负载均衡器s, in contrast, are meant for internal use within private networks. They do not automatically receive a 主机名, but one can be assigned via Gateway 防火墙 Policies or through an internal DNS system. Private 负载均衡器s only accept traffic over a private network on-ramp, such as the Cloudflare One Client or Cloudflare WAN. They are capable of forwarding traffic exclusively to private IP addresses.
For details about DNS 记录s, refer to DNS 记录s for load balancing.
Cloudflare maintains keep-alive connections to improve 性能 and reduce cost of recurring TCP connects in the 请求 事务 as Cloudflare proxies customer traffic from its 边缘网络 to the site's 源.

Ensure HTTP Keep-Alive connections are 已启用 on your 源. Cloudflare reuses open TCP connections for up to 15 minutes (900 seconds) after the last HTTP 请求. 源 web servers close TCP connections if too many are open. HTTP Keep-Alive helps avoid premature reset of connections for 请求s proxied by Cloudflare.

When using HTTP Cookies to track and bind user 会话s to a specific server, configure 会话 Affinity to parse HTTP 请求s by Cookie 头部. Doing so directs each 请求 to the correct application server even when HTTP 请求s share the same TCP connection due to keep-alive.

For 示例, F5 BIG-IP 负载均衡器s set a 会话 Cookie at the beginning of a TCP connection (if none exists) and then ignore all Cookies from subsequent HTTP 请求s on the same TCP connection. This tends to break 会话 affinity because Cloudflare sends mul提示le HTTP 会话s on the same TCP connection. Configuring the 负载均衡器 to parse HTTP 请求s by Cookie 头部 avoids this issue.
For 步骤-by-步骤 guidance, refer to 创建 a 负载均衡器.
For an up-to-date 列表 of 负载均衡器 properties, refer to 负载均衡器 properties in the Cloudflare API 文档.
The Cloudflare API 支持s the following commands for 负载均衡器s.

/log-explorer/custom-dashboards/.title: Custom 控制面板s
headings: 创建 a 新功能 控制面板
创建 a 控制面板 from scratch
创建 a 新功能 chart
创建 a 控制面板 from a template
Edit a 控制面板 or chart
paragraphs: Custom 控制面板s allow you to 创建 tailored 控制面板s to 监控 application 安全, 性能, and usage. You can 创建 监控s for ongoing 监控 of a previous incident, use them to identify indicators of suspicious activity, and access templates to help you 快速开始.
:::注意
Enterprise customers can 创建 up to 100 控制面板s.
Customers on Pro and 商业计划s can 创建 up to 5 控制面板s.

控制面板s provide a visual interface that displays 键 指标 and 分析, helping you 监控 and analyze data efficiently. Different 控制面板s serve different purposes. For 示例, a 安全 控制面板 tracks attack attempts and threats, a 性能 控制面板 监控s API 延迟 and 正常运行时间, and a usage 控制面板 analyzes traffic patterns and user behavior.

Different 指标 serve distinct 角色 in providing insights into your application's 性能. For 示例, total HTTP 请求s offer an 概述 of traffic volume, while average 响应 time helps assess application speed. Additionally, usage 指标 such as traffic patterns and user behavior provide insight into how users interact with your application. These 指标 to获取her enable you to spot trends, identify problems, and make 信息rmed, data-driven decisions.
To 创建 a 新功能 控制面板, go to the Log Explorer > 控制面板s page.
When creating a 控制面板, you have two options: 构建ing one from scratch or using a pre-designed template.

A **templates** provide a faster way to 设置 a 控制面板 with commonly used 指标 and charts. They are useful for standard 使用场景, such as 监控 安全 threats, API 性能, or bot traffic. Templates help you 快速开始 quickly while still allowing modifications to fit your 要求.

On the other hand, **from-scratch 控制面板** gives you full control over its structure, allowing you to choose the exact datasets, 指标, and visualizations that fit your needs. This approach is ideal if you have specific 监控 goals or need a highly customized view of your data.
Choosing between these options depends on whether you need a quick 设置 with predefined insights or a fully customized 控制面板 tailored to your unique analysis needs.
When creating a 控制面板 from scratch, select the option 创建 新功能. You can follow the instructions in the following sections to start adding charts to your 控制面板.
To 创建 a 新功能 chart, select Add chart. There are two ways to 创建 a chart:
**Use a prompt**: Enter a 查询 like  The AI model decides the most appropriate visualization and constructs your chart 配置.
**Customize your chart**: Select the chart elements manually, including the chart 类型, title, dataset to 查询, 指标, and 过滤器s. This option gives you full control over your chart's structure.
Refer to the following sections for more 信息rmation about the charts, datasets, 字段s, 指标, and 过滤器s available.
The available chart 类型s include:
**Timeseries**: Displays trends over time, enabling comparisons across mul提示le series.
**Categorical**: Compares proportions across different series.
**Stat**: Highlights a single 值, showing its delta and sparkline for quick insights.
**Percentage**: Represents one 值 as a percentage of another.
**Top N**: Identifies the highest-ranking 值s for a given attribute.

The available 指标 and 过滤器s vary based on the dataset you want to use. For 示例, when using the HTTP 请求s dataset, you can select 源 响应 duration as a metric. You can then choose your preferred aggregation method for that metric, such as total, median, or quantiles. The following 表 outlines the datasets, 字段s, and available 指标:
You can also adjust the scope of your 分析 by entering 过滤器 条件s. This allows you to focus on the most relevant data.
Select **Add 过滤器**.
Select a **字段**, an **operator**, and a **值**. For 示例, to 过滤器 事件 by source IP address, select the _Source IP_ 字段, select the _equals_ operator, and enter the IP address.
Select **Apply**.
Alternatively, you can choose to 创建 your 控制面板 using a pre-designed 控制面板 template. The templates available are:
**Bot 监控**: Allows you to identify automated traffic accessing your website.
**API 安全**: Allows you to 监控 data transfers and exceptions for API 端点 in your application.
**账户 takeover**: Allows you to 监控 login attempts, usage of leaked credentials, and 账户 takeover attacks.
**API 性能**: Allows you to view timing data for API 端点 in your application, along with 错误 rates.
**性能 监控**: Allows you to identify slow hosts and paths on your 源服务器, and view time to first byte 指标 over time.
Choose one of the templates and select Use template.

After creating your 控制面板, to view your saved 控制面板s, select Back to all 控制面板s to access the full 列表. Regardless of the way you choose to 创建 your 控制面板, you can always edit existing charts and add 新功能 ones as needed.
For each chart, you can:
Review 相关 traffic in 安全 分析.
Explore detailed 日志 in Log 搜索.
This ensures deeper insights into your application's 安全, 性能, and usage patterns.

/log-explorer/.title: Log Explorer
paragraphs: Store and explore your Cloudflare 日志 directly within the Cloudflare 控制面板 or API.

Log Explorer is Cloudflare's native 可观测性 and forensics product that enables 安全 teams and developers to analyze, investigate, and 监控 issues directly from the Cloudflare 控制面板, without the expense and complexity of forwarding 日志 to third-party 工具.

Log Explorer provides access to Cloudflare 日志 with all the context available within the Cloudflare 平台. You can 监控 安全 and 性能 issues with custom 控制面板s or investigate and troubleshoot issues with log 搜索. 优势 include:
**Reduced cost and complexity**: Drastically reduce the expense and operational overhead associated with forwarding, storing, and analyzing terabytes of log data in external 工具.
**Faster detection and triage**: Access Cloudflare-native 日志 directly, eliminating cumbersome data 管道s and the ingest lags that delay critical 安全 insights.

**Accelerated investigations with full context**: Investigate incidents with Cloudflare's unparalleled contextual data, accelerating your analysis and understanding of "What exactly happened?" and "How did it happen?"
**Minimal recovery time**: Seamlessly transition from investigation to 操作 with direct mitigation capabilities via the Cloudflare 平台.

Contract customers can choose to store their 日志 in Log Explorer for up to two years, at an additional cost of $0.10 per GB per month. Customers interested in this 特性 can contact their 账户 team to have it added to their contract.
Access to Log Explorer 特性 is controlled through specific 权限. Each permission grants users the ability to perform certain 操作s, such as 查询ing 日志, managing datasets, or creating 控制面板s.
These 权限 apply across both the 控制面板 and the API, and must be granted at either the 账户 or 区域 level de待处理 on which datasets you need to access.
身份验证 with the API can be done via an API 令牌 or API 键 with an email. Refer to 创建 API 令牌 for further instructions.
Explore your Cloudflare 日志 directly within the Cloudflare 控制面板 or API.
Design customized views for tracking application 安全, 性能, and usage 指标.
Manage the data you want to store within Log Explorer.
Manage 配置 and perform queries via the API.
Forward Cloudflare 日志 to third-party 工具 for 调试, identifying 配置 adjustments, and creating 分析 控制面板s.
Visualize the metadata collected by our products in the Cloudflare 控制面板.

These 日志 are helpful for 调试, identifying 配置 adjustments, and creating 分析, especially when combined with 日志 from other sources, such as your application server. For 信息rmation about the 类型s of data Cloudflare collects, refer to Cloudflare's 类型s of 分析.

/logs/instant-logs/.title: Instant 日志
headings: Instant 日志 via Cloudflare 控制面板
1. 创建 an Instant 日志 作业
paragraphs: Instant 日志 allows Cloudflare customers to access a live stream of the traffic for their 域名 from the Cloudflare 控制面板 or from a command-line interface (CLI). Seeing data in real time allows you to investigate an attack, troubleshoot, 调试 or 测试 out changes made to your network. Instant 日志 is lightweight, simple to use and does not require any additional 设置.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Instant 日志** page.
Select **Start 流ing**.
(可选) Select **Add 过滤器** to narrow down the 事件 to be shown.
字段s 支持的 in our HTTP 请求s dataset can be used when you add 过滤器s. Some 字段s with additional subscriptions 必需 are not 支持的 in the 控制面板, you will need to use CLI instead.
Once a 过滤器 is selected and the stream has started, only log lines that match the 过滤器 criteria will appear. 过滤器s are not applied retro活跃ly to 日志 al读取y showing in the 控制面板.
创建 a 会话 by sending a  请求 to the Instant 日志 作业 端点 with the following 参数:
**字段s** - 列表 any 字段 available in the HTTP 请求s dataset.
**Sample** - The sample parameter is the sample rate of the 记录s set by the client:  is 100% of 记录s  is 10% and so on.
:::注意
Instant 日志 has a maximum data rate 支持的. For high volume 域名s, we sample server side as indicated in the  parameter returned in the 日志.
**过滤器s** - Use 过滤器s to drill down into specific 事件. 过滤器s consist of three parts: 键, operator and 值.
All 支持的 operators can be found in the 过滤器s page.
Below we have three 示例 of 过滤器s:

The 响应 will include a 新功能 字段 called destination_conf. The 值 of this 字段 is your unique WebSocket address that will receive 消息s from Cloudflare's 全球网络.
Using a CLI utility like Websocat, you can connect to the WebSocket and start immediately receiving 日志.
Once connected to the websocket, you will receive 消息s of line-delimited JSON.

Now that you have a connection to Cloudflare's websocket and are receiving 日志 from Cloudflare's 全球网络, you can start slicing and dicing the 日志. A handy tool for this is Angle Grinder. Angle Grinder lets you apply 过滤, 转换ations and aggregations on stdin with first class JSON 支持. For 示例, to 获取 the 数字 of visitors from each country you can sum the 数字 of 事件 by the  字段.
For the moment,  is the only dataset 支持的. In the future, we will expand to other datasets.
You can download the 表 of 日志 that appears in the 控制面板, in JSON format via the Export button.
Instant 日志 has three 限制 set in place:
Only one 活跃 Instant 日志 会话 per 区域.
Maximum 会话 time is 60 minutes.
If you stop 列表ening to a socket for more than five minutes.
If either of these 限制 are reached, the 日志 stream will automatically stop.
If you have any 特性 请求s or notice any bugs, share your 反馈 directly with us by joining the Cloudflare Developers 社区 on Discord.

/logs/logpush/.title: Logpush
headings: Quick sizing for HTTP 请求s
paragraphs: Logpush delivers 日志 in batches as quickly as possible, with no minimum batch size, potentially delivering files more than once per minute. This capability enables Cloudflare to provide 信息rmation almost in real time, in smaller file sizes.

The push frequency is automatic and cannot be adjusted—Cloudflare pushes 日志 in batches as soon as possible. However, users can configure the batch size using the API for improved control in case the log destination has specific 要求.
:::注意[重要 limitation]

Logpush only pushes 日志 once as they become available and cannot backfill historical data. If your 作业 is 已禁用 or fails, 日志 generated during that period are permanently lost. This is why configuring health 通知 is essential for early detection of issues.
Logpush does not offer storage or 搜索 函数ality for 日志; its primary aim is to send 日志 as quickly as they arrive.
Cloudflare Logpush 支持s pushing 日志 to storage services, SIEMs, and log management providers via the Cloudflare 控制面板 or API.
Cloudflare aims to 支持 additional services in the future. Interested in a particular service? Take this survey.
Before setting up a Logpush 作业, you can estimate the total volume of data that will be pushed to your destination. The volume depends on your traffic, selected 字段s, and compression.
A quick sizing estimate for an HTTP 请求s dataset:
~100–250 bytes per 请求 (compressed, de待处理 on 字段s selected)
1M 请求s/day → ~100–250 MB/day
30M 请求s/month → ~3–7.5 GB/month
100k req/day → ~25–50 MB/day
1M req/day → ~250–500 MB/day
10M req/day → ~2.5–5 GB/day
100M req/day → ~25–50 GB/day
These ranges reflect 字段 selection, compression, and whether you include extra 字段s or custom 字段s. Other datasets (防火墙, Workers, Load Balancing) add volume separately.
For precise estimates, you can sample your 日志 via Logpull using a 1-hour sample.
There is currently a max limit of 4 Logpush 作业s per 区域. Trying to 创建 a 作业 once the limit has been reached will result in an 错误 消息: .
:::注意
Users without an 企业计划 can still access Workers Trace 事件 Logpush by subscribing to the Workers Paid plan.

/logs/logpull/.title: Logpull
paragraphs: Cloudflare Logpull is a REST API for consuming 请求 日志 over HTTP. These 日志 contain data 相关 to the connecting client, the 请求 path through the Cloudflare network, and the 响应 from the 源 web server. This data is useful for enriching existing 日志 on an 源服务器. Logpull is available to customers on the 企业计划.
:::注意
Logpull is considered a legacy 特性 and we recommend using Logpush or 日志 Engine instead for better 性能 and 函数ality.
Review the following content to 了解更多 about Logpull.

Logpull is unavailable when the Customer Metadata Boundary (CMB) is set outside the US region. Specifically, it does not work when CMB is restricted to the EU-only setting. For more details, refer to the Cloudflare Data Localization 文档.

Secure your network and improve 性能 at Cloudflare scale.
Magic Transit is a network 安全 and 性能 solution that offers 分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) protection, traffic acceleration, and more for on-premises, cloud-hosted, and hybrid networks.

**DDoS mitigation and protection**: Instead of relying on local infrastructure that large DDoS attacks can overwhelm, Magic Transit uses the global Cloudflare Network to ingest and mitigate attacks close to their source.
**Traffic acceleration**: Magic Transit takes advantage of the Cloudflare 全球网络 to reduce 延迟 and ensure that 请求s always have a 数据中心 nearby.
了解更多 about how Magic Transit works and how to 快速开始.

/magic-transit/about/.title: About
paragraphs: Magic Transit is a network 安全 and 性能 solution that offers 分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) protection, traffic acceleration, and more for on-premise, cloud-hosted, and hybrid networks.

Magic Transit delivers its connectivity, 安全, and 性能 优势 by serving as the front door to your IP network. This means it accepts IP  packets  destined for your network, processes them, and then outputs them to your 源 infrastructure.

The Cloudflare network uses Border Gateway 协议 (BGP) to announce your company's IP address space, extending your network presence globally, and  anycast  to ingest your traffic. Today, Cloudflare's anycast 全球网络 spans hundreds of cities worldwide.

Once packets hit Cloudflare's network, Cloudflare inspects traffic for attacks, 过滤器s,  steers , accelerates, and sends it to your 源. Magic Transit connects to your 源 infrastructure using anycast  Generic 路由 Encapsulation (GRE)  隧道s over the Internet or, with Cloudflare Network Interconnect (CNI), through physical or virtual interconnect.

You have two options for your Magic Transit implementation: ingress traffic or ingress and egress traffic. With an egress implementation, you must 设置  policy-based 路由 (PBR)  or ensure 默认 路由 on your end forwards traffic to Cloudflare through 隧道s.
:::注意
Cloudflare's China Network does not yet 支持 Magic Transit.
For detailed 信息rmation on Magic Transit architecture, refer to the 参考 section.

/moq/.title: Media over QUIC at Cloudflare
paragraphs: MoQ (Media over QUIC) is a 协议 for delivering live media content using QUIC transport. It provides efficient, low-延迟 media 流ing by leveraging QUIC's mul提示lexing and connection management capabilities.
MoQ is designed to be an Internet infrastructure level service that provides media delivery to applications, similar to how HTTP provides content delivery and WebRTC provides real-time communication.
Cloudflare's implementation of MoQ currently 支持s a subset of the draft-07 MoQ Transport specfication.
For the most up-to-date 文档 on the 协议, please visit the IETF working group 文档.
What about Safari?

Safari does not yet have fully 函数al WebTransport 支持. Apple never publicly commits to timelines for 新功能 特性 like this. However, Apple has indicated their intent to 支持 WebTransport. An Apple employee is even a co-author of the WebTransport over HTTP/3 draft. Since Safari 18.4 (2025-03-31), an early (not yet fully 函数al) implementation of the WebTransport API has been available for 测试 behind a developer-mode / advanced 设置 特性 flag (including on iOS).
Until Safari has a fully 函数al WebTransport implementation, some MoQ 使用场景 may require a 回退 to WebRTC, or, in some cases, WebSockets.
Extra Subgroup 头部 字段
The current implementation includes a  字段 in Subgroup 头部 which [](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-ietf-moq-transport-07) omits.
In section 7.3.1,  specifies:
Whereas our implementation expects and produces:
This was 错误oneously left over from a previous draft version and will be fixed in a future release. Thank you to @yuki-uchida for reporting.

/multi-cloud-networking/.title: Cloudflare One Multi-Cloud Networking (测试版)
paragraphs: Automate resource discovery and simplify connectivity when connecting to your
public cloud.

Cloudflare One Multi-Cloud Networking (formerly Magic Cloud Networking) (测试版) simplifies the process of connecting to your public cloud infrastructure, like Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud 平台, or Azure. With Multi-Cloud Networking you can automatically discover your cloud 资源 through Cloudflare's 控制面板, and effortlessly combine your cloud networks with your office and 数据中心 networks.

Multi-Cloud Networking allows you to connect, accelerate, and manage your virtual private clouds securely through Cloudflare. Grow your multi-cloud network architecture in a consistent and scalable manner, centered on Cloudflare's connectivity cloud services.
Multi-Cloud Networking is currently in closed 测试版. If you would like to be among the first customers to try it out, fill out this form.
Learn how to 快速开始.
Discover your cloud 资源 like virtual private clouds (VPCs), subnets,
virtual machines (VMs), 路由 表s, and 路由 automatically, and easily set
up your 集成.
Automatically 构建 VPN 隧道s between cloud networks and Cloudflare WAN.
Connect and secure your network infrastructure with Cloudflare's global
network.

paragraphs: To 快速开始 with Cloudflare One Multi-Cloud Networking (formerly Magic Cloud Networking) (测试版) you need to give Cloudflare permission to interact with cloud providers on your behalf. You might have mul提示le provider 账户s for the same cloud provider — for 示例, you might want Cloudflare to manage virtual private clouds (VPCs) belonging to two different AWS 账户s.

Once Cloudflare has the credentials 必需 to access your cloud environments, Multi-Cloud Networking will automatically begin discovering your cloud 资源 — like 路由 表s and virtual private networks. Discovered 资源 appear in your Cloud resource catalog.
Go to the **Cloud 集成 (测试版)** page.

Give a descriptive name to your integration. 可选ly, you can also add a description for it.

创建 a custom IAM policy in your AWS 账户, and take 注意 of the name you entered. Then, paste the following JSON code in the JSON tab:
创建 an AWS role with the following 设置:
**Trusted entity 类型**: Select **Custom trust policy**, and paste the custom trust policy returned by the Cloudflare 控制面板.
**权限**: Add the IAM policy you 创建d in the previous 步骤, along with these AWS-managed policies:
**ARN**: Copy the ARN for your 新功能ly 创建d user.

The trust policy may take several minutes to propagate to all regions. It usually takes less than four minutes, but can sometimes take longer. You may have to 重试 the Authorize button while the propagation takes effect.

Select **Authorize**.
The first discovery of 资源 may not succeed in all regions while the IAM policy is propagating. If you do not see all 资源 after creating your cloud integration, try re-discovering.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to **Cloud 集成 (测试版)**.
Select **Add** > **Azure integration**.
Select **Authorize access** to start the process of connecting your Cloudflare 账户 to Microsoft Azure.

Multi-Cloud Networking does not 支持 personal Microsoft 账户s. 登录 using a work or school 账户 that is part of an Azure Entra Tenant.
Select **创建 service principal**. You will be 重定向ed to Microsoft's login page.
Enter your Azure credentials. If your 账户 does not have administrator privileges, you may need to pass this link to an 账户 that has administrator privileges.
The next screen 列表s Cloudflare 必需 权限 to access your 账户. Select **Accept**.
Add a role assignment. The purpose of this 步骤 is to give the app that you registered in 步骤 1 permission to access your Azure Subscription.
In 步骤 3 of the linked document, select the **Contributor** role from the **Privileged administrator 角色** tab.
In 步骤 4 of the linked document, 搜索 for  when selecting members.
In **Provide 账户 信息rmation**, enter your **Tenant ID** and **Subscription ID**.
In **Verify 账户 ownership**, add the tags displayed in the Cloudflare 控制面板.

The tags may take several minutes to propagate and become 读取able to Cloudflare. It usually takes less than four minutes, but can sometimes take longer. You may have to 重试 the Authorize button while the propagation takes effect.
Select **I authorize Cloudflare to access my Azure 账户.** If your 账户 does not have administrator privileges, you may need to pass this link to an 账户 that has administrator privileges.
Select **Add** > **Google integration**.
Select **Authorize access** to start the process of connecting your Cloudflare 账户 to Google Cloud.

Grant the 新功能 service 账户 these 角色:
Under **IAM & Admin** > **Service 账户s**, select the service 账户 you just 创建d, and navigate to the **权限** tab.
Grant the **Service 账户 令牌 Creator** role to our bot 账户 to allow it to impersonate this service 账户. Learn how to grant a specific role in Google's 文档:
In the **service 账户 email 字段**, enter the email 账户 that you used to 创建 the GCP service 账户.
In the **Project ID 字段**, enter the project ID associated with your project.
Add the label displayed in the 控制面板 of your project.
Select **I authorize Cloudflare to access my GCP 账户.** If your 账户 does not have administrator privileges, you may need to pass this link to an 账户 that has administrator privileges.
You have 成功fully connected your cloud provider to Multi-Cloud Networking. Cloud 资源 found by Multi-Cloud Networking are available in the Cloud resource catalog.

/network-error-logging/.title: Network 错误 Logging
paragraphs: Network 错误 Logging (NEL) is a browser-based reporting system that allows users to report their own failures to an external 端点. You can use Network 错误 Logging to gain insight into connectivity issues on the Internet to learn when and where an incident is happening, who is impacted, and how they are being impacted.

The last mile is the path from a user to the first point of ingress to the resource, whether that be a network like Cloudflare or directly to the 源服务器. The last mile is 重要 because it is in the critical path of the 请求 for a resource: if the last mile has issues, users cannot connect to their 资源. When Network 错误 Logging is 已启用, you can receive 告警 about issues in the last mile — which are typically difficult to detect — to learn what the problem is and how to fix it.
The Report-To 头部 is present in all 请求s to Cloudflare 区域s that have NEL 已启用:
A sample Network 错误 Report payload appears as follows:
Cloudflare uses geolocation lookups to extract the following 信息rmation from every client IP in a NEL report:
Client ASN
Client country
Client metro area
Cloudflare uses internal lookups to associate the above data with a customer 域名 and customer 账户.

Cloudflare does not store any PII or user-specific data, and any IP data is only kept for the duration of the 请求 as it is processed. After the report is processed through the NEL 管道, all PII data is purged from the system.

The client IP address is only stored in volatile memory for the lifetime of the 请求 to Cloudflare’s NEL 端点 (order of milliseconds) and is dropped immediately after the 请求 completes. Cloudflare does not log the client IP address anywhere in the Network 错误 Logging 管道. Customers can opt out of having their end users consume the NEL 头部 by contacting Cloudflare 支持.

/network-error-logging/get-started/.title: 快速开始
paragraphs: Network 错误 Logging is available to users on all plan 类型s.
To enable Network 错误 Logging for Free and Pro 区域s:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **账户 home** page.
Select **Network** and locate **Network 错误 Logging 监控**.
Select the toggle to enable Network 错误 Logging.
To enable this for Business and Enterprise, contact 支持 or your 账户 team.

Improve your network and cloud traffic visibility. Customers with public IPs can also detect DDoS attacks based on their traffic flows. Formerly Magic Network 监控.

Understanding what is happening on your network is essential for 故障排除 性能 issues, detecting threats, and planning capacity. Network Flow (formerly Magic Network 监控) gives you this visibility by analyzing network  flow data  that your 路由rs or cloud environment send. The service 支持s NetFlow v5, NetFlow v9, IPFIX, and sFlow. In cloud environments, it 支持s AWS VPC flow 日志 through AWS Firehose.
Network Flow is available to all users with a Cloudflare 账户. You can 登录 to your Cloudflare 控制面板, select your 账户, then go to the Network flow page to 快速开始.

All users can use the free version in a home network, network lab, or business to 获取 end-to-end visibility across their network traffic. Potential enterprise customers are encouraged to use the free version to run a proof of concept.
Enterprise customers can use Network Flow with Magic Transit on-demand to 监控 their network, identify volumetric DDoS attacks, and activate Magic Transit on-demand to mitigate those attacks.
Refer to 快速开始.
创建 规则 to set thresholds for network traffic volume and receive 告警 when thresholds are exceeded.
Magic Transit On Demand customers can automatically enable DDoS mitigation when the service detects a DDoS attack.
Configure email, webhook, or PagerDuty 通知 to receive 告警 when 规则 thresholds are exceeded.
Mitigates L7, L4, and L3 DDoS attacks when combined with Network Flow and Magic Transit on-demand.
Provides HTTP DDoS attack protection for 区域s onboarded to Cloudflare in addition to L3 and L4 DDoS attack protection.
Connects your network infrastructure directly with Cloudflare - rather than using the public Internet - for a more reliable and secure experience.
Connect with the Network Flow 社区 on Discord to ask questions, and share

/network-interconnect/.title: Cloudflare Network Interconnect
paragraphs: Connect your network infrastructure directly to Cloudflare

Cloudflare Network Interconnect (CNI) allows you to connect your network infrastructure directly to Cloudflare — rather than using the public Internet — for a more performant and secure experience. With CNI, you can bring Cloudflare's full suite of network 函数s to your network edge.
Enterprises use CNI to achieve:
**Enhanced 性能**: Gain lower 延迟 and more consistent network 吞吐量.
**Increased 安全**: Reduce your network's attack surface by connecting privately and avoiding the public Internet.
Choose the connection 类型 for your infrastructure and operational needs.
Cloudflare's 数据中心 may 支持 one or more interconnect dataplanes. The dataplane is the 类型 of equipment that terminates your direct connection:

**Dataplane v1**: A peering connection to a Cloudflare edge 数据中心 that 支持s Generic 路由 Encapsulation (GRE) 隧道s for connecting with the Cloudflare Virtual Network, with 可选 GRE-less delivery for Magic Transit Direct Server Return.

**Dataplane v2**: Is based on the Customer Connectivity 路由r (CCR), which is specifically designed for customer connectivity. It provides simplified 路由 without GRE 隧道ing and 支持s a 1,500-byte Maximum Transmission Unit (MTU) bidirectionally.
When you review the available locations (PDF), you can see which dataplane version(s) are available.

To protect against a single point of failure, it is critical to design your CNI 部署 for resilience. For business-critical applications, seek Cloudflare locations that 支持 diversity on the device level. This ensures your connections terminate on physically separate hardware.
Refer to Service Expectations for more 信息rmation.
Magic Transit is a network 安全 and 性能 solution that offers 分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) protection, traffic acceleration, and more for on-premise, cloud-hosted, and hybrid networks.
Improve 安全 and 性能 for your entire corporate network, reducing cost and operation complexity.

/network-interconnect/get-started/.title: 快速开始
/network-interconnect/get-started/.description: Connect your network privately to Cloudflare
paragraphs: :::注意[BGP architecture and resiliency]

CNI 支持s BGP peering with the Cloudflare Virtual Network 路由 表. BGP over CNI is in closed 测试版 and is not currently available to 新功能 customers. If you are interested in BGP peering over CNI, contact your 账户 team.
For detailed 信息rmation about BGP architecture, Edge Resiliency Mode, and 路由 propagation behavior, refer to the BGP 参考 文档 in Magic Transit or Cloudflare WAN de待处理 on your use case.
Your Cloudflare 账户 team determines CNI eligibility and port 可用性. Notably:
CNI ports are currently offered at no charge to Enterprise customers.
Non-Enterprise customers (and any third party) may peer with Cloudflare via Internet Exchange according to our open peering policy.
CNI is available at select Cloudflare 数据中心:
The 类型 of Dataplane offered in that location will determine specifications of the 支持的 connection, such as the MTU.
The diversity offered in the location will vary.
Customers must have a BGP 会话 established for CNI v1 to be operational.
To peer with Cloudflare, advertise prefixes with a prefix length of  or shorter for IPv4 and  or shorter for IPv6.
**支持的 port 类型s**:
**Dataplane v1**: 10GBASE-LR (single-mode fiber) and 100GBASE-LR (single-mode fiber).
**Dataplane v2**: 10GBASE-LR (single-mode fiber) and 100GBASE-LR4 (single-mode fiber) optics are 支持的.
**Distance limitations:** Cloudflare does not 支持 optical links longer than 10 km. For longer distances, you must use intermediate hardware or a third-party provider to extend the connection.
**IP addressing:** All CNI connections and Partner CNI connections use a  subnet for point-to-point IP connectivity between your 路由r and Cloudflare.
**VLAN 支持:**
**Dataplane v1**: CNI ports may be assigned a single 802.1Q VLAN tag.
**Dataplane v2**: VLAN tagging (802.1Q) and QinQ are not yet 支持的.
**MTU considerations:**
**Dataplane v1**: 支持s a native 1,500-byte MTU for traffic from Cloudflare to you (ingress), but still requires a 1,476-byte MTU for traffic from you to Cloudflare (egress).
**Dataplane v2**: 支持s a maximum MTU of 1,500 bytes bidirectionally with no GRE requirement.
**Bidirectional Forwarding Detection (BFD):**

**Dataplane v1**: BFD provides fast failure detection for BGP 会话s and is 支持的 on direct connections. To enable BFD, contact your 账户 team. 注意 that BFD on a CNI does not impact the failover time for IPsec/GRE 隧道s, which rely on separate 健康检查.
**Dataplane v2**: Not yet 支持的.
**Link Aggregation Control 协议 (LACP)**:

**Dataplane v1**: To increase 带宽 and provide link resiliency, Cloudflare 支持s combining mul提示le physical CNI ports into a single logical channel using Link Aggregation Control 协议 (LACP). You can bundle mul提示le connections to increase total 吞吐量 and add redundancy to your private connection with Cloudflare.
**Dataplane v2**: Not yet 支持的. Use ECMP instead.
The following are the maximum 吞吐量 rates 支持的 by the CNI connection. Actual 性能 will depend on your specific use case and 配置.
Consider the following service levels when planning your 部署:
**No Formal SLA**:
CNI is currently offered at no charge and without a formal Service Level Agreement (SLA).

Cloudflare will work to 恢复 CNI service in the 事件 of a Cloudflare issue. In some Cloudflare 数据中心 the recovery time could be several days. Therefore, we always recommend 备份 connectivity to a different device or via an Internet tunnel.
**可观测性**: There is no visibility of the interconnect config/status within the Cloudflare 控制面板.
**可用性**: While network-resilient locations are designed to maintain connectivity during maintenance, single-homed locations can experience full service disruption.
**备份 Connectivity**: You are 必需 to maintain alternative Internet connectivity as a 备份 for all CNI implementations.
**Capacity planning**: You are responsible for capacity planning across your available links to Cloudflare, based on the topology and size of those links.

Direct connections are available at any Cloudflare 数据中心 where you are also located. Make sure to check whether the location of interest has the right dataplane version and diversity 要求 for your use case. Refer to available locations (PDF) for details.
Cloudflare partners with leading global providers, including: Console Connect, CoreSite, Digital Realty, Equinix Fabric, Megaport, PacketFabric, and Zayo.

The process of provisioning a CNI typically takes two to four weeks, de待处理 on the complexity of implementation and third-party provider timelines. The most common delays occur during the physical connection phase, which is outside of Cloudflare's direct control.
**Submit 请求**: Work with your 账户 team to 创建 a CNI 请求 ticket, providing your desired CNI 类型, location, use case, and technical details. An Implementation Manager will be assigned to 指南 the process.

**Review 配置**: For the v1 Dataplane, the Implementation Manager will provide a detailed 配置 document covering IP addressing, VLANs, and other technical specifications. You must review and approve this document. For the v2 Dataplane, this 步骤 is not necessary.
**Order connection**:
For a **Direct Interconnect**, you will receive a Letter of 授权 (LOA) from Cloudflare to order the physical cross-connect from the 数据中心 facility operator.
For a **Partner Interconnect**, you will use the provided details to order a virtual circuit from the partner's portal.
**Configure network**: Both Cloudflare and your network team will configure the respective network devices according to the approved document.
**测试 and verify**: Once the connection is physically established, teams will perform basic connectivity 测试s (for 示例, ping) and, if applicable, verify that the BGP 会话 can be established.
Enable tunnel 健康检查 for Magic Transit and/or Cloudflare WAN.

**Activate services**: Configure your Cloudflare products (for 示例, Magic Transit) to 路由 traffic over the 新功能 CNI. The Implementation Manager will verify end-to-end traffic flow before marking the 部署 as complete.
Add maintenance 通知.
**Project Kickoff**: In an initial kickoff call, you will confirm the scope and timeline with Cloudflare. Be prepared to provide the following 信息rmation:
desired colocation facility
必需 port speeds (10G or 100G)
BGP ASN for Peering/Magic Transit
BGP password (可选)

**Order Cross-Connect**: Cloudflare will issue a Letter of 授权 (LOA). This document grants you permission to order a physical cross-connect between your equipment and a specific port on Cloudflare's hardware within the 数据中心. The end-to-end process for ordering a cross-connect can take one to two weeks or more, de待处理 on the facility provider. Cloudflare's demarcation is the port that is specified in the LOA. You are responsible for the 部署, provisioning, and ongoing 支持 and operation of this connection, and the commercial relationships with the facility provider and any third-party connectivity providers.

Cloudflare partners with leading connectivity providers globally. To provision a Partner Interconnect, you will initiate a connection 请求 from your chosen provider's administrative portal. Cloudflare will then review and accept the 请求 to activate the virtual circuit.
Enterprise customers using Cloudflare WAN can 快速开始 with Cloud Interconnect by contacting their 账户 team.

If you are a Cloudflare WAN customer, you can connect to AWS Direct Connect using Cloud Interconnect. Cloud Interconnect 支持s AWS Dedicated Direct Connect, which provides a full physical port allocation in AWS. AWS Hosted Direct Connect is not yet 支持的.
For your AWS Dedicated Direct Connect, you can choose between connection speeds of 10 Gbps or 1 Gbps.
To connect to AWS Direct Connect:

Contact your 账户 team to start the Cloud Interconnect provisioning process. Your team will let you know of available interconnect locations so you can choose the best one for you, as well as all the details involved in this process.
登录 to your AWS portal and order a Direct Connect.
AWS will provide you a Letter of 授权 (LOA) and a VLAN ID that you need to send to your 账户 team.
Your 账户 team will continue the process of provisioning your Cloud Interconnect with the AWS documents you have provided. Overall, this process should take around four weeks to finish.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to **Interconnects**.
Select **创建 an interconnect**.
Under **Cloud Interconnect**, select **创建 新功能**.
Under **Google Integration**, select **Select integration**.
Give your interconnect a name and 可选ly a description. Make sure the MTU 值 matches the MTU configured on the GCP VLAN attachment.
Select **Continue**.
From the **Interface speed** drop-down menu, select an interface speed. GCP will charge you based on the speed of the interconnect that you choose.
Enter your VLAN attachment 对ing 键.
Review the details you provided, and select **Confirm order**.
Your Google Cloud 平台 (GCP) interconnect will take a few minutes to be available. A BGP 会话 will be established but no 路由 will be exchanged.
You can now select View interconnects for a 列表 of all interconnects on your 账户. Select the interconnect name to show the interconnect details. The interconnect has a unique Interconnect ID.
After you have configured your Google Cloud Interconnect, you will need to add 路由 to use the interconnect:
To 创建 路由 in the Cloudflare Virtual Network 路由 表 to direct traffic towards GCP:
Add static 路由 to your Cloudflare WAN 路由 表 with legacy bidirectional tunnel 健康检查 to detect failures and steer traffic to alternative paths.
注意 that 路由 advertised by BGP from GCP Cloud 路由r will be ignored.
To 创建 路由 in GCP 路由 表 to direct traffic towards Cloudflare, you must use the GCP Cloud 路由r:
Add custom learned 路由 to Cloud 路由r.
Use the BGP 会话. Reach out to your 账户 team to 请求 a 列表 of one or more prefixes to advertise, and specify the interconnect ID you want to advertise over.

/network/ip-geolocation/.title: IP geolocation
paragraphs: IP geolocation adds the  头部 to all 请求s to your 源服务器.
Cloudflare automatically 更新s its IP geolocation 数据库 mul提示le times per week.

The recommended procedure to enable IP geolocation 信息rmation is to enable the Add visitor location 头部 Managed 转换. This Managed 转换 adds HTTP 请求 头部 with location 信息rmation for the visitor's IP address, such as city, country, continent, longitude, and latitude.
If you only want the 请求 头部 for the visitor's country, you can enable IP Geolocation.
To enable IP Geolocation in the 控制面板:
登录 to your Cloudflare 账户 and go to a specific 域名.
Go to **Network**.
For **IP Geolocation**, switch the toggle to **On**.
To enable IP Geolocation with the API, send a [](/api/资源/区域s/sub资源/设置/方法/edit/) 请求 with  as the setting name in the URI path, and the  parameter set to .
:::注意
In order to use this data, you will need to then retrieve it from the  头部.

If you find an IP address with a location that you believe is incorrect, fill in the data correction form with the relevant IP address range(s) along with the correct 信息rmation as applicable (country, state/province, city name, and ZIP code).
If the data is confirmed, Cloudflare will make the necessary changes, which should be reflected within 48 hours.

/network/.title: Network 设置
paragraphs: Manage network 设置 for your website.
Include the country code of the visitor location with all 请求s to your website.
Enable IPv6 支持 and gateway.
Allow WebSockets connections to your 源服务器.
The Cloudflare China Network is a package of selected Cloudflare’s 性能 and 安全 products 运行中 on 数据中心 located in mainland China and operated by Cloudflare’s partner JD Cloud.
Managed 转换s allow you to perform common adjustments to HTTP 请求 and 响应 头部 with the click of a button.

/network/websockets/.title: WebSockets
headings: 请求s and 带宽 measurement
paragraphs: Cloudflare 支持s proxied WebSocket connections without additional 配置.

WebSockets are open connections sustained between the client and the 源服务器. Inside a WebSockets connection, the client and the 源 can pass data back and forth without having to reestablish 会话s. This makes exchanging data within a WebSockets connection fast. WebSockets are often used for real-time applications such as live chat and gaming.
To enable WebSockets connections to your 源服务器 in the 控制面板:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Network** page.
For **WebSockets**, switch the toggle to **On**.
To enable WebSockets connections to your 源服务器 with the API, send a [](/api/资源/区域s/sub资源/设置/方法/edit/) 请求 with  as the setting name in the URI path, and the  parameter set to .
:::注意
Cloudflare also 支持s ASP.NET SignalR, which helps negotiate which transport method to use (long polling or WebSockets).
WebSockets are 支持的 on all Cloudflare plans.

Given the nature of WebSocket connections, you may notice they differ from typical HTTP traffic in terms of 请求s and 带宽 usage. If you are an Enterprise customer, it is 重要 to consider how Cloudflare measures 请求s and 带宽 to accurately estimate your usage.
Cloudflare measures a single WebSocket connection in the following way:

**请求s**: Cloudflare recognizes only the initial upgrade 请求 per WebSocket connection as an HTTP 请求. Even though you can send a bidirectional 消息 stream through the established WebSocket connection, it will be counted as a single long-lived HTTP 请求.

**带宽**: Cloudflare measures data transfer sent from Cloudflare to the client. This typically means that 消息s from the WebSocket server behind Cloudflare to the WebSocket client are counted towards 带宽 usage.
Once a WebSocket connection is closed, you can view your aggregated WebSocket usage through Traffic 分析, the GraphQL 分析 API, and HTTP 请求s 日志.
When Cloudflare releases 新功能 code to its 全球网络, we may restart servers, which terminates WebSockets connections.
Implement a keepalive.
Review and then remove or extend 超时 设置 on the 源 and/or on the client.
Investigating issues with Websocket can be facilitated with client 工具 like wscat.
Being able to reproduce an issue on a single URL with a minima列表ic tool helps narrowing down the issue.
The  and  字段s in HTTP 请求s 日志 represent the duration of the WebSocket connection (they do not represent the initial HTTP connection).

/network/ipv6-compatibility/.title: IPv6 兼容性
paragraphs: Cloudflare enables IPv6 on all 域名s without requiring additional 配置 or hardware (as long as your host provides IPv6 支持).

When IPv6 兼容性 is turned on, Cloudflare auto generates  DNS 记录s to allow IPv6 clients to connect. On the other hand, when IPv6 兼容性 is turned off, Cloudflare does not automatically generate and advertise  DNS for the 区域. Client software will determine whether to use IPv4 or IPv6 to connect to a 主机名 that 支持s both 方法.
For proxied DNS 记录s that have both an IPv6 and IPv4 源 address, Cloudflare will prefer the IPv4 address when connecting to your 源服务器.
By 默认, IPv6 兼容性 is turned on for your 域名 and will apply to all 域名s and 子域名s covered by proxied DNS 记录s.
:::注意
If you have signed up for Cloudflare through a Cloudflare hosting partner or by use partial 设置, IPv6 兼容性 does not apply to your apex 域名.
If your 源 web server only understands IPv4 formatted IP addresses, non-Enterprise customers should configure Pseudo IPv4.
Alternatively, customers with an Enterprise 账户 can turn off Cloudflare's IPv6 兼容性.
To turn off IPv6 兼容性 in the 控制面板:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Network** page.
Turn off **IPv6 兼容性**.
To turn off IPv6 兼容性 using the API, send a [](/api/资源/区域s/sub资源/设置/方法/edit/) 请求 with  as the setting name in the URI path, and the  parameter set to .
Even when IPv6 is turned off, 域名s may still receive IPv6 traffic (for 示例, via the Tor network). To completely turn off all IPv6 traffic:
Turn off **Onion 路由**.
Use a WAF custom 规则 to block  using the 条件 .

Add  to the 规则 above to avoid blocking Workers sub请求s. Workers sub请求s use IPv6 addresses, and this 条件 checks that the 请求 does not come from a Worker script. For more 信息rmation, refer to the [](/规则et-engine/规则-language/字段s/参考/cf.Worker.上游_区域/) 字段 文档.
Provide the following 信息rmation to Cloudflare 支持 if you experience issues with IPv6 connectivity:
A trace路由 that demonstrates the IPv6 connection issues.
The Cloudflare 数据中心 serving your 请求 when the IPv6 issues occur.
Confirmation of whether disabling IPv6 兼容性 resolves the issue.

/notifications/get-started/configure-pag.title: Configure PagerDuty
headings: Connect PagerDuty to a Cloudflare 账户
paragraphs: :::注意
This 特性 is only available if your 账户 has at least one 区域 on a Business or higher plan. For more 信息rmation, refer to our plans.

Cloudflare’s Notification service 支持s 路由 通知 to PagerDuty. By sending 通知 to PagerDuty you can leverage the same service definitions and escalation paths that you would for other third-party services that you connect to PagerDuty.

When a 配置 that you have previously 设置 触发器s a notification for PagerDuty, Cloudflare will send the notification to PagerDuty on your behalf. All of the PagerDuty services configured for the notification will receive the notification. PagerDuty will follow the service’s 配置 to handle the notification appropriately. 操作s like de-duping and 速率限制 depend on the notification 类型.
To use PagerDuty as a connected service, you must 注册 for a PagerDuty 账户.
According to PagerDuty, you will need an 账户 with the following 权限 to add a connected service: User, Admin, Manager, Global Admin, or 账户 Owner.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **通知** page.
Go to **Destinations**.
In the **Connected notification services** card, select **Connect**.
登录 to your PagerDuty 账户 to connect it to your Cloudflare 账户.
Choose the services you want to use and select **Connect**.
The browser will navigate back to your Cloudflare 控制面板. Select **Continue**.
Your 新功能 connected PagerDuty will appear in the Connected notification services card.
To edit which PagerDuty services are connected to your Cloudflare 账户, you must first disconnect PagerDuty from Cloudflare, make any changes you need in PagerDuty, and then reconnect it.

Disconnecting PagerDuty will disable any 通知 being sent to PagerDuty where they are currently configured. If PagerDuty was the only configured destination, disconnecting PagerDuty may result in a notification with no destination.
If other delivery destinations were selected, then those 通知 will still be 路由d as configured.
In the **Connected notification services** card, select **View** on the PagerDuty service you want to disconnect.
Select **Disconnect** > **Confirm**.
登录 to your PagerDuty 账户 and make the 必需 changes.
Reconnect PagerDuty to Cloudflare.

/notifications/get-started/.title: Configure Cloudflare 通知
headings: Disable or 删除 a notification
paragraphs: The 列表 of 通知 available depends on the 类型 of 账户 you have. Refer to Available 通知 to 了解更多 about what each notification does and what do to when receiving one.
You can check the Notification History using the API to view 通知 that have been generated for your 账户.
To 创建 a notification via the Cloudflare 控制面板, you will need to have the Super Administrator or Administrator role.
You can also 创建 a notification if you have the 账户 edit role, which allows you 创建 any 类型 of notification.
An API 令牌 needs to have the 通知 读取/Write permission to 创建 a notification,
Some 通知 can only be 创建d if you have a Professional, Business or Enterprise 账户 or if you are using a particular Cloudflare product.
This 指南 will help you 创建, edit, 测试, or 删除 通知 using the Cloudflare 控制面板.
You can 创建 a notification via the Cloudflare 控制面板.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **通知** page.
Select **Add**.
On the notification you want to 创建, choose **Select**.
Name the notification.
Enter an email address to receive the 通知.
:::注意
Professional and 商业计划s will have access to more 通知 and PagerDuty. 账户s with a paid service will additionally have access to Webhook.
(可选) Specify any additional options for the notification, if 必需. For 示例, some 通知 require that you select one or more 域名s or services.
Select **创建**.
The browser will navigate back to the 列表 of 通知, where the 新功能 notification will appear as 已启用.
You can edit existing 通知 via the Cloudflare 控制面板.
On the notification that you want to modify, select **Edit**.
Make your changes as needed and select **Save**.
The browser will navigate back to the 列表 of 通知.
You can 删除 or disable existing 通知 via the Cloudflare 控制面板.
On the notification that you want to disable, select the **已启用** toggle. To 删除 it, select **删除**.
To verify that 通知 will be sent to the correct location or to view which details are available, you can 测试 a notification by selecting 测试 on any 已启用 notification.
This 操作 sends a notification with fake data.

/notifications/.title: 通知
paragraphs: Cloudflare 通知 help you stay up to date with your Cloudflare 账户. Manage your 通知 to define what you want to be warned about and how, be it a denial-of-service attack or an issue with your server.
The available Notification 特性 vary according to your plan:
免费计划s can 设置 email-based 通知.
Business and higher plans can also access PagerDuty.
Professional and higher plans can also use Webhook.
The notification service only works on the proxied 域名s because Cloudflare needs enough 信息rmation necessary to decide if we need to 触发器 a notification or not.
:::注意
The 可用性 of delivery 方法 like PagerDuty and Webhook in Free or Professional 区域s depends on the highest 区域 plan in your Cloudflare 账户:
PagerDuty is available in 区域s on a Free/Professional plan if your Cloudflare 账户 has at least one 区域 in a 商业计划 (or higher).
Webhook are available in 区域s on a 免费计划 if your Cloudflare 账户 has at least one 区域 in a Professional plan (or higher).

/notifications/get-started/configure-web.title: Configure Webhook
paragraphs: :::注意
This 特性 is only available if your 账户 has at least one 区域 with a 专业计划 or above. For more 信息rmation, refer to our plans.

There are a variety of services you can connect to Cloudflare using Webhook to receive 通知 from your Cloudflare 账户. Refer to the 表 below to learn how to connect your Cloudflare 账户 to popular webhook services.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **通知** page.
Go to **Destinations**.
In the **Webhook** card, select **创建**.
Give your webhook a name to use for identification later.
In the **URL** 字段, enter the URL of the third-party service that you have previously 设置 and want to connect to your Cloudflare 账户.
If needed, insert the **密钥**. 密钥 are how Webhook are encrypted and vary according to the service you are connecting to Cloudflare.
Select **Save and 测试** to finish setting up your webhook.
The 新功能 webhook will appear in the Webhook card.
You can only edit the name of Webhook and/or 删除 them.
In the **Webhook** card, select **Edit** on the webhook that you want to edit.
更新 the webhook's name and select **Save**.
You can 删除 a webhook after selecting Edit or by selecting 删除 in the 列表 of Webhook displayed in the Destinations card.
Webhook 通知 are sent from Cloudflare's IP ranges. If your webhook 端点 is protected by a 防火墙, you must allow列表 these IP addresses to receive 通知.
To programmatically retrieve the current 列表 of Cloudflare IP addresses, use the Cloudflare API.
Cloudflare's IP ranges are shared across mul提示le services and may change over time. Periodically check the IP 列表 and 更新 your 防火墙 规则 accordingly.
If you use a service that is not covered by Cloudflare's currently available Webhook, you can configure your own, and enter a valid webhook URL.

It is always recommended to use a 密钥 for generic Webhook. Cloudflare will send your 密钥 in the  头部 of every 请求 made. If this 头部 is not present, or is not your specified 值, you should reject the webhook.
After selecting Save and 测试, your webhook should now be configured as a destination that you can use to attach to policies.
When Cloudflare sends you a webhook, it will have the following 模式:
For the full payload structure and 示例 for different alert 类型s, refer to the webhook payload 模式 参考.
Cloudflare generic webhook 通知 will only be dispatched to a publicly resolvable IP address on port 80 or 443.

If you want to receive the generic webhook notification on a private IP address or different port, you can either receive and forward the notification using Workers or 设置 a Cloudflare Tunnel to 路由 to your connected application.
You can use Cloudflare Workers with a generic webhook to deliver 通知 to any service that accepts Webhook.

Cloudflare has an 示例 tool to help you understand how you can use Workers and generic Webhook. The 示例 provided 转换s a generic webhook 响应 in order for it to be delivered to Rocket.Chat. The code provided is heavily commented to 指南 you in the process of adapting the 示例 to your needs.
For Google Chat:
**密钥**: The 密钥 is part of the URL. Cloudflare parses this 信息rmation automatically and there is no input needed from the user.
**URL**: URL varies de待处理 on the Google Chat channel's address.
For Slack:
**URL**: URL varies de待处理 on the Slack channel's address.
For DataDog:
**密钥**: The 密钥 is 必需 and has to be entered by the user. This is what DataDog refers to as API 键
For Discord:
**URL**: URL varies de待处理 on the Discord channel's address.
For OpsGenie:
**密钥**: The 密钥 is the  for OpsGenie's REST API.
For Splunk:
**密钥**: The 密钥 is 必需 and has to be entered by the user. This is what Splunk refers to as . Refer to Splunk’s 文档 for details.
We only 支持 three Splunk 端点: services/collector, services/collector/raw, and services/collector/事件.
If SSL is 已启用 on the 令牌, the port must be 443. If SSL is not 已启用 on the 令牌, the port must be 8088.
SSL must be 已启用 on the server.
**Enable 索引er acknowledgement** must be 已禁用 on the Splunk HTTP 事件 Collector.
For Feishu:
**URL**: The URL varies de待处理 on the Custom Robot.
For Teams:
**URL**: URL is provided by Teams when the Incoming Webhook 连接器 is 创建d.
For ServiceNow:
**密钥**: User decides. Ensure that the 密钥 entered in Cloudflare 通知 matches with ServiceNow. Refer to ServiceNow's 文档 for details.
For a Generic webhook:
**密钥**: User decides.
**URL**: User decides.

When creating a Google Chat, Slack, Discord, or Feishu webhook, the 密钥 is part of the URL. You can choose to remove the 密钥 from the URL and explicitly set the 值 of  rather than letting Cloudflare automatically extract it.
This can be useful when defining your webhook infrastructure as code using Terraform since the URL will not be modified by Cloudflare.

Cloudflare provides a CLI command for creating 新功能 Workers and Pages projects — , powered by the  package.

To 创建 a Pages project you must now specify the  arg, otherwise C3 will always 创建 a Workers project.

When you use a framework,  directly uses the framework's own command for generating a 新功能 projects, which may prompt additional questions. This ensures that the project you 创建 is up-to-date with the la测试 version of the framework, and you have all the same options when creating you project via  that you would if you 创建d your project using the framework's tooling directly.
Once your project has been configured, you will be asked if you would like to 部署 the project to Cloudflare. This is 可选.
If you choose to 部署, you will be asked to 登录to your Cloudflare 账户 (if you aren't al读取y), and your project will be 部署ed.
To 创建 a 新功能 project using , and then connect it to a Git repository on your Github or Gitlab 账户, take the following 步骤s:
Run , and choose your desired options

Follow the 步骤s outlined in the Git integration 指南

C3 collects any 必需 input through a series of inter活跃 prompts. You may also specify your choices via command line arguments, which will skip these prompts. To use C3 in a non-inter活跃 context such as CI, you must specify all 必需 arguments via the command line.

All the 布尔值 options above can be specified with or without a 值, for 示例  and  have the same effect, prefixing  to the option's name negates it, so for 示例  and  have the same effect.
Cloudflare collects anonymous usage data to improve  over time. 阅读更多 about this in our data policy.

Alternatively, you can set an 环境变量:
