/radar/get-started/first-request/.title: Make your first API 请求
paragraphs: To make your first 请求 to Cloudflare's Radar API, you must obtain your API 令牌 first. 创建 a Custom 令牌, with 账户 > Radar in the 权限 group, and select 读取 as the access level.
Once you have the 令牌, you are 读取y to make your first 请求 to Radar's API at .
In the following 示例, we will access the global percentage distribution of device 类型s (like mobile and desktop traffic) for the last seven days. For more 信息rmation, refer to 获取 device 类型s summary 端点:
A 成功ful 响应 will look similar to the following:
This 响应 means that 41% of the 请求s are classified as coming from mobile devices, while 58% are desktop traffic.
:::注意

Cloudflare Radar attempts to provide trends and insights into general Internet usage, using the traffic that goes through Cloudflare infrastructure. As such, Cloudflare Radar only provides data on traffic coming from end-users, unless otherwise specified (for 示例, 源 fetches are excluded).

The previous 示例 returns all traffic from bots and humans. However, you can access just the traffic classified as coming from humans (the 默认 in Cloudflare Radar) by adding . You can also access traffic coming only from bots with  (refer to bot classes for more 信息rmation). For 示例:
运行中 the above, can you find any differences between both in the distribution of mobile versus desktop traffic?
:::注意[The  result.meta  property]

The  property in the 响应 includes metadata about the current 请求. In the 示例 above,  returns the date range specified in the 查询, while  returns the 类型 of normalization applied to the data (refer to Normalization 方法 for more 信息rmation).
When 查询ing for time series,  will also include the returned aggregation interval in .

When present,  will also provide an indication of how much confidence Cloudflare has in the data. Confidence levels are affected either by internal issues affecting data quality or by Cloudflare not having sufficient data for a given location or Autonomous System (AS). In these cases, confidence level will be below  (refer to Confidence levels for more 信息rmation).

Python has become one of the standard languages in data analysis. Here is a quick 示例 on how to chart the same data using 请求s and Pandas 库. Here, we are using  in the 参数 to make it easier for Pandas to import.

A 注意book is a web-based inter活跃 computing application, where text, code, and code outputs, like charts, can be combined into a single document. Refer to Radar's companion colaboratory 注意book for more 示例 on how the API can be used in your own projects.
Refer to Make comparisons to learn how to compare data.

/radar/investigate/url-scanner/.title: URL Scanner
paragraphs: To better understand Internet usage around the world, use Cloudflare's URL Scanner. With Cloudflare's URL Scanner, you have the ability to investigate the details of a 域名, IP, URL, or ASN. Cloudflare's URL Scanner is available in the 安全 Center of the Cloudflare 控制面板, Cloudflare Radar, and the Cloudflare API.
To make your first URL scan using the API, you must obtain a URL Scanner specific API 令牌. 创建 a Custom 令牌 with 账户 > URL Scanner in the 权限 group, and select Edit as the access level.
Once you have the 令牌, and you know your , you are 读取y to make your first 请求 to the API at .
To submit a URL to scan, the only 必需 信息rmation is the URL to be scanned in the  请求 正文:
By 默认, the report will have a  visibility level, which means it will appear in the recent scans 列表 and in 搜索 results. It will also include a single screenshot with desktop resolution.
A 成功ful 响应 will have a status code of  and be similar to the following:
You can submit up to 100 URLs at the same time via the API.
The  property in the 响应 above identifies the scan and will be 必需 when fetching the scan report.
Here's an 示例 请求 正文 with some custom 配置 options:

The 响应 will include, among others, the following top properties:

Some 示例 of more specific properties include:

- Submitted URL of the scan. May differ from final URL () if there are HTTP 重定向s.

- Various hashes of the main screenshot. Can be used to 搜索 for sites with similar screenshots.
- HTML structure hash. Use it to 搜索 for sites with similar structure.
- MD5 hash of the favicon.
- Whether the website was considered malicious *at the time of the scan*. Please check the remaining properties for each subsystem(s) for specific threats detected.

/randomness-beacon/.title: Cloudflare Randomness Beacon
paragraphs: drand (pronounced "dee-rand") is a distributed randomness beacon daemon written in Golang. Servers 运行中 drand can be linked to each other to produce collective, publicly verifiable, unbiased, unpredic表 random 值s at fixed intervals using bilinear 对ings and threshold cryptography.

drand is meant to be an Internet infrastructure level service that provides randomness to applications, similar to how NTP provides timing 信息rmation and 证书 Transparency 日志 provide 证书 issuance 信息rmation.
For the most up-to-date 文档 on drand, please visit drand.love.

Cloudflare Realtime is a comprehensive suite of products designed to help you 构建 powerful, scalable real-time applications.
RealtimeKit is a set of SDKs and APIs that lets you add customizable live video and voice to web or mobile applications. It is fully customisable and lets you 设置 in just a few lines of code.
It sits on top of the Realtime SFU, abstracting away the heavy lifting of media 路由, peer management, and other complex WebRTC operations.

The Realtime SFU (Selective Forwarding Unit) is a powerful media server that efficiently 路由 video and audio. The Realtime SFU runs on Cloudflare's global cloud network in hundreds of cities worldwide.

For developers with WebRTC expertise, the SFU can be used independently to 构建 highly custom applications that require full control over media 流s. This is recommended only for those who want to leverage Cloudflare's network with their own WebRTC logic.
The TURN service is a managed service that acts as a relay for WebRTC traffic. It ensures connectivity for users behind restrictive 防火墙s or NATs by providing a public relay point for media 流s.
Use this comparison 表 to quickly find the right Realtime product for your needs:
Run machine learning models, powered by 无服务器 GPUs, on Cloudflare’s 全球网络.

/realtime/turn/.title: TURN Service
headings: 协议s and Ciphers for TURN over TLS
paragraphs: Separately from the SFU, Realtime offers a managed TURN service. TURN acts as a relay point for traffic between WebRTC clients like the browser and SFUs, particularly in scenarios where direct communication is obstructed by NATs or 防火墙s. TURN maintains an allocation of public IP addresses and ports for each 会话, ensuring connectivity even in restrictive network environments.
Using Cloudflare Realtime TURN service is available free of charge when used to获取her with the Realtime SFU. Otherwise, it costs $0.05/real-time GB outbound from Cloudflare to the TURN client.
:::注意[注意]
Use of alternate port 53 only by itself is not recommended. Port 53 is blocked by many ISPs, and by popular browsers such as Chrome and Firefox. It is useful only in certain specific scenerios.

Cloudflare Realtime TURN service runs on Cloudflare's 全球网络 - a growing 全球网络 of thousands of machines distributed across hundreds of locations, with the no表 exception of the Cloudflare's China Network.
When a client tries to connect to , it _automatically_ connects to the Cloudflare location closest to them. We achieve this using anycast 路由.
To 了解更多 about the architecture that makes this possible, 读取 this technical deep-dive about Realtime.
TLS versions 支持的 include TLS 1.1, TLS 1.2, and TLS 1.3.
There is no specific MTU limit for Cloudflare Realtime TURN service.
Cloudflare Realtime TURN service places 限制 on:
Unique IP address you can communicate with per relay allocation (>5 新功能 IP/sec)
Packet rate outbound and inbound to the relay allocation (>5-10 kpps)
Data rate outbound and inbound to the relay allocation (>50-100 Mbps)
:::注意[限制 apply to each TURN allocation independently]
Each limit is for a single TURN allocation (single TURN user) and not 账户 wide. Same limit will apply to each user regardless of the 数字 of unique TURN users.
These 限制 are sui表 for high-demand applications and also have burst rates higher than those documented above. Hitting these 限制 will result in packet drops.

/reference-architecture/how-to-use/.title: How to use
paragraphs: The 参考 architecture content in our 文档 is designed to help you understand how Cloudflare has been designed and built,
and how our products and services integrate with your current IT architecture.

Below are the different 类型s of architecture content and 信息rmation is organized from high level 参考 architectures, to design 指南 with 最佳实践 and 指南lines to implementation 指南 which provide detailed 步骤s to 部署 a specific solution.

参考 architectures provide a foundational knowledge of the Cloudflare 平台 and products while offering a description for how they relate to your existing infrastructure and business challenges. They are high-level, conceptual documents that walk through the concepts of an area of our 平台, mapping our network, products and 特性 to the typical architecture of a customer's environment. Detailed diagrams with 支持ing content explain how our technology works and how it can be integrated with your own infrastructure. The goal of a 参考 architecture is:
Present thought leadership for a broad technology area
Visualize the architecture of Cloudflare and understand how it's been designed
Explain integration points between Cloudflare and your infrastructure

A 参考 architecture diagram focusses on a specific solution or use case where Cloudflare can be used. One or more diagrams are the primary content with 支持ing 简介 and summary. These can focus on sections from a 参考 architecture that are not fully developed. The goal of this 类型 of document is:
Visualize the components of a specific solution's architecture
Provide a quick answer to a specific question around a use case

These 指南 are typically aimed at architects, developers, and IT professionals who are 任务ed with designing and 部署ing systems that leverage the company's technologies. They typically focus on a specific solution that would be a subset of the greater architecture. For 示例, if you have 读取 our SASE 参考 Architecture, but are a startup, you may want to understand the details of using a SASE approach for a small startup. These documents are:
Helping you think through how to design a 部署 of Cloudflare as part of an overall solution.
More prescriptive than 参考 architectures, sharing 最佳实践 and 指南lines.
Focused on a solution design that you are trying to achieve, such as connecting private networks to Cloudflare, or using a Web 应用防火墙 to secure a public website.
Not a replacement for product 文档 and do not describe specific product 配置 or commands to run.

Implementation 指南 provide 步骤-by-步骤 instructions and practical guidance for how to effectively 部署 and configure specific solutions or services. Implementation 指南 are focused on a specific implementation goal. While a design 指南 provides the overall 最佳实践 for designing a solution, an implementation 指南 details the actual 步骤s to 部署 in the context of a specific 作业-to-be-done. These documents are:
Focused on a specific implementation outcome, such as connecting a remote office using the Cloudflare One Appliance.
Provide 信息rmation about the exact commands and 配置 步骤s to take.

/registrar/account-options/renew-domains.title: Re新功能 域名s
headings: Automatic re新功能al of 域名
Re新功能 a 域名 manually
paragraphs: Cloudflare Registrar enrolls your 域名 to auto-re新功能 by 默认. Unlike other registrars, your 域名 will only re新功能 at the 列表 price set by the registry. When a 域名 has the auto-re新功能 setting turned on, Cloudflare will attempt to automatically re新功能 the 域名 prior to expiration.

There is no guarantee that the re新功能al will succeed. Re新功能als may fail for various reasons, including billing failures and registry 停机时间. While Cloudflare will make several attempts to re新功能, it is strongly recommended you frequently review your 账户 to ensure your 域名s have been re新功能ed.
If you decide you no longer need the 域名, disable auto-re新功能 for your 域名. Once 已禁用, your 域名 will not re新功能 upon expiration.
:::注意[注意]
The first auto-re新功能 attempt will occur approximately 30 days prior to expiration. If you wish to disable auto-re新功能, do so at least 30 days prior to the expiration date.
You can continue to keep your 域名 registered with Cloudflare for the time remaining until the expiration date. If you decide you want to keep the 域名, enable auto-re新功能 at any time prior to expiration.
If you want your 域名s to re新功能 automatically, keep the 默认 设置 for your 域名 (Auto Re新功能 should be set to On). To find this setting:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Manage 域名s** page.
Find the 域名 you want to automatically re新功能, and make sure the **Auto-re新功能** toggle is 已启用.

Cloudflare attempts to re新功能 these 域名s automatically 30 days before their expiration date. Several more attempts are made if the first attempt fails. The last attempt to re新功能 is made on the day before expiration. You can also manually re新功能 a 域名 at any time.
If mul提示le 域名s are auto-re新功能ed on the same date, only one charge will be made to the primary payment method.
If the re新功能al fails, you will receive an email notification and Cloudflare will try to re新功能 the 域名 three additional times. If these attempts fail, you must manually re新功能 your 域名.
:::注意
If you want to 删除 your 域名 from Cloudflare, disable Auto-Re新功能 first.
You can re新功能 a 域名 at any time. To re新功能 a 域名 registered with Cloudflare:
Find the 域名 you want to re新功能 and select **Manage**.
In **Registration** select **Re新功能/Extend 域名**.
In the **Re新功能 for** drop-down menu, choose a 数字 of years to re新功能 your 域名 (up to 10 years).
Select **Re新功能** and then **Purchase**.
Once Cloudflare validates your payment, the status of your 域名 changes to Re新功能al 待处理. After the re新功能al is finished, the status changes back to 活跃.
Once a 域名 is registered, Registrar sends the following expiration notices to the Super Admin of the 域名:
A monthly email 列表ing all 域名s set to re新功能 automatically within the next 45 days.
A monthly email 列表ing all 域名s expiring in the next 60-90 days.
In addition to the Super Admin, the following expiration notices are sent to the WHOIS Registrant contact associated with the 域名:
A weekly email 列表ing all 域名s expiring within the next month.
A daily email 列表ing all 域名s expiring in seven days.
An email one day after a 域名 expires.
An email 20 days after the expiration date.

If you do not re新功能 your 域名 before the expiration date, your 域名 will enter a Redemption Grace Period (RGP) for 30 days. These 域名s are not 删除d and you can 恢复 them to your 账户, but restoration may require an additional fee. You cannot transfer 域名s during the RGP.
All re新功能als are final and Cloudflare will not issue refunds.
When re新功能ing a 域名, additional years are always added to the current expiration date regardless of when the re新功能al takes place.

/registrar/get-started/enable-dnssec/.title: Enable DNSSEC
paragraphs: The 域名系统 (DNS) translates 域名 names into numeric Internet addresses. However, DNS is a fundamentally insecure 协议. It does not guarantee where DNS 记录s come from and accepts any 请求s given to it.

DNSSEC 创建s a secure layer to the 域名系统 by adding cryptographic signatures to DNS 记录s. By doing so, your 请求 can check the signature to verify that the 记录 you need comes from the authoritative 名称服务器 and was not altered along the way.
:::注意
If your 域名 is not on Cloudflare Registrar, you can enable DNSSEC in DNS on the Cloudflare 控制面板.

/registrar/get-started/register-domain/.title: Register a 新功能 域名
headings: How to register a 新功能 域名
paragraphs: :::注意[Cloudflare 名称服务器s]

All 域名s acquired via Cloudflare Registrar use Cloudflare 名称服务器s, automatically protecting and speeding up your content or services. You will not be able to change to another DNS provider's 名称服务器s while using Cloudflare Registrar.
Cloudflare Registrar does not currently 支持 internationalized 域名 names (IDNs), also known as Unicode.
You must have a verified 账户 email address, to transfer or register 域名s.
:::注意
If you are registering a  域名, refer to the Additional 要求 for .US 域名s before proceeding.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Register 域名s** page.

In the 搜索 box, enter the 域名 name you wish to register, and select **搜索**. You may also enter one or more 键words. The 搜索 results will contain a 列表 of suggested 域名s. If the 域名 you entered does not appear in the 列表, this means it is not available for registration.
:::注意[重要]
Cloudflare Registrar currently does not 支持 internationalized 域名 names (IDNs), also known as unicode. For that reason, you cannot 搜索 for words with special characters, such as , , , among others.

Select **Purchase** on the 域名 you wish to register. In rare instances, a 域名 that is not available for registration may appear in the 搜索 results. After selecting **Purchase**, a definitive 可用性 check will be performed to confirm that the 域名 is actually available for registration.

Select the term (数字 of years) you wish to register the 域名 from the **Payment option** drop-down menu. Most top-level 域名s (TLDs) can be registered for a maximum of ten years. Some TLDs may have different term 限制 and these will be reflected in the drop-down options.

The expiration date and price will 更新 automatically based on the term selected. The Re新功能 On date is the date that the system will attempt to auto-re新功能 the 域名. All registrations have Auto-re新功能 turned on by 默认. However, you may disable this option at any time.

Enter the contact details for the 域名. These details will be used to 创建 all of the 必需 contacts (Registrant, Admin, Technical, and Billing), and may be 已更新 after registration is completed. Refer to Contact 要求 to learn the specific 要求 for each contact 字段.
If you have previously registered or transferred a 域名 name, the form will be filled in advance with the 信息rmation from your 默认 contact. If not, you will need to fill out the form.
It is 重要 that you provide complete and accurate contact 信息rmation. If you do not follow this recommendation, the 域名 registration may be suspended and/or canceled.

In **Payment**, select which 类型 of payment you want to use. If you al读取y have a billing profile, Cloudflare uses this 信息rmation to automatically fill the form. If there is no billing profile, you need to enter your payment 信息rmation.
Review the terms and 条件s, including the 域名 Registration Agreement, Self-serve Subscription Agreement, and the Privacy Policy.
Select **Complete purchase** to continue. By selecting **Complete purchase**, you acknowledge that you are accepting the terms of the agreements.

The registration process may take up to 30 seconds to complete. Once the registration is complete, the browser will navigate to the 域名 management page where you may 更新 the contacts, change the auto-re新功能 设置, and add additional years to the term. You will also receive a confirmation email regarding your 新功能 域名 registration.

At this time, you can only use ASCII characters for contact data. If the 默认 contact has non-ASCII characters, you will need to 更新 the 域名 contact details before proceeding. Cloudflare recommends that you 更新 your 默认 contact 信息rmation to include ASCII characters only.
When you register a 域名 with Cloudflare, your personal 信息rmation is redacted when permitted by the registry. Refer to WHOIS red操作 for more 信息rmation.
To improve the 安全 of your 域名, enable 域名系统 安全 扩展 to 创建 a secure layer with a cryptographic signature.

/registrar/.title: Cloudflare Registrar
paragraphs: Buy and re新功能 your 域名 at cost with Cloudflare Registrar.

Buy and manage your 域名 with Cloudflare Registrar, and add an additional layer of 安全 to your DNS 记录s for free. Cloudflare Registrar also offers redacted WHOIS 信息rmation by 默认 and will only charge you what is paid to the registry for your 域名. No markup. No surprise fees.
Buy and re新功能 域名s through Cloudflare Registrar at cost, without markup fees. You only pay what is charged by registries and ICANN.
Cloudflare Registrar enrolls your 域名 to auto-re新功能 by 默认. Unlike other registrars, your 域名 will only re新功能 at the 列表 price set by the registry.
Cloudflare Registrar offers one-click DNSSEC activation. DNSSEC secures DNS 记录s with cryptographic signatures, and is free to all Cloudflare customers.
When you use Cloudflare DNS, all DNS queries for your 域名 are answered by Cloudflare’s global anycast network. This network delivers 性能 and global 可用性.

/rules/configuration-rules/.title: 配置 规则
paragraphs: 配置 规则 allow you to customize certain Cloudflare 配置 设置 for matching incoming 请求s. For 示例, you can turn off specific 特性 for certain URL paths or change 设置 based on the visitor's country.
Each 配置 规则 includes an 表达式 that defines which 请求s the 规则 applies to, based on properties like URL path, 主机名, or 请求 头部. For more 信息rmation on 表达式s, refer to 表达式s and Edit 表达式s in the 控制面板.
The 数字 of available 配置 规则 varies according to your Cloudflare plan:

/rules/compression-rules/.title: Compression 规则
paragraphs: Use Compression 规则 to customize the compression applied to 响应s from Cloudflare's 全球网络 to your website visitors, based on the file extension and content 类型. Compression 规则 are powered by the 规则et Engine.

Cloudflare compresses some 响应s by 默认, based on the content 类型. With Compression 规则, you can customize the 默认 behavior, which includes defining preferred compression algorithms for particular file 类型s.

When a compression 规则 matches and 列表s several compression algorithms (such as gzip and Brotli), Cloudflare selects the first algorithm from your 列表 that the visitor's browser 支持s. Cloudflare determines browser 支持 from the  HTTP 请求 头部, which browsers send automatically to indicate which compression formats they can decompress. If mul提示le compression 规则 match the same 请求, the last matching 规则 takes precedence.
Alternatively, follow the instructions in the following pages to 快速开始:
创建 a compression 规则 in the 控制面板
创建 a compression 规则 via Cloudflare API
Compression 规则 are available in all Cloudflare plans.
The following 字段s are commonly used in 表达式s of compression 规则:
If a compression 规则 matches but the visitor's browser does not 支持 any of the compression algorithms configured in the 规则 (based on the  请求 头部), the 响应 will not be compressed.

If a compression 规则 matches but the 源服务器's 响应 includes a  HTTP 头部, the compression 规则 will not modify the 响应. 源服务器s use this 头部 to indicate that intermediaries (like Cloudflare) should not alter the 响应 正文.

/rules/page-rules/.title: Page 规则
headings: Page 规则 require proxied DNS 记录s
paragraphs: Page 规则 触发器 one or more 操作s whenever a certain URL pattern is matched. Page 规则 are available in 规则 > Page 规则.
The 默认 数字 of allowed page 规则 depends on the 域名 plan as shown below.
It is 重要 to understand a few Page 规则 behaviors.
Page 规则 require a proxied DNS 记录 for your page 规则 to work. Page 规则 will not apply to 主机名s that do not exist in DNS or are not being directed to Cloudflare.

If you are creating a Page 规则 for a 主机名 that does not have a real 源服务器, you still need a proxied DNS 记录. You can use a reserved IP address or 域名 as a placeholder. The 记录 only needs to exist so that Cloudflare proxies traffic for that 主机名. 创建 one of the following:
Cloudflare recommends using only reserved IP addresses or 域名 names for placeholder 记录s to avoid accidentally 路由 traffic to infrastructure you do not own.
For more 信息rmation on reserved IP addresses or top level 域名s, please refer to these RFCs:
RFC 5737
RFC 3849
RFC 2606
Only the highest priority matching page 规则 takes effect on a 请求.

Page 规则 are prioritized in descending order in the Cloudflare 控制面板, with the highest priority 规则 at the top. For this reason, Cloudflare recommends ordering your 规则 from most specific to least specific.
A page 规则 matches a URL pattern based on the following format (comprised of five segments):
An 示例 URL with all the segments looks like the following:
The  and  segments are 可选. If omitted,  matches both  and  协议s. If no  is specified, the 规则 will match all ports.
When a page 规则 is 已禁用, 操作s will not 触发器, but the 规则 will:
Still appear in the Cloudflare 控制面板.
Be edi表.
Count against the 数字 of 规则 allowed for your 域名.

/rules/origin-rules/.title: 源 规则
paragraphs: 源 规则 allow you to change the 源服务器 that Cloudflare sends a 请求 to, or modify how the 请求 reaches that server. This is useful when you need to 路由 specific 请求s to a different backend, such as a third-party service or a server on a non-standard port. You can perform the following overrides:
Host 头部: Overrides the  头部 of incoming 请求s.
Server Name Indication (SNI): Overrides the Server Name Indication (SNI) 值 of incoming 请求s.
DNS 记录: Overrides the resolved 主机名 of incoming 请求s, sending the 请求 to a different 源服务器.
Destination port: Overrides the resolved destination port of incoming 请求s.
Each 源 规则 includes a 过滤器 表达式 that defines which 请求s the overrides apply to (for 示例, matching on 主机名, path, or other 请求 properties).
If you override the 主机名 with an 源 规则 (via  头部 override or DNS 记录 override) and add a 头部 override to your 负载均衡器 配置, the 源 规则 will take precedence over the 负载均衡器 配置.

Like Page 规则, an 源 规则 performing a  头部 override will 更新 the SNI 值 of the 源al 请求 to the same 值 of the  头部. To set an SNI 值 different from the  头部 override, add an SNI override in the same 源 规则 or 创建 a separate 源 规则 for this purpose.

Cloudflare 规则 allows you to control how Cloudflare handles traffic to your website. For 示例, 重定向ing visitors, rewriting URLs, overriding where 请求s are sent, or customizing Cloudflare 设置 for specific 请求s.
规则 特性 require that your 域名 (or 子域名) has its DNS 记录s proxied through Cloudflare, meaning traffic passes through the Cloudflare network before reaching your 源服务器.

/rules/normalization/.title: URL normalization
paragraphs: Cloudflare provides a URL normalization 特性 to modify the URLs of incoming 请求s so that they conform to a consistent formatting standard. This is 重要 because the same resource can be 请求ed using different URL formats (for 示例,  and  refer to the same path), and without normalization, 安全 规则 and other 特性 might not match all variations of a URL.

When you enable URL normalization, all incoming URLs are normalized before they pass to subsequent 全球网络 特性 that accept a URL input, such as WAF custom 规则, Workers, and Access. 规则 表达式s that 过滤器 traffic based on URLs will therefore 触发器 correctly, regardless of the format of the incoming URL. When URL normalization is 已禁用, Cloudflare forwards the URL to 源 in its 源al form.
:::注意

When traffic is proxied through Cloudflare, certain baseline URL normalization 步骤s are always applied, even if you turn off URL normalization for your 区域. For 示例, Cloudflare always converts two or more adjacent slashes into a single slash (such as  to ). You cannot disable these baseline normalizations.

URL normalization does not perform any  重定向s , and therefore it will not change the address displayed in the visitor's browser. The normalization operation, when 已启用, occurs on the 全球网络 and affects Cloudflare 特性 executed later and (可选ly) the URL received at the 源服务器.
URL normalization is available in all Cloudflare plans.
了解更多 about URL normalization and how to configure URL normalization in the Cloudflare 控制面板.

/rules/custom-errors/.title: Custom 错误
paragraphs: Use Custom 错误 to replace 默认 Cloudflare 错误 pages with your own custom content. Custom 错误 content is shown to visitors when an HTTP 错误 occurs, whether the 错误 comes from your 源服务器, a Cloudflare product (including Cloudflare Workers), or a 安全 challenge.
You can configure custom 错误 content using the following 方法:

**错误 Page**: An HTML page shown to website visitors when a specific 错误 occurs (refer to the different 错误 page 类型s) or when showing a 安全 challenge. 错误 Pages can be defined at the 区域 level and at the 账户 level on 付费计划, with 区域-level 配置s taking precedence.

**Custom 错误 规则**: Defines the 条件s under which Cloudflare will serve a custom 错误 响应 to visitors in case of HTTP 错误 (状态码  and above), and the exact content that will be served. A matching custom 错误 规则 has priority over an 错误 Page configured at the 账户 or at the 区域 level that would apply to the same 错误.
Custom 错误 require that you 代理 the DNS 记录s of your 域名 (or 子域名) through Cloudflare.
Cloudflare has a set of 默认 pages for presenting 错误 and challenges to your website visitors. You can customize those pages using 错误 Pages and Custom 错误 规则.
When an 错误 of a specific 类型 occurs, Cloudflare does the following:
搜索 for a configured 错误 Page at the 账户 level for the specific 错误.
搜索 for a configured 错误 Page at the 区域 level for the specific 错误 (it will have priority over the 账户-level 错误 Page, if any).
搜索 for a matching custom 错误 规则 at the 账户 level. The 规则 will have priority over 500 class and 1000 class 错误 Pages at the 账户 or 区域 level.
搜索 for a matching custom 错误 规则 at the 区域 level. The 规则 will have priority over 500 class and 1000 class 错误 Pages at the 账户 or 区域 level and over custom 错误 规则 at the 账户 level.
If a 安全 规则 like a WAF custom 规则 or a 速率限制 规则 触发器s a custom block 响应 instead of a 默认 Cloudflare WAF block page, the 规则-specific block 响应 will have priority over 错误 Pages or a matching custom 错误 规则.
If any of the previous 配置s apply, serve the custom 错误 content to the visitor. If not, serve the 默认 错误 page for the specific 错误 类型.
:::注意

To customize a challenge page or a block page, use an 错误 Page, since Custom 错误 规则 will not be applied to 安全 操作s 源ating from Cloudflare products. Keep in mind that custom WAF 响应 takes precedence over an 错误 Page and custom 错误 规则.
Custom 错误 are available to all 付费计划. The exact 特性 depend on your Cloudflare plan.

Cloudflare uses a wide range of 错误 codes to identify issues in handling 请求 traffic. By 默认, these 错误 pages mention Cloudflare; however, you can 创建 custom 错误 pages to provide a consistent brand experience for your users.

错误 Pages do not apply to 响应s with an HTTP status code of , , , or . These exceptions help avoid issues with specific API 端点 and other web applications. You can still customize 响应s for these 状态码 using Custom 错误 规则.
If you are on a Cloudflare paid plan, you can 创建 custom 错误 pages at the 区域 level or for your entire 账户. 区域-level 错误 pages have priority over 账户-level 错误 pages.
Additionally, Enterprise customers can customize 5XX 错误 pages (except 错误 -) at their 源 by turning on 源 错误 Pages in 错误 Pages in the 控制面板.
You can design custom 错误 pages to appear during a 安全 challenge or when an 错误 occurs. For more 信息rmation on the different 错误 page 类型s, refer to 错误 page 类型s.
Cloudflare will return the 默认 Cloudflare 错误 page instead of your custom 错误 Pages if the incoming 请求 does not contain an  头部. This does not apply to 响应s 源ating from Custom 错误 规则.
A custom 错误 规则 defines the 条件s under which Cloudflare will serve custom 错误 content to visitors in case of HTTP 错误 (状态码  and above), and the exact content that will be served to visitors.
When defining the content to serve, you provide either an inline 响应 or the URL of an existing webpage. The URL can point to a webpage or to a different resource such as JSON content.

When you provide a URL, Cloudflare will gather any 必需 images, CSS, and JavaScript code and save a minified version of the full page in the Cloudflare 全球网络. This resource is called a custom 错误 asset, which you can use in one or more custom 错误 规则 in the same scope of the asset (区域 or 账户).

When a custom 错误 规则 is 触发器ed, Cloudflare will replace the 正文 with the 响应 you previously defined and (可选ly) the 响应 HTTP status code sent to the visitor. Cloudflare will keep any existing HTTP 响应 头部 except for  and .
Additionally, you can configure 响应 头部 转换 规则 for 错误 响应s to add, change, or remove HTTP 头部 from the 响应.
Custom 错误 规则 have priority over 错误 Pages.

A custom 错误 asset corresponds to a web resource such as an HTML web page (including any 参考d images, CSS, and JavaScript code) that Cloudflare fetches and saves based on a URL you provide, to be served to visitors as an 错误 page.

Once the custom 错误 asset is stored in Cloudflare's 全球网络, the URL you initially provided no longer needs to be available. You can 更新 an existing custom 错误 asset by fetching it again. The metadata associated with each custom 错误 asset includes the timestamp when the last fetch occurred, and this 信息rmation is displayed in the 控制面板.
You can use a custom 错误 asset in one or more custom 错误 规则 in the same scope where you defined the asset (区域 or 账户).

/rules/cloud-connector/.title: Cloud 连接器
paragraphs: Cloud 连接器   allows you to 路由 matching incoming traffic from your website to a public cloud provider that you define: Cloudflare R2 对象存储 or an external provider such as AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure. With Cloud 连接器, you can manage traffic to cloud-hosted content through the same Cloudflare 控制面板 you use for the rest of your website, without having to configure additional 规则.
First, you configure a Cloud 连接器 规则 that specifies:
The cloud provider and a 支持的 cloud service that will accept traffic.
The traffic that will be 路由d to that cloud service.
Then, Cloudflare will 创建 the necessary 配置s so that the content is accessible for 请求s matching your Cloud 连接器 规则. Your 对象存储 存储桶 must be publicly accessible for Cloud 连接器 to work.
Cloud 连接器 规则 are evaluated last in the 请求 evaluation 工作流. When a Cloud 连接器 规则 matches and other 规则 have modified the same 设置 (such as the  头部), the Cloud 连接器 规则 takes precedence.
Cloud 连接器 will perform the following 配置s automatically, de待处理 on the cloud provider:
Modify the  头部.
Adjust SSL/TLS for 存储桶-相关 traffic (AWS S3 website 端点 only).
:::注意[Additional 配置s you may need]
Cloud 连接器 will not apply any of the following 配置s:

**Cache content served from storage 存储桶**: To define custom cache behavior — like when to cache returned 对象s and for how long — you will need to 创建 a cache 规则. For an 示例 规则 配置, refer to Cache Level (Cache Everything).

**创建 URL 重写s**: To adjust the URL structure from what your website visitors use to obtain a resource and the folder structure being used in the storage 存储桶, you will need to 创建 a URL 重写. For 示例, you could 创建 a URL 重写 to remove the  prefix from URI paths before 路由 the 请求 to your 对象存储 存储桶. For an 示例 配置, refer to 重写 path for 对象存储 存储桶.
Cloud 连接器 is available in 测试版 to all customers. The maximum 数字 of 规则 depends on your Cloudflare plan:

/rules/reference/.title: 参考
/rules/reference/.description: 参考 信息rmation for 规则.
paragraphs: Refer to the following pages for more 信息rmation about 规则:

/rules/snippets/.title: Cloudflare Snippets
paragraphs: Cloudflare Snippets allow you to run short pieces of JavaScript code on Cloudflare's network to customize how 请求s and 响应s are handled for your website or application. With Snippets, you can modify HTTP 响应 头部, implement  JWT  validation, perform complex  重定向s , and more.
For code samples addressing common 使用场景, refer to the 示例 section.
To 创建 and 部署 a snippet, you need to define the following elements:
**Snippet 规则**: A 过滤器 表达式 that determines which 请求s the Snippet will be applied to. Each snippet can only be associated with one snippet 规则.
**Code snippet**: JavaScript code that runs on the Cloudflare network when a 请求 matches the associated snippet 规则.
For more 信息rmation, refer to How Snippets work and 创建 a snippet in the 控制面板.
:::注意

If you have used the Cloudflare API to 创建 a code snippet that is not associated with a snippet 规则, the Cloudflare 控制面板 will show that code snippet in a separate tab called Unused Snippets. You can either edit the snippet code and associate it with a snippet 规则, or 删除 the unused code snippet.

Each  sub请求  in a 重定向 chain counts against the sub请求 limit. This means that if a sub请求 was 重定向ed it would count as two sub请求s. To avoid issues, ensure that you make a sub请求 to the end location of the 重定向 chain.
Currently, Version Management does not 支持 Snippets.
Cloudflare Snippets are designed for fast, lightweight logic that runs on the Cloudflare network. The following 限制 apply:
Explore our detailed 指南 for 最佳实践, real-world 使用场景, and 示例 implementations.

/rules/transform/.title: 转换 规则
paragraphs: 转换 规则 allow you to adjust the URI path, 查询 字符串, and HTTP 头部 of 请求s and 响应s on the Cloudflare 全球网络.
There are several 类型s of 转换 规则:
**URL 重写 规则**: 重写 the URL path and 查询 字符串 of an HTTP 请求.
**请求 头部 转换 规则**: Set the 值 of an HTTP 请求 头部 or remove a 请求 头部.
**响应 头部 转换 规则**: Set the 值 of an HTTP 响应 头部 or remove a 响应 头部.
**Managed 转换s**: Perform common adjustments to HTTP 请求 and 响应 头部 with pre-built, one-步骤 配置s.
Alternatively, 创建 a 转换 规则 from scratch in the 控制面板 or via Cloudflare API. Refer to the following sections for detailed instructions:
URL 重写 规则
请求 头部 转换 规则
响应 头部 转换 规则
Managed 转换s
For Terraform 示例, refer to 转换 规则 配置 using Terraform.
Refer to 规则 language for more 信息rmation on 构建ing 表达式s for 转换 规则.
Cloudflare 转换 规则 are available to all customers. 支持 for regular 表达式s depends on your Cloudflare plan.
This 表 outlines the 转换 规则 特性 available with each customer plan:
A Cloudflare user must have the 防火墙 role or one of the Administrator 角色 to access 转换 规则.
Managed 转换s run before other 类型s of 转换 规则 that modify HTTP 头部:
Managed 转换s that adjust HTTP 请求 头部 run before 请求 头部 转换 规则.
Managed 转换s that adjust HTTP 响应 头部 run before 响应 头部 转换 规则.
转换 规则 run in order. 规则 that appear later in the 列表 of 转换 规则 can overwrite changes done by previous 规则. You can define the 规则 order in the 控制面板 or via API.

请求 and 响应 字段s are immu表 within each phase while evaluating 转换 规则 for a 请求/响应. This means that later 规则 in the same phase cannot match on changes made by earlier 规则 (they always use the 源al 字段 值s). For more 信息rmation, refer to 字段 值s during 规则 evaluation.

/rules/url-forwarding/.title: 重定向s
paragraphs: URL forwarding, also known as URL 重定向ion, navigates the user from a source URL to a tar获取 URL with a specific HTTP status code.
Use the following Cloudflare products to perform URL 重定向s, according to your use case:

**Single 重定向s**: Allow you to 创建 static or dynamic 重定向s at the 区域 level (a single 域名 or 子域名). A 通配符-based interface allows you to define source and tar获取 URL patterns without complex 函数s or regular 表达式s, efficiently covering thousands of URLs with a single 规则.

**Bulk 重定向s**: Allow you to define a large 数字 of 重定向s at the 账户 level, which can apply across 域名s in your 账户. These URL 重定向s are essentially static — they do not 支持 字符串 replacement operations or regular 表达式s. However, you can configure 参数 that affect how source URLs are matched and how the 重定向 is performed.
**Snippets**: Use short pieces of JavaScript code for a more flexible way to define complex 重定向 函数ality. Consider a few 示例 to 快速开始.
Single 重定向s and Bulk 重定向s are available on all Cloudflare plans. The exact quotas and 特性 depend on your plan.
For _URL 重定向s across 列表s_, this 表 provides the 默认 quota for the 企业计划. Bulk 重定向s 支持s several million URL 重定向s — to 获取 more 重定向s, contact your 账户 team.
Bulk 重定向s 特性 and quotas are per 账户 and they depend on the highest Cloudflare plan on your 账户.
Single 重定向s 特性 and quotas are per 区域 and depend on the 区域 plan.

/ruleset-engine/reference/.title: 参考
paragraphs: The following pages include additional 信息rmation about the 规则et Engine:

/ruleset-engine/.title: Cloudflare 规则et Engine
/ruleset-engine/.description: 创建 and 部署 规则 and 规则ets across Cloudflare products using the 规则et Engine's powerful syntax and high-性能 evaluation.
paragraphs: The Cloudflare 规则et Engine allows you to 创建 and 部署 规则 and 规则ets in different Cloudflare products using the same basic syntax.
**Powerful syntax**: 规则 表达式s use a powerful 规则 language similar to the wire过滤器 syntax that allows you to 创建 complex 规则.
**High-性能 规则 evaluation**: Allows you to have many 规则 in different Cloudflare products with almost no impact on 性能.

**Engine powering different Cloudflare products**: Cloudflare keeps 构建ing products on top of the 规则et Engine, which means that you can use the same API 方法 for configuring different products, with the same customization possibilities. Additionally, the 规则et Engine 支持s the different phases of the 请求 life cycle at Cloudflare.
The 规则et Engine 支持s different Cloudflare products. Refer to Phases 列表 and to each product's 文档 for details.

/ruleset-engine/reference/phases-list/.title: Phases 列表
paragraphs: The following 表s 列表 the phases of Cloudflare products powered by the 规则et Engine, in the order those phases are executed. Some products such as the Cloudflare Web 应用防火墙 have more than one associated phase.
Network-layer phases apply to packets received on the Cloudflare 全球网络.
Application-layer phases apply to 请求s received on the Cloudflare 全球网络.
The phases execute in the order they appear in the 表.
\* _This phase is for 配置 purposes only — the corresponding 规则 will not be executed at this stage in the 请求 handling process._

/sandbox/api/.title: API 参考
paragraphs: The Sandbox SDK provides a comprehensive API for executing code, managing files, 运行中 processes, and exposing services in isolated sandboxes.
创建 and manage sandbox containers. 获取 sandbox instances, configure
options, and clean up 资源.
Execute commands and stream output. Run scripts, manage background processes,
and capture 执行 results.
读取, write, and manage files in the sandbox filesystem. Includes directory
operations and file metadata.
监控 real-time filesystem changes using native inotify. 构建 development
工具, hot-reload systems, and responsive file processing.
Execute Python and JavaScript code with rich outputs including charts, 表s,
and formatted data.
Expose services 运行中 in the sandbox via preview URLs. Access web servers
and APIs from the internet.
Mount S3-compatible 存储桶s (R2, S3, GCS) as local filesystems for persistent
data storage across sandbox lifecycles.
创建 point-in-time 快照s of directories and 恢复 them with
copy-on-write overlays. Store 备份s in R2.
创建 isolated 执行 contexts within a sandbox. Each 会话 maintains
its own shell state, 环境变量, and working directory.
Connect browser-based terminal UIs to sandbox shells via WebSocket, with the
xterm.js SandboxAddon for automatic reconnection and resize handling.

Preview URLs extract the sandbox ID from the 主机名, which is always lowercase (e.g., ). If you 创建d your sandbox with an uppercase ID like , the URL 路由 to  (a different Durable 对象), making your sandbox unreachable.

headings: 超时 does not kill the process
paragraphs: This 指南 shows you how to execute commands in the sandbox, handle output, and manage 错误 effectively.
The SDK provides mul提示le approaches for 运行中 commands:
**** - Run a command and wait for complete result. Best for one-time commands like 构建s, 安装s, and scripts.
**** - Stream output in real-time. Best for long-运行中 commands where you need immediate 反馈.
**** - Start a background process. Best for web servers, 数据库s, and services that need to keep 运行中.
:::注意
For web servers, 数据库s, or services that need to keep 运行中, use  instead. See the Background processes 指南.
Use  for simple commands that complete quickly:
When passing user input or dynamic 值s, avoid 字符串 interpolation to pr事件 injection attacks:
Commands can fail in two ways:
**Non-zero exit code** - Command ran but 已失败 (result.成功 === false)
**执行 错误** - Command couldn't start (throws exception)
The sandbox 支持s shell 特性 like pipes, 重定向s, and chaining:
Set a maximum 执行 time for commands to pr事件 long-运行中 operations from blocking indefinitely.
Pass  in the options to set a 超时 for a single command:
Set a 默认 超时 for all commands in a 会话 with :
Set the  环境变量 to define a global 默认 超时 for every  call across all 会话s.
When mul提示le 超时s are configured, the most specific 值 wins:
**Per-command**  on  (highest priority)
**会话-level**  on
**Global**  环境变量 (lowest priority)
If none are set, commands run without a 超时.
:::注意

When a command times out, the SDK raises an 错误 and closes the connection. The underlying process continues 运行中 inside the container. To stop a timed-out process, 删除 the 会话 with [](/sandbox/api/会话s/#删除会话) or destroy the sandbox with [](/sandbox/api/lifecycle/#destroy).

**Validate inputs** - Escape or validate user input to pr事件 injection

**Use background processes** - For services that need to keep 运行中 (web servers, 数据库s), use the Background processes 指南 instead

paragraphs: This 指南 shows you how to 监控 filesystem changes in real-time using the Sandbox SDK's file watching API. File watching is useful for 构建ing development 工具, automated 工作流s, and applications that react to file changes as they happen.
The  method returns an SSE (Server-Sent 事件) stream that you consume with . Each 事件 in the stream describes a filesystem change.
Start by watching a directory for any changes:
The stream emits four lifecycle 事件 类型s:
**** — Watch established, includes the
**** — A filesystem change occurred
**** — The watch encountered an 错误
**** — The watch was 已停止
Filesystem change 事件 () include:
**** — File or directory was 创建d
**** — File content changed
**** — File or directory was removed
**** / **** — File or directory was moved or renamed
**** — File attributes changed (权限, timestamps)
Use  patterns to watch only specific file 类型s:
Common include patterns:
— TypeScript files
— JavaScript files
— JSON 配置 files
— Markdown 文档
— Package files specifically
Use  patterns to skip certain directories or files:
:::注意[默认 exclusions]
The following patterns are excluded by 默认: , , . You can override this by providing your own  数组.
触发器 构建s automatically when source files are modified:
Re-run 测试s when 测试 files are modified:
Re-索引 only changed files instead of rescanning an entire directory tree:
Extract 事件 processing into a reusable 函数 that handles stream lifecycle:
Avoid excessive operations by collecting changes before processing:
Watch only the top level of a directory, without descending into subdirectories:
The stream ends naturally when the container sleeps or shuts down. There are two ways to stop a watch early:
Pass an  to . Aborting the signal cancels the stream 读取er, which propagates cleanup to the server. This is the recommended approach when you need to cancel the watch from outside the consuming loop:
Breaking out of the  loop also cancels the stream:
过滤器 with  or  patterns rather than 过滤 事件 in JavaScript. Server-side 过滤 happens at the inotify level, which reduces the 数字 of 事件 sent over the network.
:::注意
and  are mutually exclusive. Use one or the other, not both. If you need to watch specific file 类型s while ignoring certain directories, use  patterns that match the files you want.
错误 in your 事件 处理程序 do not stop the watch stream. Wrap 处理程序 logic in  to pr事件 unhandled exceptions:
Watching a non-existent path returns an 错误. Verify the path exists before starting a watch:
If watching large directories causes 性能 issues:
Use specific  patterns instead of watching everything
Exclude large directories like  and
Watch specific subdirectories instead of the entire project
Use  for shallow 监控
All paths must exist and resolve to within . Relative paths are resolved from .
:::注意[Container lifecycle]
File watchers are automatically 已停止 when the sandbox sleeps or shuts down. If the sandbox wakes up, you must re-establish watches in your application logic.

paragraphs: CardGrid,

} from "~/components";
构建 secure, isolated code 执行 environments

The Sandbox SDK enables you to run untrusted code securely in isolated environments. Built on Containers, Sandbox SDK provides a simple API for executing commands, managing files, 运行中 background processes, and exposing services — all from your Workers applications.

Sandboxes are ideal for 构建ing AI agents that need to execute code, inter活跃 development environments, data analysis 平台s, CI/CD systems, and any application that needs secure code 执行 at the edge. Each sandbox runs in its own isolated container with a full Linux environment, providing strong 安全 boundaries while maintaining 性能.

With Sandbox, you can execute Python scripts, run Node.js applications, analyze data, compile code, and perform complex computations — all with a simple TypeScript API and no infrastructure to manage.
Connect browser terminals directly to sandbox shells via WebSocket. 了解更多: Browser terminals.
Connect to WebSocket servers 运行中 in sandboxes. 了解更多: WebSocket Connections.
快速开始
API 参考
Run shell commands, Python scripts, Node.js applications, and more with 流ing output 支持 and automatic 超时 handling.
读取, write, and manipulate files in the sandbox filesystem. Run background processes, 监控 output, and manage long-运行中 operations.
Expose HTTP services 运行中 in your sandbox with automatically generated preview URLs, perfect for inter活跃 development environments and application hosting.
Execute Python and JavaScript code with rich outputs including charts, 表s, and images. Maintain persistent state between 执行s for AI-generated code and inter活跃 工作流s.

创建 browser-based terminal interfaces that connect directly to sandbox shells via WebSocket. 构建 collaborative terminals, inter活跃 development environments, and real-time shell access with automatic reconnection.
Mount S3-compatible 对象存储 (R2, S3, GCS, and more) as local filesystems. Access 存储桶s using standard file operations with data that persists across sandbox lifecycles. Production 部署 必需.

Keep credentials in your Worker while allowing sandboxes to access external APIs. A Worker 代理 validates short-lived JWT 令牌s from the sandbox and injects real credentials at 请求 time.
构建 powerful applications with Sandbox:

Execute code generated by Large Language Models safely and reliably. Native integration with Workers AI models like GPT-OSS enables 函数 calling with sandbox 执行. Perfect for AI agents, code assistants, and autonomous systems that need to run untrusted code.

无服务器 container 运行时 that powers Sandbox, enabling you to run any containerized workload on the edge.
Run machine learning models and LLMs on the network. Combine with Sandbox for secure AI code 执行 工作流s.
Stateful coordination layer that enables Sandbox to maintain persistent environments with strong 一致性.

paragraphs: Mount S3-compatible 对象存储 存储桶s as local filesystem paths. Access 对象存储 using standard file operations.
:::注意[S3-compatible providers]

The SDK works with any S3-compatible 对象存储 provider. 示例 include Cloudflare R2, Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage, Backblaze B2, MinIO, and many others. The SDK automatically detects and optimizes for R2, S3, and GCS.
Mount S3-compatible 存储桶s when you need:
**Persistent data** - Data survives sandbox destruction
**Large datasets** - Process data without downloading
**Shared storage** - Mul提示le sandboxes access the same data
**Cost-effective persistence** - Cheaper than keeping sandboxes alive
:::注意[Mounting affects entire sandbox]
Mounted 存储桶s are visible across all 会话s since they share the filesystem. Mount once per sandbox.

You can mount R2 存储桶s during local development with  by passing the  option. This uses the R2 绑定 from your Worker environment directly, so no S3-compatible 端点 or credentials are 必需.

The  and  options work the same way in local mode:
During local development, files are synchronized between R2 and the container using a periodic sync process rather than a direct filesystem mount. Keep the following in mind:

**Synchronization window** - A brief delay exists between when a file is written and when it appears on the other side. For 示例, if you upload a file to R2 and then immediately 读取 it from the mounted path in the container, the file may not yet be available. Allow a short window for synchronization to complete before 读取ing recently written data.

**High-frequency writes** - Rapid 成功ive writes to the same file path may take slightly longer to fully propagate. For best results, avoid writing to the same file from both R2 and the container at the same time.
**Bidirectional sync** - Changes made in the container are synced to R2, and changes made in R2 are synced to the container. Both directions follow the same periodic sync model.
These considerations apply to local development with  only. In production, 存储桶 mounts use a direct filesystem mount with no synchronization delay.
:::注意[Automatic cleanup]
Mounted 存储桶s are automatically unmounted when the sandbox is destroyed. Manual unmounting is 可选.
The SDK 支持s any S3-compatible 对象存储. Here are 示例 for common providers:

/sandbox/guides/proxy-requests/.title: 代理 请求s to external APIs
/sandbox/guides/proxy-requests/.description: Keep credentials secure by 路由 sandbox 请求s through a Worker 代理 that injects 身份验证 at 请求 time.
headings: 6. Call the 代理 from the sandbox
代理 returns 404 for the service
paragraphs: When a sandbox needs to call an external API, you might pass credentials directly into the sandbox process. That approach works, but it means the sandbox holds a live credential that any code 运行中 inside it can 读取, copy, or misuse.

The 代理 pattern removes that risk. Your Worker issues a short-lived JWT 令牌 to the sandbox. The sandbox uses that 令牌 for all API 请求s, which go to your Worker first. The Worker validates the JWT and injects the real credential before forwarding the 请求. Real credentials never enter the sandbox.
For a complete multi-service implementation covering GitHub, Anthropic, and R2, refer to the 身份验证 示例.
The 代理 framework 路由 请求s to named services. Each service is a  对象 with three 字段s:
**** — Base URL of the external API to 代理 to
**** — Extracts the JWT from the incoming 请求 (returns  to reject)
**** — Injects the real credential into the forwarded 请求 (or returns a  to short-circuit)
You define only the service-specific logic. The framework handles JWT verification, 路由, and 错误 响应s.
Use the 代理 pattern when you need to:
Call external APIs from sandboxes without exposing credentials
Rotate credentials without reconfiguring sandboxes
Restrict what a sandbox can do (for 示例, limit to specific paths or 方法)
Share one credential across many sandboxes without each holding a copy
For short-lived or low-risk credentials, 环境变量 may be simpler.
A Worker with a Sandbox 绑定 (refer to 快速开始)
The [](https://github.com/panva/jose) package 安装ed in your Worker project for JWT signing
Store the API credential and a 密钥 for signing JWT 令牌s in your Worker:
Generate a strong random 值 for :

The 代理 framework is a self-contained module you copy into your project. Download the [](https://github.com/cloudflare/sandbox-sdk/tree/main/示例/身份验证/src/代理) directory from the 身份验证 示例 and place it at  in your Worker project.
The framework exports:
**** — 创建s the Worker 请求 处理程序 that 路由 and validates 代理 请求s
**** — Issues a signed JWT for a sandbox
**** — The interface your service definitions implement

The  函数 receives the outgoing 请求 and a context 对象 containing  (your Worker environment) and  (the verified 令牌 payload, including ). Return the modified 请求 to forward it, or return a  to short-circuit with an 错误.

The  () and service name () to获取her form the 代理 路由. A 请求 to  is validated and forwarded to .
Inside the sandbox, use the  and  环境变量 to call the 代理. The JWT takes the place of the real credential:
Or from Python 运行中 inside the sandbox:
The real  is never present in the sandbox. The Worker substitutes it transparently.
:::注意[Pointing SDKs at the 代理 URL]

Many API clients and SDKs 默认 to the official API base URL. After setting up the 代理, you need to tell the library to send 请求s to your Worker instead. Most SDKs 支持 an 环境变量 or constructor option to override the base URL.
For 示例, the Anthropic SDK 读取s . Pass your 代理 URL as that 值 and the JWT 令牌 as the API 键:
The SDK then sends all 请求s to your Worker 代理, which validates the 令牌 and forwards them to  with the real 键 injected. Check the 文档 for your API client to find the equivalent base URL setting.
To 代理 additional APIs, define another  and add it to :
Each service is reachable at . The sandbox uses the same JWT 令牌 for all of them.
The JWT is missing, expired, or signed with the wrong 密钥. Verify that:

The same  值 is used to 创建 and verify 令牌s

Avoid sub请求 限制 with WebSocket transport
paragraphs: Since the Sandbox SDK is built on top of the Containers 平台, it shares the same underlying 平台 characteristics. Refer to these pages to understand how 定价 and 限制 work for your sandbox 部署s.
Refer to Containers 限制 for complete details on:
Memory, vCPU, and disk 限制 for concurrent container instances
Instance 类型s and their resource allocations
Image size and storage 限制
When using the Sandbox SDK from Workers or Durable Objects, you are subject to Workers sub请求 限制. By 默认, the SDK uses HTTP transport where each operation (, , , etc.) counts as one sub请求.
**Workers Free**: 50 sub请求s per 请求
**Workers Paid**: 1,000 sub请求s per 请求
Enable WebSocket transport to mul提示lex all SDK calls over a single persistent connection:
With WebSocket transport 已启用:
The WebSocket upgrade counts as one sub请求
All subsequent SDK operations use the existing connection (no additional sub请求s)
Ideal for 工作流s with many SDK operations per 请求
See Transport modes for a complete 指南.
To work within these 限制:
**Right-size your instances** - Choose the appropriate instance 类型 based on your workload 要求
**Clean up unused sandboxes** - Terminate sandbox 会话s when they are no longer needed to free up 资源
**Optimize images** - Keep your custom Dockerfiles lean to reduce image size
**Use WebSocket transport for high-frequency operations** - Enable  to avoid sub请求 限制 when making many SDK calls per 请求

/secrets-store/.title: Cloudflare 密钥 Store
/secrets-store/.description: Use 密钥 Store to encrypt and store sensitive 信息rmation as 密钥 that are securely reusable across your Cloudflare 账户.
paragraphs: Encrypt and store sensitive 信息rmation as 密钥 that are securely reusable across your 账户.
Cloudflare 密钥 Store is a secure, centralized location in which 账户-level 密钥 are stored and managed. The 密钥 are securely encrypted and stored across all Cloudflare 数据中心.
密钥 Store is currently compatible with Cloudflare Workers and AI Gateway. 集成 with other products will be added in the future.

/security-center/get-started/.title: 快速开始
headings: Enable 安全 Insights and start initial scan
paragraphs: 安全 Center scans your Cloudflare 账户 配置 and identifies potential 安全 risks, mis配置s, and vulnerabilities across your 域名s. This 指南 covers the initial 设置.
A Cloudflare 账户.
At least one 区域 (域名 or 子域名) added to your Cloudflare 账户.
安全 Insights scans are 已启用 by 默认. The scan reviews your Cloudflare 账户 设置 and product 配置s across all your 域名s, then 报告 any issues it finds as insights — potential 安全 risks, mis配置s, or vulnerabilities.
To manually start a scan:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Infrastructure** page.
Select **Scan now**.
:::注意
Only 账户s with at least one Business or Enterprise 区域, or 账户s on the Teams Standard or Teams 企业计划, can start manual scans. 所有计划 receive automatic scans.
After you enable 安全 Insights, Cloudflare performs scans automatically on a recurring schedule based on your plan:
For more details, refer to 工作原理.

/security-center/.title: Cloudflare 安全 Center
paragraphs: 快速开始
Cloudflare 安全 Center is available to customers on 所有计划.
The frequency of automatic 安全 scans depends on your Cloudflare plan, ranging from every 7 days on Free, Pro, and 商业计划s to every 3 days on 企业计划s. Refer to Scan frequency for more 信息rmation.
If you have any comments, questions, or bugs to report, 创建 a post in the Cloudflare 社区 forum.
Users with an Administrator 读取 Only role cannot access the Cloudflare 安全 Center.
Only Cloudflare 账户s with at least one Business or Enterprise 区域 (域名 on your 账户), or 账户s on the Teams Standard or Teams 企业计划s, can manually start a 新功能 scan.

/security-center/security-insights/how-i.title: 工作原理
paragraphs: Once you enable 安全 Insights, Cloudflare runs regular 安全 scans on your 账户. These scans check your Cloudflare 账户 设置, DNS 记录 配置s, and product 配置s — such as SSL/TLS, WAF, and Access — across all 域名s in your 账户.

Each scan compares your current 配置 against a set of ideal product 配置s that indicate a strong 安全 posture. When your 配置 does not match an ideal 配置 for one or more checks, the scan produces a 安全 Insight — a finding that represents a potential risk.
The 列表 of insights may include potential 安全 threats, vulnerabilities, compliance risks, insecure 配置s, or any other identified risks.
:::注意
安全 Insights also checks non-proxied (DNS-only) 主机名s. Because these 记录s are not 路由d through Cloudflare, they do not benefit from Cloudflare's application 安全 特性.
Each insight has the following properties:
For a full 列表 of insight 类型s and their descriptions, refer to 安全 Insights.
Eligible 账户s (Business, Enterprise, or Teams plans) can also manually start a scan. Refer to 快速开始 for instructions.

/security/overview/.title: 安全 概述
paragraphs: 安全 概述 provides an 概述 of your 域名's 安全 posture and allows you to quickly identify 安全 操作 items that may need your attention.
To access 安全 概述 in the 新功能 安全 控制面板, go to the 概述 page.

安全 insight
**Criticality**: Your 操作 items are ranked by the highest criticality, showing critical first, moderate, and low respectively.
**过滤器s**: You can 过滤器 your 操作 items by Criticality, Insight 类型, and 安全 Category.

**Review**: Review your 安全 操作 items for more detailed 信息rmation and recommended 操作s to resolve.
**Archiving**: You can archive 安全 操作 items you do not wish to display in the main 列表.
**Load more**: View the full 列表 of 安全 操作 items.
Review the available detection 工具 and what services are currently 运行中 to protect your 域名 against threats.
View the patterns and highlights from your 域名's traffic in the past 30 days.
The Cloudflare 控制面板 displays:

/smart-shield/concepts/connection-reuse/.title: Connection reuse
paragraphs: Smart Shield leverages Cloudflare's optimized infrastructure to package mul提示le 请求s from an upper-tier into a single connection to your 源. This means overall connections to your 源 are lowered by 30% on average. Refer to the blog post for details.

Implemented by HTTP/1.1, connection reuse describes mul提示le 请求s passing through one same connection (between one source IP:port and one destination IP:port). It is commonly the case even for simple websites nowadays.

For 示例, when a connection is initiated for , several embedded sub资源 may be 请求ed - CSS, image files, advertisement, etc. This can mean hundreds of 请求s just for the website to load. Instead of having a one to one ratio of 请求 per connection, a single connection is used for mul提示le 请求s.
With HTTP/2, 请求s can use the same connection even if they are for different 域名s (also known as connection coalescing).
For 示例, a connection initiated for  can be used for 请求s for  as well - as long as the 请求s have the same destination IP:port and the server TLS 证书 is authoritative for both 主机名s.
Connection reuse and connection coalescing are also considered when allocating your Dedicated CDN Egress IPs.

Dedicated CDN Egress IPs will be available for other plans in the future.

/smart-shield/.title: Cloudflare Smart Shield
/smart-shield/.description: Use Smart Shield to protect your 源服务器, improve content 可用性, and reduce network 延迟.
paragraphs: Safeguard your 源 with just a few clicks.

Smart Shield acts as an intermediate 缓存 layer between Cloudflare's 内容分发网络 and your 源服务器, consolidating mul提示le 请求s from various locations into a single 请求. Combined with connection reuse, this approach significantly reduces 源 load while improving website and application 性能.
Learn how to 快速开始.
Cache stores copies of frequently accessed content (such as images, videos, or webpages) in geographically distributed 数据中心 that are located closer to end users than 源服务器s, improving website 性能.

Observatory uses synthetic 测试s and real user data to assess the 性能 of your website, producing different 指标 and insights. Cloudflare then uses this analysis to recommend 优化s that best address your 性能 issues.

Some services you run may require knowledge of the true client IP. In those cases, you can use a 代理 协议 for Cloudflare to pass on the client IP to your service. Sending 代理 信息rmation along is dependent on whether TCP or UDP is used. For TCP, Spectrum 支持s adding 代理 协议 v1, which is the human 读取able version 支持的 by Amazon ELB and NGINX. 代理 协议 prepends every connection with a 头部 reporting the client IP address and port.

A 代理 协议 binary 头部 for a IPv6 incoming address has the format:
When using Spectrum for UDP, the client source IP and port 信息rmation can be obtained by using Simple 代理 协议, a lightweight 协议 developed specifically for UDP.
To enable it, select Configure on a Spectrum application and toggle the setting for Simple 代理 协议 to On.

Simple 代理 协议 dictates that your 源 must also prepend packets meant for the client with the same 头部, including 源al client source 信息rmation. This is done to validate that packets coming in are in fact intended for the client.

/spectrum/about/ddos-for-spectrum/.title: DDoS Protection for Spectrum
paragraphs: Spectrum provides DDoS Protection at layers 3-4 of the OSI model, that is against TCP and UDP based DDoS attacks.

Spectrum works as a layer 4 反向代理, therefore a proper TCP connection must be first established before traffic is proxied to the 源. This moves any impact of SYN or SYN-ACK reflection attacks to the Cloudflare 全球网络. Additionally, by using Spectrum in front of your application, your 源 IP is concealed — pr事件ing attackers from tar获取ing your 源服务器 directly. It is also recommended that you replace your 源 IP address after moving to Cloudflare, and lock it down to only accept traffic from Cloudflare’s IP address range.

Random or out-of-state TCP packets should not be passed to the 源 if a legitimate TCP connection has not yet been established between the client and Cloudflare. Spectrum also leverages SYN Cookie challenges as part of the Linux networking stack to defend against floods.

Furthermore, if a flood of packets of an unspecified 协议 tar获取 your application (for 示例, your Spectrum application is for TCP traffic, and a UDP flood tar获取s your Spectrum application), the packets will be dropped. Similarly, if packets tar获取 a port or port range that you did not specify, they will also be dropped.

L3/4 DDoS attacks should be detected and mitigated by the Network-layer DDoS Attack Protection managed 规则et that is 已启用 by 默认. This 规则et detects and mitigates DDoS attacks by dynamically fingerprinting attacks based on packet 头部 字段s.

For protecting HTTP/S applications against L7 DDoS attacks and to benefit from 缓存 and additional 特性, onboard your application to Cloudflare’s Web 应用防火墙/内容分发网络 service, which works in tandem with Cloudflare Spectrum.
Refer to Cloudflare DDoS Protection to 了解更多.

/speed/aim/.title: Aggregated Internet Measurement
paragraphs: Aggregated Internet Measurement (AIM) helps you understand your Internet quality to identify scenarios that your Internet connection is good or bad for. Typically, an Internet speed 测试 provides you with upload and download speeds, which may not always provide a ho列表ic view of your Internet quality.
AIM uses a scoring rubric that assigns point 值s based on speed 测试s to help you understand how your Internet quality will perform for 流ing, gaming, and webchat/real-time communication (RTC).
AIM analyzes the following 指标 to generate your score:
延迟
Packet Loss
Download
Upload
Loaded 延迟
Jitter

After the 测试 is run and a point 值 is assigned to each metric, the points are translated to a network score for 流ing, gaming, and webchat/RTC.  These scores will indicate how good your Internet is in each of these scenarios.
The possible network scores are:
Bad
Poor
Average
Good
Great
You have a few options to help improve network scores.
**Switch to a wired connection.** When possible, switch to a wired connection instead of wireless to avoid 性能 issues due to radio interference and signal strength.

**Move closer to your 路由r.** If you are unable to use a wired connection, try to move closer to your wireless 路由r. Signal strength drops as you move away from your wireless 路由r and a weaker signal means poorer connectivity. Keep in mind that any 对象s or materials between you and your wireless 路由r can also have a negative impact on signal strength.
**Upgrade your 路由r.** Ensure you are using a 路由r capable of handling smarter 队列ing with hardware that will not fall over under load.

**Contact your ISP.** If you’re using a wired connection or have a good connection to your wireless 路由r and are still seeing issues, you may have issues with your Internet connection and should reach out to your ISP.

/speed/observatory/.title: Observatory (测试版)
paragraphs: Observatory uses synthetic 测试s and real user data from browsers to assess the 性能 of your website. These data sources produce 指标 that provide different 类型s of insights into your website’s 性能. Cloudflare then uses the analysis run by Observatory to recommend 优化s with the 工具 that best suit your 性能 issues.

As its name suggests, synthetic 测试 uses servers to simulate the 条件s that a user might encounter when accessing your website. This has the advantage of being consistent, as the 条件s are easily replicated each time the 测试 is run. It also allows you to have an analysis of how a code change might affect the overall 性能 of your website, as well as 测试 any URL you want. However, due to its synthetic nature, it cannot replicate the b读取th and diversity of different 条件s that real users will experience.
Observatory provides two different 类型s of synthetic 测试s:
The browser 测试 loads the 请求ed page in a headless browser and runs Google Lighthouse on it. This 报告 键 性能 指标 and provides light suggestions for improvement.
The network 测试 is focused on giving a detailed breakdown of the network and back-end 性能 of an 端点. For more 信息rmation on 指标 collected, refer to Network 监控 指标.

You can also compare network 测试s in Observatory by selecting any two completed 测试s. The results for each 测试 are displayed side by side as histograms, allowing you to easily visualize and compare the full distribution of data points across both 测试s.

Real user 监控 (also known as RUM), on the other hand, captures real 指标 from real users accessing a website. This provides 信息rmation that synthetic 测试s cannot capture, as users might access your website from different parts of the world, with different network 条件s, ISPs, browsers and computer hardware. However, RUM data is only applied to your own website. Real user data also includes two user inter操作 指标 that synthetic 测试s do not offer - First Input Delay (FID) and Inter操作 to Next Paint (INP).
Free customers have RUM 已启用 automatically, with EU traffic excluded, and can switch it off if they prefer. Customers on other plans may enable RUM as needed.
Run 测试

/speed/observatory/run-speed-test/.title: Run 测试
/speed/observatory/run-speed-test/.description: Learn how to use Cloudflare's Observatory to assess the 性能 of your website.
paragraphs: In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Synthetic 监控** page.
Enter the URL you want to 测试. The URL must belong to the 区域 you are 测试 from.
Select the 测试 类型 you want to use: **Browser** or **Network 测试s**.
Select the **Region** the automated browser will use.

De待处理 on your plan you can select to run the 测试 **once**, **daily** or **weekly**. Refer to the Quotas section for 信息rmation on the 测试 frequency available for your plan. 注意 that these 限制 may change over time.

After the 测试 finishes 运行中, you will 获取 a Lighthouse score and you will have access to the 列表 of the 测试s run. The 测试 result page will give you details regarding the 性能 of your website, both for the desktop and mobile versions. Refer to Understand 测试 results for more 信息rmation.

Observatory shows you a Recommendations tab, de待处理 on the results from 测试 your website. The Recommendations section shows you the opportunities to improve your website that were identified based on the Lighthouse audits and recommends Cloudflare 特性 or products that will help you improve those 指标. We also show you the potential savings you will 获取 by enabling the recommended 特性 or products.

In the 测试ed URLs 表, in the last column, you can select the three dots > View history report, and you will have access to the Trend 表 that will show your website’s 性能 指标 over time and a History report of all the 测试s you run on your website.
Once a 测试 has been run, you can enable RUM data in the 测试 results page:
Go to **Observatory** and select **Enable RUM**. You can choose to enable globally or enable everywhere except the EU.
Once RUM data is 运行中 on your site, you can access **Real user measurements** on your 测试 results page. Usually it takes less than five minutes to see the data coming in, but it will depend on traffic.
Refer to Understand 测试 results for more 信息rmation about the results provided by real user data.
RUM uses a lightweight JavaScript beacon to collect the 信息rmation Observatory uses. It does not use any client-side state, such as Cookies or , to collect usage 指标.
Quota 限制 for the 数字 of 测试s you can run per month are currently the following:
Available Regions (所有计划):

/ssl/edge-certificates/additional-option.title: Customize cipher suites
headings: 设置 priority and ciphers order
paragraphs: With an Advanced 证书 Manager subscription, you can restrict connections between Cloudflare and clients — such as your visitor's browser — to specific cipher suites.
You may want to do this to follow specific recommendations, to disable weak cipher suites, or to comply with industry standards.
Customizing cipher suites will not lead to any 停机时间 in your SSL/TLS protection.
:::注意[Cloudflare for SaaS]
If you are a SaaS provider looking to restrict cipher suites for connections to custom 主机名s, this can be configured with a Cloudflare for SaaS subscription. Refer to TLS management instead.
Custom cipher suites is a 主机名-level setting, which implies that:
When you customize cipher suites for a 区域, this will affect all 主机名s within that 区域. If you are not familiar with what a Cloudflare 区域 is, refer to Fundamentals.
The 配置 is applicable to all edge 证书s used to connect to the 主机名(s), regardless of the 证书 类型 (universal, advanced, or custom).
If you need to use a per-主机名 cipher suite customization, you must ensure that the 主机名 is specified on the 证书.
Currently, you have the following options:
Set custom cipher suites for a 区域: either via API or on the 控制面板.
Set custom cipher suites per-主机名: only available via API. Refer to the how-to for details.
:::注意
This 文档 only refers to connections between clients and the Cloudflare network. For connections between Cloudflare and your 源服务器, refer to 源服务器 > Cipher suites.
Cloudflare uses the 主机名 priority logic to determine which setting to apply.

ECDSA cipher suites are prioritized over RSA, and Cloudflare preserves the specified cipher suites in the order they are set. This means that, if both ECDSA and RSA are used, Cloudflare presents the ECDSA ciphers first - in the order they were set - and then the RSA ciphers, also in the order they were set.

Once you have chosen your edge 证书, choose an 加密 mode.
加密 modes specify how Cloudflare encrypts connections between (a) visitors and Cloudflare, and (b) Cloudflare and your 源服务器. For more context about this two-part process refer to the concepts page.

注意 that some 加密 modes will require you to have a valid 源 证书, which is managed on your 源服务器. Each 加密 mode 设置 page 列表s out this and other 要求 and you can also consider other Cloudflare options to use with your 源服务器, such as 源 CA 证书s.

/ssl/edge-certificates/changing-dcv-meth.title: Delegated
paragraphs: Delegated DCV allows 区域s with partial DNS 设置s - meaning authoritative DNS is not provided by Cloudflare - to delegate the DCV process to Cloudflare.
DCV Delegation requires you to place a one-time 记录 that allows Cloudflare to auto-re新功能 all future 证书 orders, so that there’s no manual intervention at the time of the re新功能al.
:::注意
DCV Delegation will not work with Universal 证书s and requires the use of an Advanced 证书.
You should use Delegated DCV when all of the following 条件s are true:
Your 区域 is using a partial DNS 设置.
Cloudflare is not al读取y performing DCV automatically.
Your 区域 is using an Advanced 证书.
The 证书 Authority is either Google Trust Services, SSL.com, or Let's Encrypt
As explained in the announcement blog post, currently, you can only delegate DCV to one provider at a time. This means:
If you also issue publicly trusted 证书s for the same 主机名 for your 源服务器, this will no longer be possible. You can use Cloudflare 源 CA 证书s instead.

If your 区域 is using mul提示le CDN providers, you might want to use an alternative method. This is because, once the DCV delegation is configured for Cloudflare, only Cloudflare will be able to perform DCV on your behalf, blocking your external CDN providers from doing the same.
To 设置 Delegated DCV:
Order an advanced 证书 for your 区域, choosing  as the **证书 validation method**.
On the **Edge 证书s** page, go to **DCV Delegation for Partial 区域s**.
Copy the Cloudflare validation URL.
At your authoritative DNS provider, 创建  记录(s) considering the following:
If your 证书 only covers the apex 域名 and a 通配符, you only need to 创建 a single  记录 for your apex 域名. Any direct 子域名s will be covered as well.
If your 证书 also covers 子域名s specified by their name, you will need to add mul提示le  记录s to your authoritative DNS provider, one for each specific 子域名.
For 示例, a 证书 covering , , and  would require the following 记录s.
Once the  记录s are in place, Cloudflare will add TXT DCV 令牌s for every 主机名 on the Advanced 证书 that has a DCV delegation 记录 in place, as long as the 区域 is 活跃 on Cloudflare.
Because DCV happens regularly, do not remove the  记录(s) at your authoritative DNS provider. Otherwise, Cloudflare will not be able to perform DCV on your behalf and your 证书 will not be issued.
If you use a  command to 测试, you should only be able see the placed 令牌s if the 证书 is up for issuance.
This is because Cloudflare places the 令牌s when needed and then cleans them up.

If a 主机名 becomes unreachable during 证书 re新功能al time, the 证书 will not be able to be re新功能ed automatically via Delegated DCV. Should you need to re新功能 a 证书 for a 主机名 that is not resolving currently, you can send a PATCH 请求 to the changing DCV method API 端点 and change the method to TXT to proceed with manual re新功能al per the TXT DCV method.
Once the 主机名 becomes resolvable again, Delegated DCV will resume working as expected.
If you move your 区域 to another 账户, you will need to 更新 the  记录 at your authoritative DNS provider with a 新功能 validation URL.

/ssl/.title: Cloudflare SSL/TLS
/ssl/.description: Cloudflare SSL/TLS offers free Universal SSL alongside advanced and enterprise 特性 to meet your 加密 and 证书 management needs.
paragraphs: Encrypt your web traffic to pr事件 data theft and other tampering.
Through Universal SSL, Cloudflare is the first Internet 性能 and 安全 company to offer free SSL/TLS protection.
Cloudflare SSL/TLS also provides a 数字 of other 特性 to meet your 加密 要求 and 证书 management needs. Refer to 快速开始 for more.
Extending the protection offered by Universal SSL, Total TLS is an easy way to automatically issue 证书s for all levels of 子域名s that you have.
Even if you use a different provider for authoritative DNS, you can delegate 域名 control validation (DCV) to Cloudflare, reducing the need of manual intervention.
Cloudflare also allows you to specify the minimum TLS version that visitors must use to connect to your website or application, and restrict cipher suites according to your 安全 要求.
Refer to 特性 and 可用性 for a complete 列表 of SSL/TLS 特性 and their 可用性 according to different Cloudflare plans.
When you use Cloudflare DNS, all DNS queries for your 域名 are answered by Cloudflare's global anycast network. This network delivers 性能 and global 可用性.
Cloudflare for SaaS allows you to extend the 安全 and 性能 优势 of Cloudflare's network to your customers via their own custom or vanity 域名s.
