headings: 测试 支持的 TLS versions
paragraphs: Minimum TLS Version only allows HTTPS connections from visitors that 支持 the selected TLS 协议 version or 新功能er.
For 示例, if TLS 1.1 is selected, visitors attempting to connect using TLS 1.0 will be rejected. Visitors attempting to connect using TLS 1.1, 1.2, or 1.3 (if 已启用) will be allowed to connect.
:::注意
If you are looking to restrict cipher suites, refer to Customize cipher suites. For guidance on which TLS version to use, refer to TLS 协议s.
It is not possible to configure minimum TLS version for Cloudflare Pages 主机名s.
You can disable TLS 1.0 by choosing a higher minimum TLS version.
All users can apply this 配置 to all 主机名s in their 区域s following the 步骤s under 区域-level.
If you have an Advanced 证书 Manager subscription, you also have the option to disable TLS 1.0 (or other versions) with a per-主机名 设置.
:::注意
The Minimum TLS version that you 设置 following these 步骤s does not apply to R2 自定义域名. To control the TLS version for R2 自定义域名, refer to the 自定义域名 文档.
To manage the TLS version applied to your whole 区域 when proxied through Cloudflare:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **Edge 证书s** page.
For **Minimum TLS Version**, select an option.
Use the Edit 区域 setting 端点 with  as the setting name in the URI path, and specify your preferred minimum version in the  字段.
In the following 示例, the minimum TLS version for the 区域 will be set to . Replace the 区域 ID and API 令牌 placeholders with your 信息rmation, and adjust the  字段 with your chosen TLS version.
Advanced 证书 Manager users also have the option to specify minimum TLS versions per specific 主机名s in their Cloudflare 区域.
This is currently only available via the API:
Use the Edit TLS setting for 主机名 端点 to specify different 值s for .
Use the 删除 TLS setting for 主机名 端点 to clear previously defined  setting.
Cloudflare uses the 主机名 priority logic to determine which setting to apply.
In the following 示例, the minimum TLS version for a specific 主机名 will be set to . Replace the 区域 ID, 主机名, and 身份验证 placeholders with your 信息rmation, and adjust the  字段 with your chosen TLS version.
If you are a SaaS provider looking to configure minimum TLS version for your custom 主机名s, refer to the Cloudflare for SaaS TLS management.

/ssl/edge-certificates/additional-option.title: Total TLS
headings: 主机名s used with other Cloudflare products
paragraphs: Total TLS allows Cloudflare to issue individual 证书s for your proxied 主机名s. These 证书s will protect proxied 主机名s not covered by Universal 证书s.
:::注意
When issued, these 证书s will have a 类型 of Advanced - Total TLS, and their 默认 validity period is 90 days.
Total TLS is available for 域名s that have purchased Advanced 证书 Manager and are currently using a full DNS 设置.
Total TLS does not issue 证书s for any 主机名s used with:
Cloudflare Load Balancing
Cloudflare Tunnel
Cloudflare Spectrum
You can use other 类型s of 证书s or manually order advanced 证书s for these 主机名s.
Once you enable Total TLS, be careful deleting any Total TLS 证书s associated with proxied 主机名s.
If you do, our system assumes you want to opt that 主机名 out of Total TLS 证书 and will not order 新功能 证书s for the 主机名 in the future. This behavior applies even if you 删除 and re-创建 the 主机名's DNS 记录.

/stream/viewing-videos/securing-your-str.title: Secure your Stream
headings: Making a video require signed URLs
Two Ways to Generate Signed 令牌s
Option 1: Using the /令牌 端点
Option 2: Using a signing 键 to 创建 signed 令牌s
步骤 1: Call the  端点 _once_ to obtain a 键
步骤 2: Generate 令牌s using the 键
paragraphs: By 默认, videos on Stream can be viewed by anyone with just a video id. If you want to make your video private by 默认 and only give access to certain users, you can use the signed URL 特性. When you mark a video to require signed URL, it can no longer be accessed publicly with only the video id. Instead, the user will need a signed url 令牌 to watch or download the video.
Here are some common 使用场景 for using signed URLs:
Restricting access so only logged in members can watch a particular video
Let users watch your video for a limited time period (ie. 24 hours)
Restricting access based on geolocation
Turn on  to protect a video using signed URLs. This option will pr事件 _any public links_, such as  or the built-in player, from working.
Restricting viewing can be done by updating the video's metadata.
响应:
You can program your app to generate 令牌s in two ways:

**Low-volume or 测试: Use the  端点 to generate a short-lived signed 令牌.** This is recommended for 测试 purposes or if you are generating less than 1,000 令牌s per day. It requires making an API call to Cloudflare for each 令牌, _which is subject to 速率限制._ The 默认 result is valid for 1 hour. This method does not 支持 Live WebRTC.

**Recommended: Use a signing 键 to 创建 令牌s.** If you have thousands of daily users or need to generate a high volume of 令牌s, as with Live WebRTC, you can 创建 令牌s yourself using a signing 键. This way, you do not need to call a Stream API each time you need to generate a 令牌, and is therefore _not_ a rate-limited operation.
You can call the  端点 for any video that is marked private to 获取 a signed URL 令牌 which expires in one hour. This method does not 支持 Live WebRTC.
You will see a 响应 similar to this if the 请求 succeeds:
To render the video or use assets like manifests or thumbnails, use the  值 in place of the video/input ID. For 示例, to use the Stream player, replace the ID between  and  with the 令牌: .
Similarly, if you are using your own player, retrieve the HLS or DASH manifest by replacing the video ID in the manifest URL with the  值:

If you call the  端点 without any 正文, it will return a 令牌 that expires in one hour without any other restrictions or access to downloads. This 令牌 can be customized by providing additional properties in the 请求:
However, if you are generating 令牌s programmatically or adding customizations like these, it is faster and more scalable to use a signing 键 and generate the 令牌 within your application entirely.
If you are generating a high-volume of 令牌s, using Live WebRTC, or need to customize the access 规则, generate 新功能 令牌s using a signing 键 so you do not need to call the Stream API each time.
The 响应 will return  and  值s.

These 值s will not be shown again so we recommend saving them securely right away. If you are using Cloudflare Workers, you can store them using 密钥. If you are using another 平台, store them in secure 环境变量.
You will use these 值s later to generate the 令牌s. The pem and jwk 字段s are base64-encoded, you must decode them before using them (an 示例 of this is shown in 步骤 2).
Once you generate the 键 in 步骤 1, you can use the  or  值s to generate self-signing URLs on your own. Using this method, you do not need to call the Stream API each time you are creating a 新功能 令牌.
Here's an 示例 Cloudflare Worker script which generates 令牌s that expire in 60 minutes and only work for users accessing the video from UK. In lines 2 and 3, you will configure the  and  值s from 步骤 1:
If you are using the Stream Player, insert the  值 returned by the Worker in 步骤 2 in place of the , replacing the entire 字符串 located between  and :
If you are using your own player, replace the video id in the manifest url with the  值:

To allow access to MP4 or audio downloads, make sure the video has the download 类型 al读取y 已启用. Then add  to the payload as shown in the comment above when generating the signed URL. Replace the video id in the download URL with the  值:
You can 创建 up to 1,000 键s and rotate them at your convenience.
Once revoked all 令牌s 创建d with that 键 will be invalidated.
Each access规则 must include 2 必需 properties:

De待处理 on the 规则 类型, access规则 支持 2 additional properties:
: an 数组 of 2-letter country codes in ISO 3166-1 内测版 2 format.

: an 数组 of ip ranges. It is recommended to include both IPv4 and IPv6 variants in a 规则 if possible. Having only a single variant in a 规则 means that 规则 will ignore the other variant. For 示例, an IPv4-based 规则 will never be applicable to a viewer connecting from an IPv6 address. CIDRs should be preferred over specific IP addresses. Some devices, such as mobile, may change their IP over the course of a view. Video Access Control are evaluated continuously while a video is being viewed. As a result, overly strict IP 规则 may disrupt playback.
_示例 1: Block views from a specific country_

The first 规则 matches on country, US, DE, and MX here. When that 规则 matches, the block 操作 will have the 令牌 considered invalid. If the first 规则 doesn't match, there are no further 规则 to evaluate. The behavior in this situation is to consider the 令牌 valid.
_示例 2: Allow only views from specific country or IPs_
The first 规则 matches on country, US and MX here. When that 规则 matches, the allow 操作 will have the 令牌 considered valid. If it doesn't match we continue evaluating 规则
The second 规则 is an IP 规则 matching on CIDRs, 93.184.216.0/24 and 2400:cb00::/32. When that 规则 matches, the allow 操作 will consider the 规则 valid.
If the first two 规则 don't match, the final 规则 of any will match all remaining 请求s and block those views.

/stream/.title: Cloudflare Stream
paragraphs: 无服务器 live and on-demand video 流ing
Cloudflare Stream lets you or your end users upload, store, encode, and deliver live and on-demand video with one API, without configuring or maintaining infrastructure.
You can use Stream to 构建 your own video 特性 in websites and native apps, from simple playback to an entire video 平台.

Stream automatically encodes and delivers videos using the H.264 codec with adaptive bitrate 流ing, 支持ing resolutions from 360p to 1080p. This ensures smooth playback across different devices and network 条件s.
Cloudflare Stream runs on Cloudflare’s global cloud network in hundreds of cities worldwide.
快速开始   Stream 控制面板
Restrict access to paid or authenticated content with signed URLs.
Let users in your app upload videos directly to Stream with a unique, one-time upload URL.
Play on-demand and live video on websites, in native iOS and Android apps, and dedicated 流ing devices like Apple TV.
Understand and analyze which videos and live 流s are viewed most and break down 指标 on a per-creator basis.
Join the Stream developer 社区

/stream/getting-analytics/.title: 分析
paragraphs: Stream provides server-side 分析 that can be used to:
Identify most viewed video content in your app or 平台.
Identify where content is viewed from and when it is viewed.
Understand which creators on your 平台 are publishing the most viewed content, and analyze trends.
You can access data on either:
The Stream **分析** page of the Cloudflare 控制面板.
The GraphQL 分析 API.
Users will need the 分析 permission to access 分析 via Dash or GraphQL.

/stream/uploading-videos/direct-creator-.title: Direct creator uploads
headings: Direct creator uploads with tus 协议
步骤 1: Your backend provisions a one-time upload URL
步骤 2: Your end user's client uploads directly to Stream
paragraphs: Direct creator uploads let your end users upload videos directly to Cloudflare Stream without exposing your API 令牌 to clients. You can implement direct creator uploads using either a basic POST 请求 or the tus 协议. Use this chart to decide which method to use:
:::注意[Billing considerations]

Whether you use basic  or tus 协议, you must specify a maximum duration to reserve for the user's upload to ensure it can be accommodated within your available storage. This duration will be deducted from your 账户's available storage until the user's upload is received. Once the upload is processed, its actual duration will be counted and the remaining reservation will be released. If the video 错误 or is not received before the link expires, the entire reservation will be released.
For a detailed breakdown of 定价 and 示例 scenarios, refer to 定价.
If your end user's video is under 200 MB and their connection is reliable, we recommend using this method. If your end user's connection is unreliable, we recommend using the tus 协议 instead.
To enable direct creator uploads with a  请求:
Generate a unique, one-time upload URL using the Direct upload API.
With the  from the previous 步骤, users can upload video files that are limited to 200 MB in size. Refer to the 示例 请求 below.
A 成功ful upload returns a  HTTP status code 响应. If the upload does not meet
the upload constraints defined at time of creation or is larger than 200 MB in size, the 响应 returns a  HTTP status code.

If your end user's video is over 200 MB, you must use the tus 协议. Even if the file is under 200 MB, if the end user's connection is potentially unreliable, Cloudflare recommends using the tus 协议 because it is resumable. For detailed 信息rmation about tus 协议 要求, additional client 示例, and upload options, refer to Resumable and large files (tus).
The following diagram shows how the two 步骤s of this process interact:
:::注意

Before provisioning the one-time upload URL, your backend must obtain the file size from the end user. The tus 协议 requires the  头部 when creating the upload 端点. In a browser, you can 获取 the file size from the selected file's  property (for 示例, ).
The 示例 below shows how to 构建 a Worker that returns a one-time upload URL to your end users. The one-time upload URL is returned in the  头部 of the 响应, not in the 响应 正文.
Use your backend 端点 directly in your tus client. Refer to the below 示例 for a complete demonstration of how to use the backend from 步骤 1 with the uppy tus client.
For more details on using tus and 示例 client code, refer to Resumable and large files (tus).

You can apply the same constraints as Direct Creator Upload via basic upload when using tus. To do so, you must pass the  and  as part of the  请求 头部 as part of the first 请求 (made by the Worker in the 示例 above.) The  值s are ignored from subsequent 请求s that do the actual file upload.

The  头部 should contain 键-值 对s. The 键s are text and the 值s should be encoded in base64. Separate the 键 and 值s by a space, _not_ an equal sign. To join mul提示le 键-值 对s, include a comma with no additional spaces.
In the 示例 below, the  头部 is instructing Stream to only accept uploads with max video duration of 10 minutes, uploaded prior to the expiry timestamp, and to make this video private:
is the base64 encoded 值 for "600" (or 10 minutes).
is the base64 encoded 值 for "2024-02-27T07:20:50Z" (an RFC3339 format timestamp)
After the creation of a unique one-time upload URL, you should retain the unique identifier () returned in the 响应 to track the progress of a user's upload.
You can track upload progress in the following ways:
Use the 获取 video details API 端点 with the .
创建 a webhook subscription to receive 通知 about the video status. These 通知 include the .

/style-guide/.title: Style 指南
/style-guide/.description: Improve your contributions to Cloudflare's 文档. Ensure 一致性, professionalism, and clarity in your content across all products.
paragraphs: Use this 指南 when writing any content for product, including the 控制面板 and 文档.
Understanding Cloudflare style is the first 步骤 in being able to write, review, and edit 文档. Adhering to Cloudflare style ensures 一致性 across the company's 文档 and promotes the following 优势:
A professional and reliable product image
A seamless customer experience across Cloudflare products
Minimized customer confusion
Simplified translation process
To contribute to the 文档, visit the contributor 指南.

/style-guide/contributions/.title: Contributions
headings: After you 创建 an issue or PR
paragraphs: The Cloudflare Docs are open source and hosted on the cloudflare-docs repository on GitHub. This means that anyone, including those who are not part of the Cloudflare organization, can contribute to them. We welcome all suggestions that help keep our docs high quality and up to date.
To contribute to our docs, you will need to 创建 an 账户 on GitHub (if you do not have one al读取y) and 登录. Then you have three options:
GitHub issue: Quickly submit a general suggestion.
Quick edit (edit button): Quickly 创建 a pull 请求. This is best if you want to edit a single page in your web browser and do not need to preview your changes.

Full development: 创建 a pull 请求. This is best if you want to edit mul提示le pages and preview your changes. This can be done in your web browser (with Codespaces) or on your local machine (with Visual Studio Code).
In addition to using the Cloudflare Style 指南 for guidance on grammar and style, we recommend browsing our components to add additional formatting such as buttons, tabs, and collapsible sections.
To 创建 a GitHub issue:
登录 to GitHub and go to the cloudflare-docs repository.
Select **Issues** and then **新功能 issue**.
Select the issue 类型, fill out the form, and select **创建**.
了解更多 about creating GitHub issues.
To quickly 创建 a pull 请求 using the edit button:
登录 to GitHub.
Go to the page you want to edit in the Cloudflare Docs
Select  Every page in the Cloudflare Docs (including this one) has an **Edit** button on the right sidebar and an **Edit page** button on the very bottom of the page.
The page's Markdown opens.
:::注意

The first time you 创建 a pull 请求 in the cloudflare-docs repo, you will see a GitHub landing page that says "You need to fork this repository to propose changes." Select Fork this repository. All of your future pull 请求s for cloudflare-docs will write to a 新功能 branch on your fork.
Make your edits and select **Commit changes**.
In the form, 更新 the **Commit 消息** with the product you changed in brackets and a brief description of your changes. For 示例 “[Images] Fixed broken link."
更新 the **Extended description** with more details about what you changed and why. The more details, the better.
Select **Propose changes** > **创建 pull 请求** > **创建 pull 请求** again.
To edit and 创建 a pull 请求 with the full development 工作流:
登录 to GitHub and fork the cloudflare-docs repository.
If you are editing in your web browser (with Codespaces), move on to 步骤 3.
If you are editing on your local machine (with Visual Studio Code):
(必需) 安装 Node.js (version 22 or later).
(Recommended, but not 必需) 安装 Volta for easier package management.
(必需) Clone the fork to your local machine.
创建 a branch from your fork (or from your clone).
Make your edits.
:::注意[Preview your edits]
To preview your edits, you need to 安装 .
Then, run .
A link will appear in the terminal, , where you can preview your edits. This link automatically 更新s with any 新功能 edits you make.
Commit your changes.
Push your commits to your branch and then back to your fork.

Return to GitHub and 创建 a pull 请求 from your committed changes. In the description form, add the product you changed in brackets and a brief description of your changes. For 示例 “[Images] Fixed broken link."
After you 创建 an issue or PR, a member of the Cloudflare organization will review your suggestion. Here is what to expect:
A member of the Cloudflare organization may tag others for technical or content reviews or 反馈.

If your suggestion requires more 信息rmation, a member of the Cloudflare organization may comment with a follow-up or clarification question. If they add the  tag, the issue or pull 请求 will automatically close if you do not respond within 14 days.
If your changes are approved:
For GitHub issues, a Cloudflare member might 创建 and link a 新功能 pull 请求 that addresses your 请求. When they merge the PR, they will also close your issue.
For GitHub PRs, the Cloudflare member will merge your PR.
If your suggestion is not approved, the Cloudflare member will respond with the reasoning and close your issue or PR.
Thank you for contributing to our open-source ecosystem and being a part of the Cloudflare 社区.

/tenant/get-started/.title: 快速开始
headings: Channel and Alliance partner 账户 设置
步骤 1 - 创建 an 账户
步骤 3 - 创建 a 区域
步骤 4 - 创建 a 区域 plan subscription
步骤 5 - 创建 other subscriptions
步骤 6 - Configure 区域 and services
paragraphs: Having access to Cloudflare’s provisioning capabilities allows you to more easily 创建 and manage Cloudflare 账户s. The following 步骤s will 获取 you started on making API calls to provision 账户s, users, and services.
Before using the Tenant API, you need to 创建 an 账户, verify your email address, and add your billing 信息rmation.

After you sign your partner agreement with Cloudflare, Cloudflare will add certain entitlements to your 账户 that allow you to provision and manage custom 账户s. If you have signed your partner agreement and your 账户 has not yet been 已启用, MSP partners should contact  and Agency Partners should contact .
You also need to retrieve your API 键 to authenticate your 请求s to the Tenant API.
For more details on using the Cloudflare API, refer to our API 概述.
Now that you have 创建d an 账户, you need to either give your customer direct access to Cloudflare or 构建 an interface for them to interact with.

The first method gives customers control over all aspects of Cloudflare, while the latter allows you to integrate your customer's Cloudflare experience into a 控制面板 that you control and that they may al读取y be familiar with.

When you grant user access to an 账户, Cloudflare will send an invitation to the user so they can 获取 access to the 账户. If they do not al读取y have a Cloudflare user, Cloudflare will take them through the process of creating one. Once 创建d, they will be given access to the 账户 and any 区域s al读取y 创建d.
If you want to give customers access to their individual 账户s, it is the same as if you were inviting a teammate to help manage your 账户.
You can also grant access to the Cloudflare 控制面板 by using the API.
In most cases, you will want to 创建 新功能 users with a role of  which always has the ID .
If your customer is on an 企业计划, they have access to a broader set of user 角色. To 获取 a full 列表 of available 角色, send a [](/api/资源/账户s/sub资源/角色/方法/列表/) 请求 to the API.
If you want greater control over how customers use Cloudflare or if you want your customers to use an existing 控制面板 of yours that they al读取y know, use the Cloudflare API to 构建 this experience.

This means that you will be making API calls to Cloudflare on behalf of your customers. To avoid 获取ting rate limited by our API, Cloudflare recommend that you 创建 账户s and users for each of your customers. Changes made by customer  should go through user  and changes made by customer  should go through user .
:::注意
This capability is not 已启用 by 默认. If you need this 函数ality, contact Cloudflare 支持.

To grant access via an interface, you need to 创建 a service user, as no one will 登录 to the 控制面板 with them. If you are planning to use this method, Cloudflare will enable you to see the API 键 in order to make API calls as this user.
Now that you have a customer 账户 and customer users (or service users), you need to 创建 a 区域.
To do this, send a [](/api/资源/区域s/方法/创建/) 请求 to the  端点 (including the customer 账户 ID you received in 步骤 1).
Now that you have a 区域 provisioned for the customer, you can add the appropriate 区域 plan based on your reseller agreement.
De待处理 on your agreement, you may be allowed to resell other add-on services. These are provisioned as 账户-level subscriptions.
Once you have added the necessary subscriptions, you or your customer can move on to configuring various services and fine-tuning 账户 and 区域 设置.

配置 can be done by anyone with access to the 账户 (as well as the correct user 权限). This process does not differ from configuring any other Cloudflare 账户. For additional guidance, refer to our Product docs.

At the same time, this structure keeps your customers' data and 设置 separate from each other.

/tenant/.title: Cloudflare Tenant
paragraphs: The Cloudflare Tenant API is a provisioning mechanism to help Channel and Alliance partners 设置 and manage Cloudflare 账户s and services for their customers.
These APIs are built into our Client v4 API library to provide a 流lined onboarding and 设置 experience.
As you dive into the Tenant API, take advantage of the following 资源:
Tenant structure explains some basic ideas behind the Tenant API and 工作原理.
快速开始 provides the quickest path to 获取 your customer 账户s up and 运行中.
How to offers 步骤-by-步骤 instructions for specific 任务s.
参考 topics contains detailed 信息rmation about the Tenant API, including a 列表 of available 区域 and 账户-level subscriptions.

/terraform/.title: Cloudflare Terraform provider
paragraphs: Configure Cloudflare using HashiCorp's “Infrastructure as Code” tool, Terraform. With Cloudflare’s Terraform provider, you can manage the Cloudflare 全球网络 using the same familiar 工具 you use to automate the rest of your infrastructure. Define and store 配置 in source code repositories like GitHub, track and version changes over time, and roll back when needed — all without needing to use the Cloudflare APIs.
Report Terraform 配置 issues via GitHub.

When you run a tunnel,  establishes four outbound-only, post-quantum encrypted connections to at least two distinct Cloudflare 数据中心. If any connection, server, or 数据中心 goes offline, your 资源 remain available.

A replica is an additional  instance that points to the same tunnel. Each replica 创建s four 新功能 connections, providing additional ingress points to your 源. You can run up to 25 replicas (100 connections) per tunnel. Traffic 路由 to the geographically closest replica.
To 部署 a replica for a remotely-managed tunnel:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to **Networking** > **隧道s**.
Select your tunnel.
Select **Add a replica**.
Select the operating system of the host where you want to 部署 a replica.
Copy the 安装 command and run it on the host.
To 部署 a replica for a locally-managed tunnel, run  on an additional host using the same tunnel credentials.
:::注意
For intelligent traffic steering, failover logic, or health 告警, use Cloudflare Load Balancing instead of replicas.

/tunnel/integrations/.title: 集成
/tunnel/integrations/.description: Use Cloudflare Tunnel with Cloudflare One, Workers VPC, Load Balancing, Access, Spectrum, and other Cloudflare services.
paragraphs: Cloudflare Tunnel integrates with other Cloudflare products to extend connectivity, 安全, and 可用性 for your applications.

Beyond publishing public applications, Cloudflare Tunnel is the connectivity layer for Cloudflare One — Cloudflare's SASE 平台. The same post-quantum encrypted 隧道s that serve your public applications can also serve private traffic when combined with the Cloudflare One Client:
**Private applications** — Expose internal web apps, SSH servers, RDP hosts, and other services to authenticated users without making them publicly reachable.

**Private networks** — 路由 entire IP ranges (RFC 1918, custom CIDRs) through a tunnel, replacing site-to-site VPNs. Users on Cloudflare One Client-enrolled devices reach private IPs as if they were on your private network.
**Network traffic 过滤** — Apply DNS, HTTP, and network-level policies through Cloudflare Gateway to all traffic flowing through the tunnel.
If you are using Cloudflare Tunnel for Zero Trust network access, VPN replacement, or private network connectivity, refer to the Cloudflare One Tunnel 文档 for 设置 and 配置.
相关: Connect private networks | SSH 指南 | RDP 指南 | Replace your VPN

Workers VPC enables Cloudflare Workers to access private 资源 such as 数据库s, internal APIs, and other services. Cloudflare Tunnel serves as the connectivity layer, establishing a post-quantum encrypted outbound connection from your private network to Cloudflare. You can manage your 隧道s directly from Wrangler, the Cloudflare Developer 平台 CLI.
快速开始: 创建 a tunnel and then follow the Workers VPC 指南 to configure VPC Services.
相关: Connect to a private API | Connect to an S3 存储桶

Cloudflare Load Balancing distributes traffic across mul提示le 源s using 健康检查, steering algorithms, and failover logic. Combined with Tunnel, you can load balance traffic to 源s without publicly rou表 IP addresses.
Each tunnel is assigned a 子域名 (). Add this as an 端点 in a 负载均衡器 pool with the application 主机名 as the host 头部.
快速开始: Refer to Load Balancing 设置 for 步骤-by-步骤 instructions.
相关: Tunnel replicas | Load Balancing 参考 architecture

Cloudflare Access provides an identity-aware 代理 that authenticates every 请求 to your applications. Combined with Tunnel, Access lets you publish internal web applications to the Internet while ensuring only authorized users can reach them. You can configure Access policies based on user identity, source IP ranges, service 令牌s for machine-to-machine 身份验证, and more.
快速开始: Publish a self-hosted application.
相关: Identity providers | Validate Access JWTs
Cloudflare Spectrum extends DDoS protection and traffic acceleration to non-HTTP 协议s. You can 路由 Spectrum application traffic to 源s connected via Tunnel using a DNS CNAME 记录 or 负载均衡器.
Spectrum integration with Tunnel is only 支持的 for HTTP and HTTPS applications. For the full 列表 of limitations, refer to the Spectrum limitations 文档.
Connect your 键 server to Cloudflare without exposing it to the internet.

Cloudflare.
Restrict tunnel connectivity to specific regions for data residency
要求.

/tunnel/.title: Cloudflare Tunnel
/tunnel/.description: Securely connect your 源服务器s, APIs, and services to Cloudflare with post-quantum encrypted 隧道s — no public IPs 必需.

Securely connect your 源服务器s, APIs, and services to Cloudflare with
post-quantum encrypted 隧道s — no public IPs 必需.
:::注意[Looking for private networking or Zero Trust?]
This 文档 covers Cloudflare Tunnel 使用场景 for public applications. For VPN replacement, private network access, and network traffic 过滤, refer to the Cloudflare One Tunnel 文档.

Cloudflare Tunnel connects your infrastructure to Cloudflare through an outbound-only, post-quantum encrypted connection. Instead of exposing a public IP, you 安装 a lightweight daemon called  on your server. It 创建s a persistent tunnel to Cloudflare's 全球网络, so all traffic to your 源s flows through Cloudflare — where CDN 缓存, WAF, Bot Management, and DDoS protection are applied automatically.
No open inbound ports. No public IPs. No attack surface.
安装  on your server or network.
establishes outbound, post-quantum encrypted connections to Cloudflare — no inbound ports or 防火墙 changes 必需.
Map public 主机名s to local services (for 示例,  to ).
Traffic flows through Cloudflare's network to your 源, with full CDN and 安全 applied.
Each tunnel maintains four long-lived connections to two Cloudflare 数据中心 for built-in redundancy. You can run mul提示le  replicas for additional high 可用性.
**Secure 源 connectivity** — Eliminate public 源 IPs. All traffic flows through Cloudflare with CDN, WAF, and DDoS protection applied.
**Public ingress 路由** — Publish internal applications to the internet by mapping public 主机名s to local services. 支持s HTTP, HTTPS, TCP, SSH, RDP, and more.
**Workers VPC** — Enable Cloudflare Workers to securely access private 数据库s, APIs, and services through your tunnel.
**Load Balancing** — Use 隧道s as 源 端点 in Cloudflare 负载均衡器 pools for high 可用性 and intelligent traffic steering.
设置 a tunnel in under 5 minutes using the 控制面板 or API.
DNS 记录s, 协议s, and load balancing for published applications.
Cloudflare One, Workers VPC, Load Balancing, Access, and more.
Replicas, 防火墙 规则, 令牌s, and 运行时 参数.

/tunnel/routing/.title: 路由
headings: 创建 a DNS 记录
Add a tunnel to a 负载均衡器 pool
paragraphs: Cloudflare Tunnel 路由 traffic from Cloudflare's network to services 运行中 behind . When you publish an application, you map a public 主机名 to a local service — for 示例,  to  — and Cloudflare applies CDN 缓存, WAF, and DDoS protection before forwarding the 请求 to your 源.
A published application is a 主机名-to-service mapping defined in your tunnel 配置. Each mapping tells  which local service should receive traffic for a given public 主机名.
You can publish mul提示le applications on a single tunnel. For each application, specify:
**Public 主机名** — The 域名 or 子域名 that users visit (for 示例, ).
**Service** — The local address or socket where the application is 运行中 (for 示例, ).
When you add a 路由 through the 控制面板, Cloudflare automatically 创建s a DNS 记录 pointing the 主机名 to your tunnel 子域名 ().
Use a public 负载均衡器 to distribute traffic across servers 运行中 your published applications. This provides health-check-based failover and intelligent traffic steering across regions.

运行中 mul提示le  replicas on the same tunnel UUID provides basic redundancy — if one host fails, other replicas continue serving traffic. However, the 负载均衡器 treats all replicas of the same tunnel UUID as a single 端点.
For granular traffic steering and 会话 affinity, connect each host using a different tunnel UUID so the 负载均衡器 can address them independently.
:::注意[前提条件]
A Cloudflare Tunnel with at least one published application 路由.

Cloudflare's smart CAPTCHA alternative.
Turnstile can be embedded into any website without sending traffic through Cloudflare and works without showing visitors a CAPTCHA.

Turnstile adapts the challenge outcome to the individual visitor or browser. First, we run a series of small non-inter活跃 JavaScript challenges to gather signals about the visitor or browser environment.

These challenges include proof-of-work (computational puzzles), proof-of-space, probing for web APIs, and various other challenges for detecting browser-quirks and human behavior. As a result, we can fine-tune the difficulty of the challenge to the specific 请求 and avoid showing a visual or inter活跃 puzzle to a user.
:::注意
For detailed 信息rmation on Turnstile's data privacy practices, refer to the Turnstile Privacy Addendum.
Turnstile wid获取 类型s include:
**Managed** (recommended): Automatically decides whether to show a checkbox based on visitor risk level.
**Non-inter活跃**: Visitors never need to interact with the wid获取.
**Invisible**: The wid获取 is completely hidden from the visitor.
Turnstile is WCAG 2.2 AAA compliant.

/turnstile/concepts/widget/.title: Turnstile wid获取s
paragraphs: A Turnstile wid获取 defines how Turnstile behaves on your webpage. Each wid获取 has a mode, a label, a  site键 , and a  密钥 键 . You can 创建 mul提示le wid获取s with different 配置s.
Turnstile is hosted under . Your application will connect to this 源. If your site uses a Content 安全 Policy, you must allow connections to this 域名.
The available modes for Turnstile wid获取s are Managed, Non-Inter活跃, and Invisible.

Managed mode is fully managed by Cloudflare. It automatically chooses the appropriate 操作 based on client-side signals and risk levels. Cloudflare uses the 信息rmation from the visitor to decide if an inter活跃 challenge should be used.

Turnstile will only require inter操作 if a further check is necessary to verify that the visitor is human. When an inter操作 is 必需, the visitor will be prompted to select a box. There will be no images or text to decipher.
Managed mode is ideal for users who want a simple 配置 without needing to fine-tune the wid获取's behavior.
Visitors will see a wid获取 with a loading spinner while the challenges run in their browsers. Unlike managed mode, visitors will never be 必需 or prompted to interact with the wid获取.
Non-Inter活跃 mode is ideal for users who want to prioritize visitor experience and do not want to add any friction on their website with a Turnstile inter操作.

Invisible mode is similar to Non-Inter活跃 mode where visitors will never interact with the Turnstile wid获取. Visitors will also not see a wid获取 or any indication that an invisible browser challenge is in progress.
Invisible mode is ideal for users who want to prioritize visitor and visual experience on their website.
:::注意[Link to Cloudflare's Turnstile Privacy Policy]
Wid获取s can be implemented in normal, flexible, or compact sizes.
Refer to Wid获取 配置s for detailed 配置 options and code 示例.
Turnstile wid获取s 支持 mul提示le appearance modes and themes to match your website's design.
Refer to Wid获取 配置s for implementation details.

/turnstile/get-started/.title: 快速开始
paragraphs: Turnstile protects your website forms from bots. It works in two 步骤s: a JavaScript wid获取 runs challenges in the visitor's browser and produces a 令牌, then your server sends that 令牌 to Cloudflare to confirm it is valid. This 指南 covers how to 设置 both 步骤s.
开始之前, you must have:
A Cloudflare 账户
A website or web application to protect
Basic knowledge of HTML and your preferred server-side language

A Turnstile wid获取 is an instance of Turnstile embedded on your webpage. Each wid获取 has a  site键  (a public identifier you place in your HTML) and a  密钥 键  (a private credential your server uses to validate 令牌s).
:::注意[重要]
Regardless of how you 创建 and manage your wid获取s, you will still need to embed the wid获取 on your webpage and validate the 令牌 on your server.
Implementing Turnstile involves two essential components that work to获取her:
Client-side: Embed the wid获取
Add the Turnstile wid获取 to your webpage to challenge visitors and generate 令牌s. A 令牌 is a 字符串 (up to 2,048 characters) generated when the visitor completes a challenge.
Server-side: Validate the 令牌
Send 令牌s to Cloudflare's Siteverify API — the 端点 for validating Turnstile 令牌s — to confirm they are authentic and have not been tampered with.

Turnstile is designed to be an independent service. You can use Turnstile on any website, regardless of whether it is proxied through the Cloudflare network. This allows for flexible 部署 across multi-cloud environments, on-premises infrastructure, or sites using other CDNs. The client-side wid获取 and server-side validation 步骤s are completely self-contained.
Refer to Implementation below for guidance on how to implement Turnstile on your website.
Follow the 步骤s below to implement Turnstile.
First, you must 创建 a Turnstile wid获取 to 获取 your site键 and 密钥 键.
Select your preferred implementation method:
Cloudflare 控制面板
API
Terraform
Add the Turnstile wid获取 to your webpage forms and applications.
Refer to Embed the wid获取 to 了解更多 about implicit and explicit rendering 方法.
:::注意[测试]
Implement server-side validation to verify the 令牌s generated by your wid获取s.
Refer to Validate the 令牌 to secure your implementation with proper 令牌 verification.
Special considerations are necessary for mobile applications and WebView implementations.
Refer to Mobile implementation for more 信息rmation on mobile application integration.
If you are currently using reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, or another CAPTCHA service, Turnstile can be a drop-in replacement. You can copy and paste our script wherever you have 部署ed the existing script today.
Refer to 迁移 for 步骤-by-步骤 迁移 guidance from other CAPTCHA services.
Protect your 密钥 键s. Never expose 密钥 键s in client-side code.
Rotate your 键s regularly. Use API or 控制面板 to rotate 密钥 键s periodically.
Restrict your 主机名s. Only allow wid获取s on 域名s that you control.
监控 the usage. Use 分析 to detect unusual patterns.
Use descriptive names. Name wid获取s based on their purpose, such as "Login Form" or "Contact Page".
Separate your environments. Use different wid获取s for development, staging, and production.
Keep track of which wid获取s are used at which locations.
Store your wid获取 配置s in version control when using Terraform.

/turnstile/turnstile-analytics/.title: Turnstile 分析
/turnstile/turnstile-analytics/.description: Use Turnstile 分析 to view the 数字 of challenges issued,
paragraphs: Turnstile 分析 provides you with a view of the top wid获取 statistics across different metadata dimensions to understand where your traffic is coming from, which environments have the highest challenge activity, and whether certain sources are disproportionately failing or bypassing challenges, allowing you to fine-tune your 安全 设置, apply more granular mitigations, and pro活跃ly respond to evolving threats.
**Top 主机名s**: If the Turnstile wid获取 is placed across mul提示le 主机名s, this will display the highest traffic 主机名s where challenges are being issued.
**Top Browsers**: A breakdown of browsers that are most commonly encountering Turnstile challenges, helping customers spot trends in visitor traffic.
**Top Countries**: View the top 源ating countries for visitors completing challenges, which can help identify regional traffic anomalies.
**Top User Agents**: Identify which user agents are generating the most Turnstile challenge 请求s.
**Top ASNs**: Displays the highest volume of challenges issued from specific Autonomous System 数字s (ASNs), helping customers detect potential bot activity.
**Top Operating Systems**: Shows which operating systems are most common among visitors passing or failing challenges.
**Top Source IPs**: Identify the highest-volume IP addresses issuing Turnstile challenges, which can be useful in identifying attack sources or repeated challenge failures.
To see an 概述 of your wid获取 分析:
The 指标 show changes in the solve rate, wid获取 traffic, and top 操作s for your wid获取.

构建 and 部署 AI applications on Cloudflare's 全球网络 with inference at the edge, vector 数据库s, and model 网关s. AI applications can present unique infrastructure challenges, such as unpredic表 inference costs, 延迟-sensitive user experiences, and the need to work with mul提示le model providers. Cloudflare provides a complete 平台 for 构建ing AI applications that are fast, cost-effective, and globally distributed.

**Workers AI** or **AI Gateway** generates 响应s using retrieved context

Built-in 缓存 reduces costs for repeated queries
Unified logging and 分析 across all providers
部署 low-延迟 AI 特性 directly at the edge:
**Workers** handles 请求s at the nearest Cloudflare location and runs inference via the Workers AI 绑定 — no round-trips to 源服务器s
**KV** caches frequent 响应s to reduce inference calls and 延迟
**D1** stores 会话 state and conversation history alongside the inference logic

Node.js (version 16.17.0 or later) 安装ed on your machine.

/vectorize/platform/pricing/.title: 定价
paragraphs: Vectorize bills are based on:

**Queried Vector Dimensions**: The total 数字 of vector dimensions queried. If you have 10,000 vectors with 384-dimensions in an 索引, and make 100 queries against that 索引, your total queried vector dimensions would sum to 3.878 million ().
**Stored Vector Dimensions**: The total 数字 of vector dimensions stored. If you have 1,000 vectors with 1536-dimensions in an 索引, your stored vector dimensions would sum to 1.536 million ().
You are not billed for CPU, memory, "活跃 索引 hours", or the 数字 of 索引es you 创建. If you are not issuing queries against your 索引es, you are not billed for queried vector dimensions.
The following 表 defines a 数字 of 示例 use-cases and the estimated monthly cost for 查询ing a Vectorize 索引. These estimates do not include the Vectorize usage that is part of the Workers Free and 付费计划.
included  All of this usage would fall into the Vectorize usage
included in the Workers Free or Paid plan.
most  Most of this usage would fall into the Vectorize usage included
within the Workers Paid plan.
Frequently asked questions 相关 to Vectorize 定价:
Will Vectorize always have a free tier?
Yes, the Workers free tier will always include the ability to proto类型 and experiment with Vectorize for free.
What happens if I exceed the monthly included 读取s, writes and/or storage on the paid tier?
You will be billed for the additional 读取s, writes and storage according to Vectorize's 定价.
Does Vectorize charge for data transfer / egress?
No.
Do queries I issue from the HTTP API or the Wrangler command-line count as billable usage?
Yes: any queries you issue against your 索引, including from the Workers API, HTTP API and CLI all count as usage.
Does an empty 索引, with no vectors, contribute to storage?
No. Empty 索引es do not count as stored vector dimensions.

构建 full-stack AI applications with Vectorize, Cloudflare's powerful vector 数据库.

Vectorize is a globally distributed vector 数据库 that enables you to 构建 full-stack, AI-powered applications with Cloudflare Workers. Vectorize makes 查询ing embeddings — representations of 值s or 对象s like text, images, audio that are designed to be consumed by machine learning models and semantic 搜索 algorithms — faster, easier and more affordable.

For 示例, by storing the embeddings (vectors) generated by a machine learning model, including those built-in to Workers AI or by bringing your own from 平台s like OpenAI, you can 构建 applications with powerful 搜索, similarity, recommendation, classification and/or anomaly detection capabilities based on your own data.

The vectors returned can 参考 images stored in Cloudflare R2, documents in KV, and/or user profiles stored in D1 — enabling you to go from vector 搜索 result to concrete 对象 all within the Workers 平台, and without standing up additional infrastructure.
Learn how to 创建 your first Vectorize 数据库, upload vector embeddings, and 查询 those embeddings from Cloudflare Workers.
Learn how to use Vectorize to generate vector embeddings using Workers AI.
Learn how to automatically 索引 your data and store it in Vectorize, then 查询 it to generate context-aware 响应s using AI 搜索.
Run machine learning models, powered by 无服务器 GPUs, on Cloudflare’s 全球网络.
Store large amounts of unstructured data without the costly egress 带宽 fees associated with typical cloud storage services.
Learn about Vectorize 限制 and how to work within them.
Learn how you can 构建 and 部署 ambitious AI applications to Cloudflare's
全球网络.

channel to show what you are 构建ing, and discuss the 平台
with other developers.

what is 新功能 in Cloudflare Developer 平台.

/version-management/get-started/.title: 快速开始
paragraphs: Follow this tutorial to start 测试 and 部署ing 区域 配置 changes with Version Management.
These environments each serve a specific purpose and are accessed differently:
For more details, refer to 创建 environment.
Next, promote your version through your different environments.
After promoting to each environment, 测试 the 新功能 version in your 新功能 environment.
For 新功能 changes to your 区域, 创建 a 新功能 version and repeat this process.
The versions 创建d in Version Management are immu表 and cannot be 删除d to ensure that changes are tracked and can be rolled back if needed.

You can, however, 创建 a 新功能 version and clone the 配置 from the previous version, making any necessary changes before promoting it to your desired environment. This solution allows you to effectively "删除" the old version by no longer using it.

/version-management/.title: Cloudflare Version Management
paragraphs: Safely 测试, 部署, and roll back changes to your 区域 配置s using Version Management.
By using Version Management, you can:
创建 independent versions to make changes with no risk of impacting live traffic.
Safely 部署 changes to staging environments ahead of 部署 to production.
Quickly roll back 部署ed changes when issues occur.
For access, enable 区域 Versioning in the Cloudflare 控制面板.
To use Version Management, the following must all be true:
Your 区域 is on an 企业计划.
Your 区域 is in an 活跃 state.
Your 区域 uses WAF managed 规则.
Your 区域 has migrated to use custom 规则 instead of 防火墙 规则 (已弃用).
Your 账户 uses the 新功能 WAF (if not, contact your 账户 team).
Your user 账户 must have a Super Administrator or Administrator role. **区域 Versioning** 角色 cannot 创建 新功能 versions.
Your user 账户 must have an API 键 provisioned (if not, view your API 键).
Your user 账户 must have API Access 已启用. Refer to control API Access for more 信息rmation.
You must use the 控制面板 to manage versioning.

安全 分析 displays 信息rmation about all incoming HTTP 请求s for your 域名, including 请求s not handled by Cloudflare 安全 products. This gives you visibility into your full traffic profile, not only the 请求s that 触发器ed a 安全 规则.
By 默认, 安全 分析 shows 请求s from end users (请求s to your site directly, as opposed to 请求s generated by Cloudflare products). 请求s generated by Cloudflare Workers sub请求s are not included.
Use the 安全 分析 控制面板 to:
View the traffic distribution for your 域名.
Understand which traffic is being  mitigated  by Cloudflare 安全 products, and where non-mitigated traffic is being served from (Cloudflare 全球网络 or 源服务器).
Analyze suspicious traffic and 创建 tailored WAF custom 规则 based on applied 过滤器s.
Review Cloudflare's 安全 scores ( attack score , bot score, malicious uploads, and leaked credentials results) with real data from your traffic.
Find an appropriate rate limit for incoming traffic.
Analyze suspicious traffic (新功能 安全 控制面板 only).
安全 分析 shows all traffic, whether or not Cloudflare acted on it. If you are looking for 请求s that Cloudflare 安全 products acted on or flagged, refer to 安全 事件 instead.

区域/域名-level 分析 are included with 所有计划, though the retention period, 查询 window, displayed statistics, and 过滤器 options vary by plan. 账户-level 分析 are only available to customers on Business and Enterprise 域名 plans.
To use 安全 分析:
登录 to the Cloudflare 控制面板 and select your 账户.
Go to the 账户 or 区域/域名 控制面板:
For the 区域/域名 控制面板, go to the **分析** page.
For the 账户 控制面板, go to the **安全 分析** page.
Adjust the scope of 分析 by manually entering 过滤器 条件s. You can also select 过滤器 or Exclude to 过滤器 by a 字段 值. These buttons appear when you hover the 分析 data legend.
To manually add a 过滤器:
Select **Add 过滤器**.
Select a 字段, an operator, and a 值. For 示例, to 过滤器 事件 by source IP address, select the _Source IP_ 字段, select the _equals_ operator, and enter the IP address.
Select **Apply**.
Take the following into 账户 when entering 过滤器 值s:
Do not add quotes around 值s.
Do not enter the  prefix when entering ASN 数字s. For 示例, enter  instead of .
通配符s are not 支持的.
Select the time frame you wish to analyze from the _Previous 24 hours_ drop-down 列表.
To 创建 a custom 规则 with an 表达式 based on the 过滤器s you applied in 安全 分析, select 创建 custom 安全 规则 above the main chart.
The 新功能 安全 控制面板 and the old 控制面板 have a few differences, including the order of the various sections on the 安全 分析 page.
:::注意
Only available in the 新功能 安全 控制面板.
The suspicious activity section gives you 信息rmation about suspicious 请求s that were identified by the Cloudflare detections you have 已启用. The 支持的 detections include:
账户 takeover
Leaked credential check (only for user and password leaked)
Malicious uploads
WAF attack score
AI 安全 for Apps
Each suspicious activity is classified with a severity score that can vary from critical to low. You can use the 过滤器 option to investigate further.
The main chart displays the following data for the selected time frame, according to the selected tab:
**Traffic analysis**: Traffic mitigated by the Cloudflare 安全 平台, served by Cloudflare, and served by the 源服务器, according to the following classification:
**Mitigated by WAF**: 请求s blocked or challenged by Cloudflare's application 安全 products such as the WAF and HTTP DDoS protection. 请求s with _Log_, _Skip_, or _Allow_ 操作s are not counted as mitigated.
**Served by Cloudflare**: 请求s served by the Cloudflare 全球网络 such as cached content and 重定向s.
**Served by 源**: 请求s served by your 源服务器.
**Attack analysis**: WAF attack score analysis of incoming 请求s, classifying them as _Clean_, _Likely clean_, _Likely attack_, or _Attack_.
**Bot analysis**: Bot score analysis of incoming 请求s, classifying them as _Automated_, _Likely automated_, _Likely human_, or _Verified bot_.

**请求 rate analysis**: Displays data on the 请求 rate for traffic matching the selected 过滤器s and time period. Use this tab to find an appropriate rate limit for incoming traffic matching the applied 过滤器s.
**Cloudy analysis** (测试版): 获取 insights about your application 安全 by using plain language to interrogate your data. For more 信息rmation, refer to our blog post.
This section presents top statistics about incoming 请求s highlighting relevant properties commonly used when performing a 安全 analysis.
You can 过滤器 or exclude some of the top 值s by selecting 过滤器 or Exclude next to each 值.
To display additional top statistics, select More top statistics.
Cloudflare calculates the top statistics from a sample of 请求s in the selected time frame. To know the applied sampling rate, hover the icon next to the name of a top statistic.
Only available in the previous 控制面板 navigation structure.
The provided insights show statistics for commonly used 过滤器s when doing 安全 analyses, without immediately applying these 过滤器s to the displayed data.

If you find a high 值 in one or more insights, this can mean that there is a set of suspicious 请求s that you should investigate. Additionally, these insights are a good starting point for applying a first set of 过滤器s to the 控制面板.
To apply the 过滤器s for an insight to the data displayed in the 安全 分析 控制面板, select 过滤器 next to the insight.
The Attack analysis, Bot analysis, Malicious uploads, and 账户 abuse detection sections display statistics 相关 to Cloudflare's 安全 scores for incoming 请求s in the selected time frame:
**Attack analysis**: Uses WAF attack scores to classify 请求s based on the likelihood that the 请求 is malicious.
**Bot analysis**: Uses bot scores to classify 请求s based on the likelihood they come from automated traffic.
**Malicious uploads**: Uses WAF content scanning scores to detect potentially malicious content uploaded in 请求s.

**账户 abuse detection**: Uses leaked credentials detection to identify login attempts with credentials that have been exposed in data breaches. 所有计划 include access to the **Leaked credential check** under this section. For more 信息rmation on what to do if you have leaked credentials, refer to 示例 mitigation 规则.

You can examine different traffic segments according to the current metric (attack score, bot score, or content scanning). To apply score 过滤器s for different segments, select the buttons below the traffic chart. For 示例, select Likely attack under Attack analysis to 过滤器 请求s that are likely an attack (请求s with WAF attack score 值s between 21 and 50).
Additionally, you can use the slider tool below the chart to 过滤器 incoming 请求s according to the current metric. This allows you to 过滤器 traffic groups outside the predefined segments.
安全 分析 shows 请求 日志 for the selected time frame and applied 过滤器s, along with detailed 信息rmation and 安全 analyses of those 请求s.

By 默认, 安全 分析 uses sampled 日志 (a subset of your traffic rather than every individual 请求). Sampling allows Cloudflare to return results in seconds, even when 查询 volumes are large. If you are 订阅d to Log Explorer, you may also have access to raw 日志.
This section contains detailed 登录formation for individual (sampled) 请求s in the selected time frame.
The displayed 信息rmation includes:
Mitigation 操作 applied to the 请求
Cache status
Status code returned by the 源服务器 to Cloudflare (in case of a cache miss)
Status code returned by Cloudflare to the client
安全 scores for the 请求 (attack, bot, uploaded content scanning)
请求 properties
This 特性 is currently in its early access phase. Contact your 账户 team to 请求 access.

When performing a forensic analysis, you sometimes select a very short time frame and apply several 过滤器s to identify a specific set of 请求s. In this situation, to 获取 a better understanding of the incoming 请求s at a given point in time, you would require the full 列表 of 请求s and not just a sample.

By 默认, 安全 分析 shows sampled 日志 based on the 过滤器s you apply. Under certain 条件s, you can switch to Raw 日志. This view shows all the 请求 日志 for the selected time frame and 过滤器s instead of sampled 日志. At this time, this view is only available when the 数字 of sampled 日志 shown in the 安全 分析 page is lower than 100.
To switch from sampled 日志 to raw 日志, select Switch to raw 日志 under Sampled 日志. This option is only available when the 数字 of (sampled) 日志 for the selected time frame is lower than 100.
To switch from raw 日志 back to sampled 日志, select Switch back to sampled 日志.
You can switch to Log Explorer to dive deeper on your analysis while applying the same 过滤器s you used in 安全 分析. Raw 日志 in 安全 分析 are based on the same data source used in Log Explorer.
:::注意[注意]

Currently, changing the time frame or the applied 过滤器s while showing raw 日志 may cause the Cloudflare 控制面板 to switch automatically to sampled 日志. This happens if the total 数字 of 请求 日志 for the selected time frame is high.
The 安全 分析 控制面板 uses sampled data, except when showing raw 日志. If you 查询 安全 分析 data through the GraphQL 分析 API, the primary underlying datasets are  and . For more 信息rmation, refer to Datasets (表s).

/waf/account/.title: 账户-level WAF 配置
paragraphs: :::注意
This 特性 requires an 企业计划.

The 账户-level Web 应用防火墙 (WAF) 配置 allows you to define a 配置 once and apply it to mul提示le Enterprise 区域s in your 账户. Instead of configuring each 区域 individually, you 创建 规则ets at the 账户 level and use 表达式s to control which 区域s and traffic they apply to.
For 示例, you can 部署 a single 规则et that applies to  URI paths across both  and . 规则ets can tar获取 all incoming traffic or a specific subset.
At the 账户 level, WAF 规则 are grouped into 规则ets. You can perform the following operations:
创建 and 部署 custom 规则ets
创建 and 部署 速率限制 规则ets
部署 managed 规则ets

/waf/detections/attack-score/.title: WAF attack score
headings: 1. 创建 a custom 规则
3. 更新 the 规则 操作
paragraphs: The attack score traffic detection classifies each 请求 using a machine learning algorithm, assigning a score from 1 to 99 based on the likelihood that the 请求 is malicious. This detection complements WAF Managed 规则.

Managed 规则 match 请求s against known attack signatures — specific patterns of established attack vectors. They have a very low rate of false positives. However, attackers can modify known payloads, for 示例 by using fuzzing techniques (a 测试 technique that sends modified inputs to find vulnerabilities), to evade exact signature matches.
Attack score addresses this gap. You can use the score to identify potentially malicious traffic that is not an exact match to any of the 规则 in WAF Managed 规则.
To maximize protection, Cloudflare recommends that you use both Managed 规则 and attack score.
:::注意
The full 特性 is available to Enterprise customers. 商业计划s only have access to a single 字段 (WAF Attack Score Class).
The Cloudflare WAF provides the following attack score 字段s:
[1]: /规则et-engine/规则-language/字段s/参考/cf.waf.score/
[2]: /规则et-engine/规则-language/字段s/参考/cf.waf.score.sqli/
[3]: /规则et-engine/规则-language/字段s/参考/cf.waf.score.xss/
[4]: /规则et-engine/规则-language/字段s/参考/cf.waf.score.rce/
[5]: /规则et-engine/规则-language/字段s/参考/cf.waf.score.class/
[6]: https://www.cloudflare.com/learning/安全/threats/sql-injection/
[7]: https://www.cloudflare.com/learning/安全/threats/cross-site-scripting/
[8]: https://www.cloudflare.com/learning/安全/what-is-remote-code-执行/
You can use these 字段s in 表达式s of custom 规则 and 速率限制 规则. Numeric score 字段s range from  to :
A score of  indicates that the 请求 is almost certainly malicious.
A score of  indicates that the 请求 is likely clean.
A score of  means the 请求 reached the WAF attack score system, but the system decided not to score it.
In Logpush data, a score of  means the 请求 did not reach the attack score stage — for 示例, because a previous 规则 or protection system al读取y mitigated it. The 值  does not appear in the Cloudflare 控制面板.

The global WAF Attack Score is mathematically derived from individual attack scores (for 示例, from SQLi Attack Score and XSS Attack Score), reflecting their interdependence. However, the global score is not a sum of individual scores. A low global score usually indicates medium to low individual scores, while a high global score suggests higher individual scores.
The WAF Attack Score Class 字段 can have one of the following 值s, de待处理 on the calculated 请求 attack score:
请求s with the special attack score  will show a WAF Attack Score Class of _Unscored_ in the Cloudflare 控制面板, but you cannot use this class 值 in 规则 表达式s.
Attack score automatically detects and decodes Base64, JavaScript (Unicode escape sequences), and URL encoded content anywhere in the 请求: URL, 头部, and 正文.

Blocking traffic solely based on attack score for all 值s below  is not recommended. The _Likely attack_ range (scores –) can include legitimate 请求s incorrectly flagged as malicious (false positives). If you want to block traffic based on attack score, do one of the following:
Use a more strict WAF Attack Score 值 in your 表达式. For 示例, block traffic with a WAF attack score below  or below  (you may need to adjust the exact threshold).
Combine a higher WAF Attack Score threshold with additional 过滤器s when blocking incoming traffic. For 示例, include a check for a specific URI path in your 表达式 or use bot score as part of your criteria.
Enterprise customers can 创建 a custom 规则 that blocks 请求s with a WAF Attack Score less than or equal to  (recommended initial threshold). For 示例:
Equivalent 规则 表达式:
操作: _Block_
Business customers must 创建 a custom 规则 with the WAF Attack Score Class 字段 instead. For 示例, use this 字段 to block incoming 请求s with a score class of _Attack_:
监控 the 规则 you 创建d, especially in the first few days, to make sure you entered an appropriate threshold (or class) for your traffic. 更新 the 规则 if 必需.
If you are an Enterprise customer and you 创建d a 规则 with _Log_ 操作, change the 规则 操作 to a more severe one, like _Managed Challenge_ or _Block_.

WAF attack score and bot score serve different purposes. Attack score identifies variations of attacks that WAF Managed 规则 do not catch. Bot score identifies whether a 请求 comes from automated traffic.

/waf/analytics/security-events/.title: 安全 事件
headings: Location in the 控制面板
创建 安全 规则 from current 过滤器s
Share 安全 事件 过滤器s
paragraphs: 特性表,

安全 事件 allows you to review  mitigated 请求s  and helps you tailor your 安全 配置s. Use 安全 事件 to investigate 请求s that Cloudflare 安全 products acted on or flagged, identify false positives, and fine-tune your 安全 规则.
If you want to analyze all incoming traffic, including 请求s that Cloudflare did not act on, refer to 安全 分析 instead.
The main elements of the 控制面板 are the following:
事件 summary: Provides the 数字 of 安全 事件 on traffic during the selected time period, grouped according to the selected dimension (for 示例, 操作, Host, Country).
事件 by service: 列表s the 安全-相关 activity per 安全 特性 (for 示例, WAF, API Shield).
Top 事件 by source: Provides details of the traffic flagged or 操作ed by a Cloudflare 安全 特性 (for 示例, IP addresses, User Agents, Paths, Countries, Hosts, ASNs).
Sampled 日志: Summarizes 安全 事件 by date to show the 操作 taken and the applied Cloudflare 安全 product.

安全 事件 displays 信息rmation about 请求s 操作ed or flagged by Cloudflare 安全 products, including 特性 such as Browser Integrity Check. A single HTTP 请求 can generate one or more 安全 事件 when it 触发器s 安全 特性. The 安全 事件 控制面板 shows these individual 事件, not the HTTP 请求s themselves.
Available 特性 vary according to your Cloudflare plan:
To open 安全 事件 for a given 区域:
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to the **分析** page.
Select the **事件** tab.
In the Cloudflare 控制面板, go to **安全** > **事件**.
Additionally, Enterprise customers have access to the 账户-level 控制面板:

You can apply mul提示le 过滤器s and exclusions to narrow the scope of 安全 事件 and adjust the report duration. Modifying the duration, 过滤器s, or exclusions affects the 分析 data displayed on the entire page including Sampled 日志 and all graphs.
You can adjust the scope of 分析 by manually entering 过滤器 条件s. Alternatively, select 过滤器 or Exclude to 过滤器 by a 字段 值. These buttons appear when you hover the 分析 data legend.
To manually add a 过滤器:
Select **Add 过滤器**.
Select a 字段, an operator, and a 值. For 示例, to 过滤器 事件 by IP address, select _IP_ for the 字段, select _equals_ for the operator, and enter the IP address.
Select **Apply**.
Take the following into 账户 when entering 过滤器 值s:
Do not add quotes around 值s.
Do not enter the  prefix when entering ASN 数字s. For 示例, enter  instead of .
通配符s are not 支持的.
To adjust report duration, select the desired duration from the dropdown. The 默认 值 is .
The available report duration 值s depend on your Cloudflare plan. Refer to 可用性 for details.
To 创建 a custom 规则 based on your current 过滤器s and exclusions:
Old 控制面板: Select **创建 custom 规则**.
新功能 安全 控制面板: Select **创建 custom 安全 规则**.
The 事件 summary section provides the 数字 of 安全 事件 on traffic during the selected time period, grouped according to the selected dimension (for 示例, 操作, Host, Country, or ASN).
You can adjust the displayed data according to one of the 值s by selecting 过滤器 or Exclude when hovering the legend.
The 事件 by service section 列表s the activity per Cloudflare 安全 特性 (for 示例, Managed 规则 or 速率限制 规则).
You can adjust the scope of 安全 事件 to one of the displayed services by selecting 过滤器 or Exclude when hovering the legend or by selecting the corresponding graph bar.
In Top 事件 by source you can find details of the traffic flagged or 操作ed by a 安全 特性 — for 示例, IP Addresses, User Agents, Paths, and Countries.
You can adjust the scope of 安全 事件 to one of the 列表ed source 值s by selecting 过滤器 or Exclude when hovering the 值.
:::注意
A 删除d custom 规则 or 速率限制 规则 will show as  under 防火墙 规则 or Rate limit 规则. To check the changes made within your Cloudflare 账户, review your Audit 日志.

Sampled 日志 shows a subset of 安全 事件 for the selected time period, 列表ed by date with the 操作 taken and the applied Cloudflare 安全 特性. For large volumes of traffic, Cloudflare uses sampling to return results faster. This means that not every individual 事件 may appear in the 列表.
安全 事件 are shown by individual 事件 rather than by 请求. For 示例, if a single 请求 触发器s three different 安全 特性, the 安全 事件 will show three individual 事件 in Sampled 日志.

Expand each 事件 to check its details, and define 过滤器s and exclusions based on the 事件's 字段 值s. Select the 过滤器 or Exclude button when hovering a 字段 to add the 字段 值 to the 过滤器s or exclusions 列表 of the displayed 分析. To download the 事件 data in JSON format, select Export 事件 JSON.
To configure the columns displayed in Sampled 日志, select Edit columns. This gives you flexibility de待处理 on the 类型 of analysis that you need to perform.

For 示例, if you are diagnosing a bot-相关 issue, you may want to display the User agent and the Country columns. On the other hand, if you are trying to identify a DDoS attack, you may want to display the IP address, ASN, and Path columns.
For details on most 操作s that appear in Sampled 日志, refer to 操作s.
Besides the 操作s you can select when configuring 规则 in Cloudflare 安全 products, you may also find 事件 with the following associated 操作s:
_Connection Close_
_Force Connection Close_
For details on these 操作s, refer to HTTP DDoS Attack Protection 参数.

The _Managed Challenge_ 操作 that may appear in Sampled 日志 is available in the following 安全 特性 and products: WAF custom 规则, 速率限制 规则, Bot Fight Mode, IP Access 规则, User Agent Blocking 规则, and 防火墙 规则 (已弃用).

You can export a set of up to 500 raw 事件 from Sampled 日志 in JSON format. Export 事件 data to combine and analyze Cloudflare data with your own stored in a separate system or 数据库, such as a  SIEM system . The data you export will reflect any 过滤器s you have applied.
To export the displayed 事件 (up to 500), select Export in Sampled 日志.

When you add a 过滤器 and specify a report duration (time window) in 安全 事件, the Cloudflare 控制面板 URL changes to reflect the 参数 you configured. You can share that URL with other users so that they can analyze the same 信息rmation that you see.
For 示例, after adding a 过滤器 for  and setting the report duration to 72 hours, the URL should look like the following:
To print or download a 快照 report:
Old 控制面板: Select **Print report**.
新功能 安全 控制面板: Select the three dots > **Print report**.
Your web browser's printing interface will present you with options for printing or downloading the PDF report.
The generated report will reflect all applied 过滤器s.
安全 事件 currently has these limitations:

安全 事件 may use sampled data to improve 性能. If your 搜索 uses sampled data, 安全 事件 might not display all 事件 and 过滤器s might not return the expected results. To display more 事件, select a smaller time frame (a narrower time range reduces the volume of data, which reduces or eliminates sampling).

The Cloudflare 控制面板 may show an inaccurate 数字 of 事件 per page. Data queries are highly optimized, but this means that 分页 may not always work because the source data may have been sampled. The GraphQL 分析 API does not have this 分页 issue.
触发器ed OWASP 规则 appear in the 安全 事件 page under **Additional 日志**, but they are not included in exported JSON files.
